title: 护照入境章
prompt_cn: A realistic macro close-up photograph of a passport interior page in landscape orientation. The main subject is a passport page exhibiting authentic texture, with clearly visible fine fiber grain and a subtly undulating natural paper surface. The paper background is printed with intricate security anti-counterfeiting patterns composed of interwoven fine wavy lines in light blue, pale green, and light pink, along with subtle geometric underprints. The visual center of the frame is a prominent circular entry stamp, pressed onto the passport page in slightly smudged dark red ink. The stamp is tilted slightly to the right by approximately 15 degrees, presenting the realistic effect of being manually pressed with force; some of the ink, having seeped into the paper fibers, exhibits slightly irregular edges and broken points in texture. The outermost ring of the stamp is a decorative circular border composed of fine lines. On the upper inner half of the stamp, the words 'WELCOME TO BEIJING' are arranged in bold English along the arc; on the lower inner half, 'BEIJING, CHINA' is arranged along the arc. In the central background of the stamp, the subtle silhouette outline of the Forbidden City's iconic classical architecture is artfully incorporated as a background detail. Directly in front of the Forbidden City silhouette, the bold English letters 'ARRIVAL' are arranged horizontally in a prominent manner, with the clearly printed date 'APR 16 2025' directly beneath it. The lighting in the image is soft and natural, with faint side lighting perfectly accentuating the microscopic texture of the paper and the depth of the red ink impression. The overall style is extremely realistic, with clear and authentic color contrast.
prompt_en: A realistic macro close-up photograph of a passport interior page in landscape orientation. The main subject is a passport page exhibiting authentic texture, with clearly visible fine fiber grain and a subtly undulating natural paper surface. The paper background is printed with intricate security anti-counterfeiting patterns composed of interwoven fine wavy lines in light blue, pale green, and light pink, along with subtle geometric underprints. The visual center of the frame is a prominent circular entry stamp, pressed onto the passport page in slightly smudged dark red ink. The stamp is tilted slightly to the right by approximately 15 degrees, presenting the realistic effect of being manually pressed with force; some of the ink, having seeped into the paper fibers, exhibits slightly irregular edges and broken points in texture. The outermost ring of the stamp is a decorative circular border composed of fine lines. On the upper inner half of the stamp, the words 'WELCOME TO BEIJING' are arranged in bold English along the arc; on the lower inner half, 'BEIJING, CHINA' is arranged along the arc. In the central background of the stamp, the subtle silhouette outline of the Forbidden City's iconic classical architecture is artfully incorporated as a background detail. Directly in front of the Forbidden City silhouette, the bold English letters 'ARRIVAL' are arranged horizontally in a prominent manner, with the clearly printed date 'APR 16 2025' directly beneath it. The lighting in the image is soft and natural, with faint side lighting perfectly accentuating the microscopic texture of the paper and the depth of the red ink impression. The overall style is extremely realistic, with clear and authentic color contrast.

title: 名画人物穿搭展示
prompt_cn:
A Q-version (chibi) 3D-style fashion outfit showcase poster with an exquisite and refined C4D rendering quality. The composition is in a 9:16 vertical format, with a pure, low-saturation café-au-lait (beige-toned) background that maintains a consistent premium color palette. The lighting is soft and even, featuring typical 3D-rendered volumetric light and delicate shadows.

At the top center of the image are prominent 3D bold uppercase English letters 'OOTD,' with a line of smaller sans-serif lowercase English text 'fashion designer' directly beneath.

The image is primarily divided into left and right sections:
On the left stands a Q-version 3D female character, designed as a fashion designer. She has an exquisite and cute face with large eyes and neat chestnut-brown slightly wavy short hair. Although rendered in a Q-version style, her body proportions feature noticeably elongated legs. She strikes a confident pose with her left hand on her hip and her right hand hanging naturally, holding a clipboard with design sketches. Her outfit is highly fashionable: she wears a black deconstructionist asymmetric blazer over a minimalist white silk camisole; on the lower half, she wears a pair of beautifully draped black high-waisted wide-leg trousers and silver pointed-toe stiletto heels. To highlight her professional identity, a bright yellow tailor's soft tape measure hangs around her neck, and a pair of black cat-eye sunglasses rests atop her head.

On the right side of the image, the outfit items worn by the character on the left are deconstructed and displayed in a vertically floating arrangement. Each item is presented as an exquisite standalone 3D model, accompanied by a clear small-text label on the right:
At the top is a pair of black cat-eye sunglasses, labeled 'Cat-eye Sunglasses.'
Below that is a flat-laid black asymmetric blazer, labeled 'Deconstructed Blazer.'
Next is a bright yellow soft tape measure coiled into a circle, labeled 'Tape Measure.'
Further down is a neatly folded pair of black high-waisted wide-leg trousers, labeled 'Wide-leg Trousers.'
At the bottom is a pair of silver pointed-toe high heels, labeled 'Silver Stilettos.'

title: 字母与词义融合创意字体
prompt_cn: A creative typography design poster. The background is a soft gradient from clean off-white to light pink, with a delicate shimmer texture. Horizontally centered in the middle of the image is the large English word 'beautify', rendered primarily in rose gold, lavender, and emerald green tones, with the letters ingeniously merged with graphics symbolizing the meaning of "beautification and beauty." Specific details are as follows: the right arc of the letter 'b' cleverly transforms into a semi-transparent gradient butterfly wing in mid-spread; the inner curl of the letter 'e' evolves into a pink rosebud petal; the left stroke of the letter 'a' is an exquisite rose gold makeup brush; the outline of the letter 'u' resembles an elegant vintage perfume bottle; the crossbar of the letter 't' is a slender, gracefully extending emerald green willow leaf, while the vertical bar is a delicate vine; the dot above the letter 'i' is replaced by a brilliantly sparkling golden four-pointed starburst; the top of the letter 'f' resembles a paintbrush dipped in iridescent colors, trailing a gorgeous ribbon downward; the tail of the letter 'y' extends elegantly downward, transforming into a vine entwined with tiny flowers. The overall letterforms are fluid and ornate, with a slight 3D dimensional effect, metallic sheen, and the soft texture of florals. Centered directly below the word, two lines of brief explanation are typeset in an elegant, concise dark gray sans-serif font: the first line reads '[ v. ] to make someone or something beautiful or more attractive.', and the second line reads '美化；使变得美丽'. Light casts softly from the upper left corner, leaving faint shadows beneath the letters and text. The composition is open and airy, with ample breathing space on both sides, presenting a sophisticated, aesthetically refined modern design style.

The overall letterforms are fluid and ornate, with a slight 3D dimensional effect, metallic sheen, and the soft texture of florals. title: 玩具箱里的国家微缩模型
prompt_cn: In a hyper-realistic vertically formatted top-down photography shot, two real human hands reach in from the left and right sides, prying open and flipping outward the flaps of a beige corrugated cardboard box. Along the top of the opened flap interior, large, brightly colored raised plastic letters are arranged, clearly spelling out 'ITALY', each letter in a different color: 'I' in bright red, 'T' in bright blue, 'A' in bright yellow, 'L' in vivid green, and 'Y' in bright orange. Inside the box sits an extraordinarily detailed Italy-themed miniature landscape 3D-printed three-dimensional model. The landscape includes iconic architectural landmarks such as a realistic miniature Colosseum, a leaning Tower of Pisa, Venice canals with azure water and tiny black gondolas, as well as rolling green Tuscan hills, clusters of red-roofed white-walled houses, and tiny evergreen trees. Across the miniature terrain of streets, bridges, and piazzas, a multitude of extremely tiny yet varied human figure models are densely populated. The entire miniature world is brimming with vivid, geographically authentic details; all elements feature a comfortable, toy-like tactile quality with matte surface finishes and clearly visible parallel layer lines characteristic of 3D printing. The lighting is warm and cinematic, with soft top-side illumination lighting the model and casting distinct shadows into the recesses of terrain, buildings, and the inner walls of the cardboard box, perfectly accentuating the matte material texture and three-dimensionality of the model. The rough beige cardboard contrasts with the colorfully rich miniature world within, creating an immersive and realistic experience as if the viewer is personally opening a magical miniature country.

Inside the box sits an extraordinarily detailed Italy-themed miniature landscape 3D-printed three-dimensional model. The landscape includes iconic architectural landmarks such as a realistic miniature Colosseum, a leaning Tower of Pisa, Venice canals with azure water and tiny black gondolas, as well as rolling green Tuscan hills, clusters of red-roofed white-walled houses, and tiny evergreen trees. Across the miniature terrain of streets, bridges, and piazzas, a multitude of extremely tiny yet varied human figure models are densely populated. The entire miniature world is brimming with vivid, geographically authentic details; all elements feature a comfortable, toy-like tactile quality with matte surface finishes and clearly visible parallel layer lines characteristic of 3D printing. The lighting is warm and cinematic, with soft top-side illumination lighting the model and casting distinct shadows into the recesses of terrain, buildings, and the inner walls of the cardboard box, perfectly accentuating the matte material texture and three-dimensionality of the model. The rough beige cardboard contrasts with the colorfully rich miniature world within, creating an immersive and realistic experience as if the viewer is personally opening a magical miniature country.

title: 实物+涂鸦创意广告
prompt_cn: A minimalist and creative horizontal banner ad. The image uses an extremely pure white background. At the visual center is a real object: a vibrantly colored bright yellow fruit with realistic photographic lighting and shadow textures. This yellow fruit is ingeniously combined with hand-drawn black ink doodles, featuring loose, playful lines with a casual sketch feel. The doodle cleverly transforms the curved silhouette of the yellow fruit into the body of a dachshund, specifically depicted as follows: on the left tip of the yellow fruit, a dachshund's head is drawn, complete with droopy black long ears, round eyes, and a perky nose; beneath the yellow fruit, four short black dog legs are drawn, displaying a lively walking motion; at the right end of the yellow fruit, a short tail wagging happily is drawn. The real, highly saturated fruit and the two-dimensional black-and-white line drawing interact seamlessly in an imaginative way. At the top center of the image, bold black sans-serif type prominently displays the ad copy: 'Unleash Your Energy'. Directly below it is a smaller black subtitle: 'Real fruit, crazy fun.' At the bottom center of the image, the brand logo is clearly placed, consisting of a black minimalist animal paw print icon alongside the uppercase English letters 'MONKEY PET'. The overall visual effect is clean, crisp, humorous, and fun, with the black-white-yellow tricolor creating strong visual contrast, showcasing a cleverly conceived modern advertising design style.

The doodle depicts a vintage bicycle and a stick-figure rider, with the real lemon slice perfectly placed to serve as the front wheel of the bicycle. Black lines outline the bicycle's handlebars, frame, rear wheel, as well as a rider leaning forward with a scarf fluttering behind, pedaling vigorously — creating a wonderful dimension-breaking trompe-l'œil interaction. At the very bottom center of the image, the brand logo is clearly placed, consisting of a minimalist black single-line water drop icon alongside bold black English letters 'LemonDrop'. The entire poster has a clear typographic structure, and the contrast between real imagery and two-dimensional doodles delivers a strong visual impact.

title: 青瓷制作工艺信息图
prompt_cn:
A vertical-format infographic poster detailing the production process of traditional celadon. The poster background features an antique cream-colored parchment texture, with faint brown vignette effects around the edges, presenting an overall understated Chinese-style watercolor illustration aesthetic. At the top center, a large black title reads '青瓷制作技艺' (Celadon Craftsmanship), with a smaller dark gray English subtitle beneath it: 'HOW IT IS MADE: TRADITIONAL CELADON'. The main body of the poster is divided from top to bottom into four illustrated sections, each with a watercolor illustration on the left and text descriptions on the right.

The first section shows on the left a pair of mud-covered hands vigorously kneading a lump of gray clay on a rough wooden table. On the right, the heading in bold reads '第一步：揉泥' (Step One: Kneading the Clay), with an explanatory paragraph below: 'Mix kaolin clay with water, knead repeatedly to expel air from the clay mass, making the material dense and uniform to prevent cracking during firing.'

The second section shows on the left a spinning potter's wheel, with a pair of dexterous hands pulling the clay upward, shaping the nascent form of a slender-necked vase, with dynamic motion lines around the vase suggesting rotation. On the right, it reads '第二步：拉坯' (Step Two: Throwing on the Wheel), with the description: 'Place the kneaded clay on the potter's wheel (lulu); as the turntable spins rapidly, the craftsman uses the smoothness and strength of both hands to stretch and shape the clay into the desired vessel form.'

The third section shows on the left a hand gripping the base of a dried vase, tilting it halfway into a large wooden barrel filled with pale celadon-colored glaze slurry, with a few drops of glaze dripping down the body and tiny splashes at the barrel's edge. The text on the right reads '第三步：施釉' (Step Three: Glazing), with the description: 'After the bisque body has naturally air-dried, evenly coat or dip it into specially formulated celadon glaze slurry. The thickness and formula of the glaze determine the warm luster of the final product.'

The fourth section shows on the left a traditional brick-built wood-fired kiln, with a semicircular kiln door open, revealing bright orange-red flames inside; the firelight illuminates the surrounding red bricks, and saggars (firing containers) are faintly visible inside the kiln. The text on the right reads '第四步：烧窑' (Step Four: Kiln Firing), with the description: 'Load the glazed bisque bodies into saggars and place them into the kiln. Under reduction firing at temperatures reaching 1300 degrees Celsius, the clay and glaze undergo chemical reactions, ultimately reborn through fire.'

At the very bottom center of the image, a line of small text reads '传承千年匠心，感受泥土与火焰的艺术' (Inheriting a millennium of craftsmanship, experiencing the art of earth and fire), with a small square red seal stamp to the right of the text, inside which is written in traditional...

The main body of the poster is divided from top to bottom into four illustrated sections, each with a watercolor illustration on the left and text descriptions on the right.

The first section shows on the left a pair of mud-covered hands vigorously kneading a lump of gray clay on a rough wooden table. On the right, the heading in bold reads '第一步：揉泥' (Step One: Kneading the Clay), with an explanatory paragraph below: 'Mix kaolin clay with water, knead repeatedly to expel air from the clay mass, making the material dense and uniform to prevent cracking during firing.'

The second section shows on the left a spinning potter's wheel, with a pair of dexterous hands pulling the clay upward, shaping the nascent form of a slender-necked vase, with dynamic motion lines around the vase suggesting rotation. On the right, it reads '第二步：拉坯' (Step Two: Throwing on the Wheel), with the description: 'Place the kneaded clay on the potter's wheel (lulu); as the turntable spins rapidly, the craftsman uses the smoothness and strength of both hands to stretch and shape the clay into the desired vessel form.'

The third section shows on the left a hand gripping the base of a dried vase, tilting it halfway into a large wooden barrel filled with pale celadon-colored glaze slurry, with a few drops of glaze dripping down the body and tiny splashes at the barrel's edge. The thickness and formula of the glaze determine the warm luster of the final product.'

The fourth section shows on the left a traditional brick-built wood-fired kiln, with a semicircular kiln door open, revealing bright orange-red flames inside; the firelight illuminates the surrounding red bricks, and saggars (firing containers) are faintly visible inside the kiln. title: 草莓慕斯蛋糕教程
prompt_cn:
A vertical screenshot of an image-and-text tutorial from a mobile social app, laid out in a top-to-bottom waterfall flow. The overall background is a warm, light beige, presenting a Japanese-style fresh food layout aesthetic. At the very top of the screen is the phone's system status bar, clearly displaying the time '14:30', a 5G signal icon, a Wi-Fi icon, and a full battery icon.

Below the status bar is a center-aligned, large-font main title in dark brown bold text: '法式草莓慕斯蛋糕 零失败教程' (French Strawberry Mousse Cake – Foolproof Tutorial). Beneath the title is a line of smaller, light pink English subtitle text: 'Strawberry Mousse Cake Recipe'.

Below the title, occupying roughly one-third of the frame, is a high-definition hero image of the finished product: a 6-inch pink mousse cake placed on a white marble round plate. The cake surface exhibits a smooth mirror glaze finish, with the top garnished by several halved bright red strawberries and scattered highlights of gold leaf. The background features a shallow depth-of-field blurred light-colored natural wood tabletop and a small sprig of eucalyptus. The lighting is soft, bright side natural light, accentuating the cake's dense, velvety texture and appealing color.

Below the hero image are four vertically arranged step-by-step sections. Each step section has a rounded-corner square process photo on the left and aligned black instructional text on the right.

Step one: the left thumbnail shows a pair of hands pressing dark brown cookie crumbs firmly into a round push-bottom cake mold using the back of a metal spoon. The neatly typeset text on the right reads: '1. Cookie Base: Crush 80g digestive biscuits, mix with 40g melted unsalted butter, spread into the bottom of a 6-inch mold and press firmly, then refrigerate until needed.'

Step two: the left thumbnail shows a small silver saucepan on a heat-conducting plate, with dark red strawberry pulp simmering and bubbling inside, faint white steam rising above. The text on the right reads: '2. Strawberry Filling: Dice 200g fresh strawberries, cook with 30g white granulated sugar and a small amount of lemon juice until thickened, add softened gelatin sheets (5g), pour into a small mold and freeze until set.'

Step three: the left thumbnail shows a large transparent glass bowl containing a liquid with a soft, light pink hue being folded from bottom to top with a white silicone spatula. The text on the right reads: '3. Mousse Mixture: Blend 250g strawberries into a purée, gently heat to dissolve 10g gelatin sheets. After cooling to room temperature, gently fold together with 200g whipped cream (whipped to soft peaks / 60% whipped).'

Step four: the left thumbnail shows the pink mousse mixture being poured from the rim of a bowl into the mold, with a faintly visible dark [layer in the center of the mold].

The overall background is a warm, light beige, presenting a Japanese-style fresh food layout aesthetic. At the very top of the screen is the phone's system status bar, clearly displaying the time '14:30', a 5G signal icon, a Wi-Fi icon, and a full battery icon.

Below the title, occupying roughly one-third of the frame, is a high-definition hero image of the finished product: a 6-inch pink mousse cake placed on a white marble round plate. The cake surface exhibits a smooth mirror glaze finish, with the top garnished by several halved bright red strawberries and scattered highlights of gold leaf. The background features a shallow depth-of-field blurred light-colored natural wood tabletop and a small sprig of eucalyptus. The lighting is soft, bright side natural light, accentuating the cake's dense, velvety texture and appealing color.

Below the hero image are four vertically arranged step-by-step sections. Each step section has a rounded-corner square process photo on the left and aligned black instructional text on the right.

Step one: the left thumbnail shows a pair of hands pressing dark brown cookie crumbs firmly into a round push-bottom cake mold using the back of a metal spoon. The neatly typeset text on the right reads: '1. Cookie Base: Crush 80g digestive biscuits, mix with 40g melted unsalted butter, spread into the bottom of a 6-inch mold and press firmly, then refrigerate until needed.'

Step two: the left thumbnail shows a small silver saucepan on a heat-conducting plate, with dark red strawberry pulp simmering and bubbling inside, faint white steam rising above. The text on the right reads: '2. Strawberry Filling: Dice 200g fresh strawberries, cook with 30g white granulated sugar and a small amount of lemon juice until thickened, add softened gelatin sheets (5g), pour into a small mold and freeze until set.'

Step three: the left thumbnail shows a large transparent glass bowl containing a liquid with a soft, light pink hue being folded from bottom to top with a white silicone spatula. The text on the right reads: '3. Mousse Mixture: Blend 250g strawberries into a purée, gently heat to dissolve 10g gelatin sheets. After cooling to room temperature, gently fold together with 200g whipped cream (whipped to soft peaks / 60% whipped).'

Step four: the left thumbnail shows the pink mousse mixture being poured from the rim of a bowl into the mold, with a faintly visible dark [layer in the center of the mold].

title: 吹玻璃工艺纪录片截图
prompt_cn: A high-definition screenshot of a documentary video playback interface, showcasing the process of traditional glassblowing craftsmanship. The main scene is set inside a dimly lit, grainy traditional glass workshop. Slightly left of center, a male craftsman wearing a dark gray coarse-cloth long-sleeve shirt layered with a distressed, thick brown leather apron is seated beside a wooden workbench with worn edges. The craftsman wears black protective goggles, has a stubbly face, and beads of sweat induced by intense heat cover his forehead and cheeks. His face and upper body are illuminated by the high-temperature glass in front of him, casting a strong warm orange glow. He grips tightly with both hands a black metal blowpipe approximately one meter long, cheeks puffed out as he blows forcefully into the mouthpiece. The other end of the blowpipe, positioned slightly right of center, is attached to a volleyball-sized glob of molten glass in a fluid state, radiating a dazzlingly bright orange-yellow luminescence. Deep in the background stands a massive furnace constructed from refractory bricks, its mouth wide open, with roaring red-yellow flames burning inside, illuminating various long-handled metal tongs and shaping tools hanging on the background wall. Faintly visible in the air are floating tiny dust particles and sparks generated by the extreme heat. In the upper right corner of the frame, a semi-transparent white channel watermark text reads 'CRAFT MASTERS'. Along the bottom edge of the frame are video player UI elements: at the very bottom is a red playback progress bar spanning the full width; above the left end of the progress bar, the current playback time and total duration are displayed in white as '12:34 / 45:00'; above the right end, white icons are arranged in sequence—a pause icon, a volume speaker icon, a gear settings icon, a high-definition quality label '4K', and a rectangular fullscreen icon. Above the progress bar, centered at the bottom of the frame, two lines of clear white subtitles with black outlines are displayed; the upper line in Chinese reads: '我们需要在1100度的高温下，迅速将这团熔融的玻璃塑形。', and the lower line in corresponding smaller English text reads: 'We need to shape this blob of molten glass quickly at a high temperature of 1100 degrees.'

The craftsman wears black protective goggles, has a stubbly face, and beads of sweat induced by intense heat cover his forehead and cheeks. His face and upper body are illuminated by the high-temperature glass in front of him, casting a strong warm orange glow. title: 巧克力制作流程图
prompt_cn: A colorful, hand-drawn style informational flowchart poster illustrating the chocolate-making process. The background features a light beige aged paper texture. At the very top of the image, there is a prominent bold brown title reading '巧克力的制作过程' (The Chocolate-Making Process), with a smaller English subtitle 'How Chocolate is Made' beneath it. The main body of the image consists of six step-by-step illustrated blocks connected by brown dashed-line arrows, arranged in two rows (top and bottom) forming a Z-shaped visual guide path. The upper-left corner shows the first step, with an illustration depicting a tree laden with cacao pods, beside which sits a cut-open purplish-red cacao pod revealing beans wrapped in white pulp inside; brown text below reads '第一步：采摘果实' (Step 1: Harvesting the Pods). The upper-center shows the second step, illustrating several rectangular wooden crates filled with fermenting cacao beans that have turned a brownish-tan color, with text below reading '第二步：木箱发酵' (Step 2: Wooden Crate Fermentation). The upper-right corner shows the third step, depicting a sun shining down on cacao beans spread out on grass mats for drying, with text below reading '第三步：阳光干燥' (Step 3: Sun Drying). The lower-left corner shows the fourth step, illustrating a vintage metal drum roaster with cacao beans tumbling inside the chamber and white heat-line wisps rising upward, with text below reading '第四步：高温烘焙' (Step 4: High-Temperature Roasting). The lower-center shows the fifth step, depicting a grinding machine with a double-layer stone mill, from whose bottom outlet a thick brown chocolate paste flows out, with text below reading '第五步：研磨成浆' (Step 5: Grinding into Paste). The lower-right corner shows the final step, illustrating a production line where chocolate paste is being poured into grid-pattern square molds, with a chocolate bar that has been half-unwrapped from its silver foil placed beside the molds, and text below reading '第六步：调温成型' (Step 6: Tempering and Molding). Scattered across the four corners of the image are decorative hand-drawn green cacao leaves and a few individual brown cacao beans. The overall color palette is dominated by warm brownish-tan, cream, dark red, and dark green tones, with delicate line work and a clear, well-organized layout.

title: 古典建筑装饰纹理图集
prompt_cn: A vintage-style classical architectural decorative texture collection plate, in portrait orientation, with a background presenting an aged, yellowed parchment texture. Centered at the very top of the image is an elegant vintage serif uppercase English title: 'ARCHITECTURAL ORNAMENTS'. The entire plate is divided into multiple sections, showcasing highly three-dimensional and high-precision architectural materials and decorative elements. Dominating the center of the image is a front-view texture of a Corinthian capital, displaying intricate Acanthus leaves carving details with deep sketch-like shading and realistic stone weathering texture; beneath it is a small-print label: 'FIG. 1: CORINTHIAN CAPITAL'. The upper left corner presents a square slice of Baroque-style relief texture, featuring graceful curves and fan-shaped shell motifs, labeled below: 'FIG. 2: BAROQUE RELIEF'. The upper right corner shows a rectangular seamless wall texture, depicting rough granite masonry in an interlocking bond pattern bearing traces of age, with clearly visible mortar joints and stone pores, labeled below: 'FIG. 3: SEAMLESS STONE TEXTURE'. Along the bottom of the image, two sets of seamless decorative border textures are arranged horizontally: the upper one is a continuous stone-carved border of intertwining vines and flowers; the lower one is a classic Greek key geometric ornamental line; centered beneath the borders is the label: 'FIG. 4: FLORAL BORDER'. Scattered throughout the plate are subtle brown ink splatter marks and paper crease traces. All architectural textures exhibit extremely high clarity, realistic light-and-shadow dimensionality, and normal-map-like depth detail. The overall color palette is dominated by warm browns, limestone grays, and vintage golden-browns, presenting a classical, rigorous, and information-rich material showcase style.

title: 睡眠报告海报
prompt_cn:
A vertical poster with data visualization and 3D rendering art style. The background is a deep, sophisticated midnight blue solid color with a soft center spotlight effect. Centered in the image is a three-dimensional, vertical rectangular transparent glass container, resembling an exquisite geological core sample tube. The glass material features an extremely high refractive index and crisp specular highlights. The interior of the container is composed of four differently colored miniature landscape layers stacked upon one another, reflecting the proportions of different sleep stages.

Layer details from top to bottom are as follows: The top layer (Awake layer) is very thin, accounting for approximately 3% of the total volume, presenting as an orange dry desert surface with fine noise-grain sand texture. The second layer (REM layer) accounts for approximately 20%, consisting of a light blue dreamlike sky layer with translucent and lightweight material, featuring floating white miniature clouds, transparent bubbles, and a few surreal small stars inside. The third layer (Core Sleep layer) is the thickest, accounting for approximately 57% of the total volume, rendered in deep blue, densely packed with countless smooth and soft miniature ocean balls and layered down-feather material, with a warm subsurface scattering quality. The bottom layer (Deep Sleep layer) accounts for approximately 20%, rendered in violet, constructed from hard, heavy crystal formations and glowing energy blocks stacked together, emanating a mysterious yet warm purple glow from the base.

At the very top edge of the glass container, a chibi-style 3D figurine sits leisurely. The figurine wears loose pale yellow pajamas, with legs naturally dangling over the edge, smiling with eyes closed in a contented expression. On the figurine's wrist is a tiny black miniature smartwatch. Floating above the figurine's head is a fully charged battery icon with a bright green glowing effect.

The bottom area of the poster features neatly arranged, clearly legible white text typography and a legend. At the top is the larger main title text: '昨晚的睡眠地质层' (Last Night's Sleep Geological Strata), directly below which is a slightly smaller English title: 'My Sleep Strata'. Below the titles is a line of core data display: '总睡眠时长：7小时30分 | 睡��评分：85' (Total Sleep Duration: 7h 30min | Sleep Score: 85). At the very bottom are four side-by-side legend entries, each consisting of a small colored dot with corresponding text, arranged from left to right as follows: an orange dot followed by '清醒：15分' (Awake: 15min); a light blue dot followed by 'REM：1小时30分' (REM: 1h 30min); a deep blue dot followed by '核心睡眠：4小时15分' (Core Sleep: 4h 15min); a violet dot followed by '深度睡眠：1小时30分' (Deep Sleep: 1h 30min). The overall image presents a C4D/Blen

title: 角色设计生成
prompt_cn:
A vertical-format anime-style character design sheet (Character Design Sheet) with a parchment-textured background featuring a light gray grid. The content is arranged from top to bottom in a compact yet clearly structured layout. The character is a steampunk-style fantasy female mage with long silver hair (braided into a loose side fishtail braid) and emerald green eyes.

At the very top of the image is a bold black main title 'CHARACTER DESIGN: ELARA', with a subtitle below reading 'CLASS: ARCANE MECHANIC'.

Part One (Top Area): Three-view orthographic and proportion reference. On the left side is a vertical ruler scale with evenly spaced horizontal guide lines, annotated with 'HEIGHT: 165CM' and '7 HEADS TALL'. In the center of the area is the character's front-facing standing full-body view, with the left side view on the left and the back view on the right. Below the three drawings are the respective labels 'FRONT', 'SIDE', and 'BACK'.

Part Two (Upper-Middle Area): Costume and equipment detail showcase. Three enlarged detail callouts of the character's equipment are presented: brass goggles worn on top of the head, accompanied by the text annotation 'BRASS GOGGLES'; a dark brown leather satchel at the waist alongside a glowing blue magic crystal, annotated 'LEATHER SATCHEL' and 'MAGIC CRYSTAL'; and tall lace-up leather boots with gear decorations, annotated 'GEARED LEATHER BOOTS'.

Part Three (Lower-Middle Area): Expression sheet. Five head close-ups of the character are arranged horizontally, displaying different facial expressions from left to right: calm (annotated 'NEUTRAL', expressionless gaze directed forward), hearty laughter (annotated 'JOY', eyes slightly closed, teeth showing), anger (annotated 'ANGER', brows tightly furrowed, teeth clenched), sorrowful tears (annotated 'SORROW', eyes brimming with tears, corners of the mouth turned down), and surprise (annotated 'SHOCK', eyes wide open, mouth slightly agape).

Part Four (Bottom Area): Action poses. Three dynamic full-body poses from different angles are displayed. On the left is a spellcasting action, with the character holding a metal staff topped with a glowing blue crystal, cape and garment hems billowing backward, annotated below as 'CASTING

title: 健康生活五步骤信息图
prompt_cn:
A cartoon-style horizontal infographic illustration. The image uses a widescreen composition, with a background composed of wave-shaped color blocks in bright macaron tones (soft pink, mint green, light blue, and pale yellow) pieced together. White cartoon clouds, yellow four-pointed stars, and pink small hearts are scattered throughout the background space. At the top center of the image is a prominent rounded bold English title '5 STEPS TO A HEALTHY LIFE', with a cartoon sun peeking out from the right side of the title, wearing a small red crown and sporting rosy cheeks and a radiant smile.
Below the title, five information sections are arranged horizontally side by side, with highly concise content consisting only of English titles in uppercase and corresponding richly adorable cartoon elements.
The first section on the far left: the uppercase English title 'EAT WELL' is displayed above, with an anthropomorphized orange carrot and a red apple drawn below, both featuring big dewy eyes and smiling faces, with matchstick-like little arms reaching out to hold hands.
The second section from the left: the English title is 'DRINK WATER', accompanied by a blue cartoon water droplet sprite wearing yellow diving goggles, pursing its lips and blowing out several transparent blue bubbles.
The third section in the middle: the English title is 'SLEEP TIGHT', with a small brown bear below wearing a blue star-patterned nightgown and a long nightcap, serenely lying on a large yellow crescent moon sleeping, with snoring bubbles rising from the tip of its nose.
The fourth section from the right: the English title is 'EXERCISE', showing a white bunny wearing a red sports headband, ears standing upright, both hands strenuously lifting two black lightweight small dumbbells, with several blue sweat drops splashing around it.
The fifth section on the far right: the English title is 'BE HAPPY', with an illustration of a small yellow dog standing on both feet, cheering joyfully with its tongue sticking out, surrounded by colorful small flowers and black musical notes.
The overall image has high but soft color saturation, bright lighting, no extraneous paragraph text, and conveys key information entirely through titles and intuitive, adorable cartoon characters, in a style brimming with childlike fun and vitality.

title: 动漫女孩角色设定图
prompt_cn: A vertical-format anime-style character design illustration with a pure light gray background. Standing at the center of the frame is a full-body anime girl, rendered in a detailed cel-shading (Cell Shading) flat-color style with clean and crisp linework. The girl has silver-white twin-tail long hair and bright cyan eyes, with a playful expression and one hand on her hip. She wears a loose mint-green hooded jacket over a warm beige turtleneck sweater, a dark navy-blue pleated skirt on the lower half, black over-the-knee socks, and pink-and-white chunky sneakers. Her hair clips and jacket zipper are accented with bright metallic gold. In the upper-right corner of the image, there is a vertically arranged "color palette" area composed of five square color swatches, directly corresponding to and displaying the standard colors used for coloring this character. The swatches from top to bottom are: mint green, beige, dark navy blue, soft pink, and bright gold. Directly above the entire color palette list, there is a black uppercase English title reading 'COLOR PALETTE'. The overall lighting is bright and even, with accurate color reproduction and harmonious color coordination, perfectly presenting the final visual effect of precise coloring for a character design sheet strictly according to the specified color palette.

title: 动漫角色上色与配色方案
prompt_cn:
A 2D anime-style character design and coloring presentation sheet in a horizontal widescreen composition. The image is divided into two sections: the left-center portion occupies the majority of the space, showcasing a finely colored upper-body portrait of an anime girl; the right edge features a neatly arranged vertical color swatch palette displaying the exact colors used in the character's coloring.

The girl on the left has shoulder-length maple-red short hair with delicate highlights in the strands, bright amber-colored irises, and is smiling while gazing forward. She wears a soft-textured off-white loose knit cardigan over a dark brown long-sleeved shirt, with a golden bow tie neatly fastened at the collar. Her complexion is fair, with a faint rosy blush on her cheeks. The coloring style of the character is high-quality cel-shading flat coloring, with clean and smooth outlines, crisp shadow boundaries, saturated colors, and a strong sense of three-dimensional light and shadow.

On the right side of the image is a column of five square color swatches forming a palette, corresponding from top to bottom to the main color tones on the character: maple red (hair), off-white (cardigan), dark brown (shirt), golden yellow (bow tie), and flesh pink (skin tone). Directly below each color swatch is clear black sans-serif text indicating the hexadecimal color code, in order: '#C84B31', '#F6E6CB', '#3D2C23', '#F6C90E', '#FFDDCB'. At the very top of the color palette, there is a line of clear black bold English title text reading 'COLOR PALETTE'.

The background is a pure light grayish-white (close to pure white), with no extraneous scene elements or gradients, to maximally highlight the character herself and the accuracy and correspondence of the color scheme. The overall image presents the style of a professional concept art character design sheet, with a clean layout and warm, unified tones that are highly visually comfortable.
prompt_en:
A 2D anime-style character design and coloring presentation sheet in a horizontal widescreen composition. The image is divided into two sections: the left-center portion occupies the majority of the space, showcasing a finely colored upper-body portrait of an anime girl; the right edge features a neatly arranged vertical color swatch palette displaying the exact colors used in the character's coloring.

The girl on the left has shoulder-length maple-red short hair with delicate highlights in the strands, bright amber-colored irises, and is smiling while gazing forward. She wears a soft-textured off-white loose knit cardigan over a dark brown long-sleeved shirt, with a golden bow tie neatly fastened at the collar. Her complexion is fair, with a faint rosy blush on her cheeks. The coloring style of the character is high-quality cel-shading flat coloring, with clean and smooth outlines, crisp shadow boundaries, saturated colors, and a strong sense of three-dimensional light and shadow.

On the right side of the image is a column of five square color swatches forming a palette, corresponding from top to bottom to the main color tones on the character: maple red (hair), off-white (cardigan), dark brown (shirt), golden yellow (bow tie), and flesh pink (skin tone). Directly below each color swatch is clear black sans-serif text indicating the hexadecimal color code, in order: '#C84B31', '#F6E6CB', '#3D2C23', '#F6C90E', '#FFDDCB'. At the very top of the color palette, there is a line of clear black bold English title text reading 'COLOR PALETTE'.

The background is a pure light grayish-white (close to pure white), with no extraneous scene elements or gradients, to maximally highlight the character herself and the accuracy and correspondence of the color scheme. The overall image presents the style of a professional concept art character design sheet, with a clean layout and warm, unified tones that are highly visually comfortable.

title: Light & Shadow Control
prompt_cn: A cinematic art photography image with a strong chiaroscuro effect. The composition is in a horizontal wide-format layout, where deep pure black constitutes a large area of the background and the dark portions of the figure, perfectly embodying the "dark-as-shadow" tonal foundation. Positioned slightly off-center to the right of the frame is a half-body close-up of a young woman. She is turned half sideways to the left, her face slightly upturned, her deep gaze directed toward the light source. She has slightly wavy, dark, shoulder-length hair and wears a finely textured dark coat, with most of her body contour submerged in deep shadow. A bright, sharp beam of hard light projects diagonally downward from the upper left of the frame, passing through a physical obstruction resembling venetian blinds, carving out crisp, parallel diagonal geometric striped light patterns across the subject's side profile, neck, and the expansive dark background to the left. The lit surfaces exhibit a warm amber tone with a cinematic quality, with highlights precisely delineating her straight nose bridge, clear eyes, and the soft edge of her jawline; areas untouched by the light transition instantly and merge into the extreme pure-black shadows, creating a visually striking light-and-shadow cutting effect. In the dark space on the left side of the frame, the striped light patterns gradually weaken and dissipate, creating a sense of deep spatial extension. The overall image quality is sharp and crisp, the light-to-shadow transitions are clean-cut, and the atmosphere is filled with mystery and dramatic artistry.

title: Coffee Cup Typography Illustration
prompt_cn: A vector-style typographic illustration poster. At the center of the image is a representational shape of a coffee cup (complete with a saucer and rising steam above) ingeniously formed by the arrangement and combination of various English letters and words. These words constitute all the contours and volume of the coffee cup. The three wavy lines of text forming the rising steam above are: the curved and warped 'AROMA' on the left, the vertically elongated 'HOT' in the middle, and the meandering 'MORNING' on the right. The upper half of the cup body is formed by the massive bold word 'COFFEE', with the top edges of the letters smoothly conforming to the horizontal elliptical curvature of the cup rim. The middle section of the cup body is composed of tightly interlocking words in varying font sizes: 'ESPRESSO', 'LATTE', 'CAPPUCCINO', 'MOCHA'. The lower half of the cup body features words that narrow downward and compress along the curvature of the cup walls: 'AMERICANO', 'MACCHIATO', 'BREW', and 'BEANS'. The semicircular handle on the right side is formed by the word 'ENERGY' typeset along a curved arc, with its beginning and end seamlessly connecting to the cup wall. The elliptical saucer below is composed of the horizontally stretched and flattened words 'TASTY' and 'CAFE' stacked vertically. All text uses an extremely bold and lively sans-serif typeface, with virtually no spacing between letters; the characters are squeezed, stretched, and arranged naturally and fluidly along the inherent curves and contours of the coffee cup, completely filling the entire interior area of the object, forming solid and full visual masses. In terms of color, the text alternates between deep coffee brown, caramel, and a vibrant warm orange, a striking color combination that perfectly complements the coffee theme. The background is a clean, neat solid cream/beige color with no extraneous decoration, gradients, or shadows, maximally highlighting the central coffee cup form constructed from text. The overall style is a crisp, smooth vector illustration with sharp edges and a high-resolution quality, in landscape orientation, with the coffee cup centrally placed in the middle of the image, surrounded by ample solid-color space, presenting a strong poster design aesthetic.

title: Pour-Over Coffee Guide Pictogram Poster
prompt_cn: A vertically formatted minimalist pictogram poster themed as a pour-over coffee guide. The background is a uniform clean off-white. The design employs a flat vector style, composed of highly simplified pictographic icons rendered in dark brown thick outlines with warm orange accent color blocks, free of gradients or 3D shadow effects, with a visual language as intuitive and legible as public signage. Centered at the top of the image is a line of dark brown bold sans-serif large title text: 'POUR-OVER COFFEE GUIDE'. Below the title, four step blocks are evenly distributed along the vertical central axis, each block containing a large symbolic icon and accompanying text. The first block: on the left is a minimalist hand-crank coffee grinder graphic; on the right are two lines of text—the first line in bold orange reading 'STEP 1', the second in dark brown reading 'GRIND 20G COFFEE BEANS'. The second block: on the left is a slender-necked pour-over kettle graphic with a circular thermometer dial; the right-side text reads orange 'STEP 2' and dark brown 'BOIL WATER TO 92°C'. The third block: on the left is a dynamic graphic depicting the kettle spout pouring water into a V-shaped filter dripper, with three wavy lines representing steam above the dripper; the right-side text reads orange 'STEP 3' and dark brown 'POUR 40G WATER, WAIT 30S'. The fourth block: on the left is a rounded coffee mug graphic with steam lines rising from the rim; the right-side text reads orange 'STEP 4' and dark brown 'POUR REMAINING WATER & ENJOY'. At the very bottom of the image is a horizontal dark brown thin dashed line serving as a visual closure, with a smaller line of decorative text centered beneath it reading: 'ENJOY YOUR DAILY COFFEE'. The overall composition is rigorously aligned with clear information hierarchy, perfectly suited to a vertical aspect ratio.

title: Security Check Pictogram Guide
prompt_cn:
A flat, minimalist-style pictogram instructional diagram. The layout is horizontal with a pure white background, devoid of any extraneous background decoration. The overall design is highly symbolic, using dark gray as the primary graphic color with bright yellow as an accent and emphasis color. The image has absolutely no perspective effect; all figures and objects are composed of pure geometric shapes (such as perfectly circular heads and equal-width thick lines forming limbs and torsos), and the figures have no facial expression features whatsoever.

At the top center of the image are two lines of clear, bold black text: the upper line reads in Chinese '安检流程,' and the lower line reads in slightly smaller English 'Security Check.' Below the text, four pictographic icons are arranged horizontally from left to right to form a complete set of operational step instructions. Each step is connected by a solid yellow rightward-pointing arrow, guiding the visual sequence.

On the far left is the first step: a dark gray pictographic figure stands upright, extending the right arm to hand a small square booklet bearing an ID document symbol to another pictographic security officer wearing a peaked cap, positioned behind a counter to the left. Beneath this scene are two lines of centered text: '1. 证件核验' and 'ID Check.'

The second step to the right depicts a horizontal conveyor belt and a square X-ray security scanner with yellow scanning lines inside. A pictographic figure is slightly bending forward, placing a rectangular suitcase with a pull handle and rolling wheels onto the conveyor belt with both hands. Below it reads: '2. 行李检查' and 'Baggage X-Ray.'

In the third step, the main elements are an open laptop icon and a cylindrical water bottle icon bearing a liquid droplet symbol. These two items are enclosed within a yellow dashed-line box, beneath which a downward arrow points to a rectangular tray, indicating that the items should be placed into the tray. Below it reads: '3. 取出电子产品及液体' and 'Electronics & Liquids.'

On the far right is the fourth step: a pictographic figure stands in the center of an inverted U-shaped metal detector gate with both arms raised out to the sides of the body. To the right of the detector gate stands a security officer holding a short, baton-shaped handheld scanning wand aimed at the figure. Below it reads: '4. 人身检查' and 'Body Scan.'

The overall page layout is neat and orderly, the icons are visually proportionate and consistent, the information hierarchy is clearly defined, and the design strictly adheres to internationally standardized public information signage conventions.

title: Coffee Machine Step-by-Step Pictogram
prompt_cn: A flat, minimalist-style pictogram infographic with a pure off-white background. The image uses a landscape composition, consisting of a title area at the top and a 2-row by 3-column grid of step illustrations below. All graphics are perspective-free, shading-free, faceless solid two-dimensional vector silhouettes, resembling the style of standard signage found in public spaces. At the top center, large bold text in dark brown reads '如何使用自动咖啡机', immediately followed below by smaller orange uppercase English text 'HOW TO USE THE COFFEE MACHINE'. To the left of the title is a minimalist coffee bean icon composed of two ellipses. Below are six step blocks, each containing a central graphic and bilingual text at the bottom. The first block in the upper left shows a dark brown pictographic half-body human silhouette placing a mug onto a horizontal line, with dark brown text below reading '1. 放置水杯' and orange small text 'PLACE YOUR MUG'. The second block in the upper middle displays two water droplets and two coffee bean symbols, with a green solid circle containing a white checkmark to the right, and text below reading '2. 检查原料' and 'CHECK WATER & BEANS'. The third block in the upper right features a close-up of a dark brown hand silhouette with the index finger pressing a square button that has a coffee cup outline cut out of it, with text below reading '3. 选择饮品' and 'SELECT BEVERAGE'. The fourth block in the lower left shows an inverted trapezoidal coffee machine nozzle silhouette, with orange straight lines below representing liquid flowing into a cup, and a minimalist hourglass icon to the right of the cup, with text below reading '4. 等待片刻' and 'WAIT A MOMENT'. The fifth block in the lower middle presents a cup with three orange wavy steam lines floating above it, and an orange warning equilateral triangle containing an exclamation mark hovering to the right of the cup, with text below reading '5. 小心烫口' and 'CAUTION: HOT'. The sixth block in the lower right shows a pictographic hand silhouette holding a square cloth, wiping several horizontal lines representing a tray grid, with text below reading '6. 保持清洁' and 'KEEP IT CLEAN'. The overall color scheme is dominated by dark brown and off-white, accented with orange as the visual focal color. The layout is neatly aligned, and the information is conveyed clearly and intuitively.

title: Fashion Figure Outfit Structure Breakdown
prompt_cn:
A hand-drawn style 2D illustration presenting a fashion concept breakdown sheet. The composition is in a wide-format layout with a beige parchment-textured background, clean and soft lighting, and a strong design sketch atmosphere.

At the center of the image is a fashionable and confident young woman shown in full-body view. She has slightly wavy long hair and wears a camel-colored matte leather trench coat, layered over a black lace shapewear bodysuit and sheer tulle leggings. Her pose is natural yet dynamic, exuding a subtly sensual quality.

Radiating outward around her are structured elements and bilingual Chinese-English handwritten-style labels:

Upper left is the garment layer breakdown: displaying the lingerie components, with 'Shapewear & Lingerie / 塑身内衣' written alongside, leading to a material annotation 'soft lace / 柔软蕾丝'. The trench coat is labeled 'Trench Coat / 经典风衣' with 'matte leather / 哑光皮革'. The leggings are labeled 'Leggings / 紧身打底裤' with 'tulle material / 薄纱材质'.

Upper right is the expression board: containing four expression headshots, labeled respectively 'Neutral / 平静', 'Shy / 害羞', 'Surprised / 惊讶', and 'Focused / 专注'.

Right middle section features close-up shots: a magnified display of fabric texture labeled 'Fabric Folds / 褶皱纹理', hand poses labeled 'Hand Gesture / 手势', and a partial skin detail labeled 'Skin Texture / 肌理'.

The bottom section shows lifestyle accessories: an open handbag labeled 'Handbag / 手提包' with everyday items scattered around. A lipstick labeled 'Lipstick / 口红' with 'shade #520 / 色号#520', perfume labeled 'Perfume / 香水', a compact labeled 'Compact Powder / 粉饼', hand cream labeled 'Hand Cream / 护手霜', a diary labeled 'Diary / 日记本', and a health supplement bottle labeled 'Supplements / 保健品'.

title: Hand-Drawn Isometric Street Illustration
prompt_cn: A hand-drawn style isometric street illustration in a banner format. The scene is depicted from an oblique overhead isometric perspective with no vanishing points; all buildings and streets are aligned along a standard isometric grid, producing a rigorous three-dimensional effect combined with the warm texture of hand-drawn ink linework. A two-lane street extends diagonally from the lower-left corner toward the upper right. The road surface is light gray, with a yellow center dividing line and clearly drawn white zebra crossings at the intersection. On the left side of the street stand two adjoining three-story vintage commercial buildings. The ground floor of the first building houses a café with warm cream-colored exterior walls; a red-and-white striped awning extends above the door, and the storefront sign clearly reads 'CAFE' with the smaller text 'Fresh Coffee' beneath it. Two sets of outdoor round tables and chairs are placed on the sidewalk in front of the shop. The second and third floors are residential apartments featuring black wrought-iron balcony railings adorned with potted green plants. The adjacent second building has a red brick exterior, with a spacious glass display window on the ground floor and a dark wooden sign reading 'CITY BOOKS.' On the right side of the street are a flower shop and a convenience store. The flower shop has a wooden flower rack erected in front, a sign with green background and white hand-lettered text reading 'BLOOM & GROW,' and the sidewalk outside is filled with various blooming potted flowers. The adjacent convenience store has a more modern façade, with a blue sign bearing white text reading 'DAILY MART.' Several hand-drawn style vehicles are distributed along the street: a bright yellow vintage taxi is about to cross the zebra crossing, and a blue box van is parked in a curbside parking space in front of the bookstore. Both sides of the street are equipped with abundant municipal amenities, including black vintage cast-iron streetlamps, red fire hydrants, dark gray cylindrical trash bins, and lush broadleaf street trees planted at regular intervals in square tree pits. An octagonal red 'STOP' traffic sign stands before the zebra crossing, and a white speed limit sign reading 'SPEED LIMIT 30' hangs on a utility pole on the right-side sidewalk. The scene is dotted with several simply drawn figures: a pedestrian pushing a baby stroller past the flower shop, and a young person riding a bicycle along the right side of the street. The overall illustration is outlined with delicate black pen linework and colored with fresh, bright, low-saturation light watercolor washes. The lighting and shadows are soft, and the composition is full and perfectly suited to the horizontal wide-format aspect ratio.

title: Hand-Drawn Isometric City Street Illustration
prompt_cn:
A hand-drawn style isometric (axonometric) city street schematic. The image adopts a wide aspect ratio extending horizontally, rendered based on a standard 45-degree parallel projection without perspective foreshortening, presenting an architectural sketch-like marker and watercolor hand-drawn texture.

At the center of the image is a two-way asphalt city street extending diagonally. White dashed lines are drawn in the middle of the road, and the intersection features clearly marked white zebra crossings. On the left side of the street stands a three-story red brick mixed-use building. The ground floor is a café with large glass windows and dark green folding awnings on the façade; a wooden sign above the door reads 'Corner Coffee' in white lettering. On the sidewalk outside the café, two wrought-iron round tables with parasols are set up, with two customers sitting and conversing. The second and third floors are residential, featuring black wrought-iron balconies and several pots of trailing greenery.

On the right side of the street is a row of two-story terraced shops. On the left is a bakery with pale yellow walls and a sign reading 'Sunny Bakery'; through the display window, baguettes and pastries can be seen in the showcase. On the right is a bookstore with a dark blue sign reading 'City Books'. On the street, a bright yellow classic-styled taxi is driving, and a red delivery motorcycle with a rear cargo box is parked by the sidewalk in front of the bakery.

The sidewalks feature abundant street furniture: vintage-style black lampposts, evenly spaced square tree pits with lush street trees inside, and a bus stop with a transparent glass canopy. Inside the bus stop is a poster billboard with the large text 'New Arrival'. At the corner of the intersection stands a green street sign post, with the sign clearly marked in white text reading 'Maple Street'.

The scene is dotted with several hand-drawn style small figures: a pedestrian wearing a red coat is walking a white dog across the zebra crossing, and another pedestrian carrying a backpack is heading toward the bookstore entrance. The linework is clean and confident, with edges carrying a natural pencil hand-drawn texture. The lighting is set as a definite upper-left key light source, casting uniform, regular parallel diagonal shadows to the lower right of buildings, vehicles, and trees, greatly reinforcing the three-dimensional geometric quality of the isometric perspective. The overall color palette is bright and warm, with colors predominantly rendered in low-saturation watercolor washes applied in flat tones; the street layout is rigorous, proportions are precise, and everyday life details are abundant.

title: First-Person City Night Street Photography
prompt_cn: A first-person perspective real-world urban nightscape photography shot, composed in vertical/portrait orientation to emphasize the depth of the street and the towering height of the buildings on both sides. The image depicts a narrow, bustling, and rain-slicked modern city street, with the line of sight extending from the center of the street toward the distant vanishing point. Soaring buildings on both sides block most of the night sky; their exterior walls are covered with intricate metal fire escapes, rusted pipes, and densely packed air conditioning units, with some windows emitting warm yellow light. The street is flanked by a dense array of glowing neon signs: on the left foreground, a protruding red vertical sign clearly reads 'HOTEL' in glowing English letters; on the right building façade hangs a bright blue rectangular sign with white text reading 'BAR', and directly beneath it is a small yellow square lightbox with black text reading 'OPEN 24 HOURS'. Further down the street, atop a high-rise, a massive electronic billboard displays dazzling cyan glowing text reading 'NEON CITY'. The ground is rough black asphalt; the rain-soaked surface has multiple uneven puddles that act like mirrors, perfectly reflecting the red and blue glows of the signs above. In the dead center of the road, a vintage classic yellow taxi is driving deeper into the street, its red tail lights glowing, with the yellow roof-mounted sign clearly displaying the black text 'TAXI'. On the right sidewalk edge, two pedestrians wearing dark trench coats and holding black umbrellas walk with their backs to the camera, heading further down the street. At the vanishing point, in the narrow "canyon" gap formed between the tall buildings on both sides, a massive needle-shaped steel television tower looms faintly through the night sky and thin mist, its spire blinking with a faint red aviation obstruction light. The lighting in the image has a strong cinematic volumetric light effect, with water mist permeating the air. The overall color palette presents a stark contrast between cool cyan-blue tones and intense orange-red tones, making the image highly immersive and photorealistic.

title: Healthy Happy Life Cartoon Infographic
prompt_cn: At the lower center of the image, there is an orange-striped cartoon kitten wearing a blue long sleeping cap adorned with yellow star patterns, lying peacefully asleep on a giant white cloud with eyes closed, with three blue 'Z' letters floating above its head, representing adequate sleep.

title: Anime Girl Multi-Pose Character Sheet
prompt_cn:
A character pose sheet in a 2D anime style, presented in a wide horizontal aspect ratio, with a light gray background featuring faint white grid lines and a clean, well-organized layout. The scene displays five different body poses of an energetic anime girl arranged horizontally in parallel. The girl's uniform character design features: bright orange twin tails, a black headband, a black short zip-up jacket with bright yellow stripe details, a white cropped T-shirt underneath, a white pleated skirt on the bottom, asymmetrical black thigh-high socks, and black platform sneakers with yellow details.

On the far left of the image is the character's standard standing pose: the girl stands with both hands on her hips, chest out and head held high, with a confident expression, looking straight ahead toward the viewer. Above her floats the black handwritten English text 'STANDARD'.
The second pose from the left is a dynamic jumping action. The girl leaps into the air with her right leg bent, left leg kicked straight back, both arms spread wide open in mid-air, a bright and cheerful smile on her face, her twin tails and the hem of her jacket flying high with the motion, full of a sense of weightlessness and vitality. Below it is a black text label 'JUMPING'.
The pose at the center of the image depicts a resting, relaxed state. The girl sits cross-legged on the ground, holding a red soda can with a white pull-tab in her right hand, her left hand propping her up from behind, her head tilted slightly to the left, giving a playful one-eyed wink at the viewer with the corner of her mouth turned up. Above her is a black text label 'RELAX'.
The second pose from the right is a highly dynamic combat-ready action. The girl assumes a lunge stance with her body lowered and leaning forward, both hands tightly gripping a black metal baseball bat with yellow diagonal line graffiti, her gaze sharp and brows slightly furrowed, conveying a coiled, ready-to-strike fighting posture. Below it is a black text label 'COMBAT MODE'.
On the far right is an exaggerated surprise reaction. The girl covers both cheeks with her hands, her body leaning dramatically backward, eyes wide open, mouth agape in a round "O" shape, with three yellow exclamation mark effects drawn above her head. Above her is a black text label 'SURPRISED!'.

In the upper-left corner of the image, the main title is written in large bold black text: 'CHARACTER POSE SHEET', with a smaller subtitle line directly below reading 'PROJECT: NEON STREET'. In the upper-right corner, five square reference color swatches are neatly arranged in a row, filled respectively with bright orange, pure black, bright yellow, pure white, and dark gray, showcasing the character's color palette.

In the upper-left corner of the image, the main title is written in large bold black text: 'CHARACTER POSE SHEET', with a smaller subtitle line directly below reading 'PROJECT: NEON STREET'. In the upper-right corner, five square reference color swatches are neatly arranged in a row, filled respectively with bright orange, pure black, bright yellow, pure white, and dark gray, showcasing the character's color palette.

title: Chibi Girl Eight-Expression Sticker Set
prompt_cn:
An illustration presenting a collection of 8 expression stickers arranged in a 2-row by 4-column grid layout. The background is light yellow. The protagonist of all stickers is the same 2D chibi-style little girl character. The character has pink long twin-tail hair, large emerald-green eyes, and wears a light blue sailor uniform with a red bow and black Mary Jane shoes. Each sticker has a distinct thick white outline along its edge and a faint gray drop shadow, giving the appearance and texture of physical stickers.

The first row, from left to right, contains four stickers:
First sticker: The character wears a bright smile with both eyes closed, her right hand raised high in a waving hello gesture, with several yellow four-pointed stars decorating the area around her head, and pink handwritten text reading 'Hi!' beside her.
Second sticker: The character has fallen sitting on the ground, both fists rubbing her eyes, large tears streaming down like little waterfalls, mouth wide open crying loudly, with blue text reading 'Uwaaa' beside her.
Third sticker: The character has her arms crossed over her chest, cheeks puffed up in anger, eyes glancing sideways, with a red anger cross symbol (vein mark) on the upper right of her head, and red text reading 'Hmph!' beside her.
Fourth sticker: The character forms a heart gesture with both hands in front of her chest, cheeks blushing, eyes sparkling with light, with three pink hearts of varying sizes floating around her, and pink text reading 'Love' at the bottom.

The second row, from left to right, contains four stickers:
Fifth sticker: The character displays a state of shock, both eyes turned into white dots without highlights, mouth wide open in a wavy shape, both hands clutching her head, with several yellow lightning bolt effects in the background, and yellow text reading 'What?!' beside her.
Sixth sticker: The character faces forward, her left eye closed in a wink, her right hand extended forward with a thumbs-up, with green text reading 'Good!' beside her.
Seventh sticker: The character is lying flat on the ground face down, both eyes closed, with a serene expression, a sleep bubble floating above her head containing dark blue text reading 'Zzz'.
Eighth sticker: The character rests her chin on her right hand, brows slightly furrowed, lips pursed in a thinking expression, with a large black question mark '?' hovering directly above her head.

The overall image is brightly colored with high saturation, featuring a cute art style, smooth and rounded line work, flat coloring, and even lighting, with no complex background distractions, highlighting the practicality of the expression stickers and the vividness of the character, perfectly suited to a horizontal composition ratio.

title: Oreo-Themed Miniature Shop
prompt_cn: A studio macro photography shot showcasing a handcrafted polymer clay-textured miniature diorama. At the center of the frame is a small Oreo-themed shop, presented in a vertical composition. The shop's roof is constructed from several oversized Oreo sandwich cookies stacked and interlocked together; the cookies are deep black with thick white cream filling layers in between, featuring the classic embossed pattern and clearly legible English lettering 'OREO' on their surfaces, with the authentic tactile quality of handmade clay—rounded forms with subtly visible fingerprint impressions. The shop's front features an open wooden serving window, and directly above the window hangs a prominent blue rectangular sign with the brand name 'OREO' in raised white bold uppercase lettering. At the window, a miniature clay shopkeeper wearing a small blue apron and a white work cap leans out from the upper body, holding a small Oreo cookie and extending it outward through the window. Outside the shop stands a customer—a miniature clay figure wearing a red casual jacket and carrying a yellow backpack—tilting their head slightly upward with both hands outstretched, ready to receive the cookie from the shopkeeper. The earthen ground surrounding the shop is densely scattered with numerous Oreo cookies of varying sizes; some are whole, while others have been split open to reveal the white cream filling, covering the entire foreground and surrounding ground area. The scene is lit with soft studio lighting, even and gentle, accentuating the characteristic matte and delicate texture of polymer clay. The photography employs an extremely shallow depth of field, with the focus precisely locked on the shopkeeper, customer, and signage area, while the foreground cookies closer to the lens and the background edges exhibit a strong, smooth bokeh effect, perfectly creating a sense of miniature-world scale and a dreamlike atmosphere.

title: Custom Character Emoji Sticker Showcase
prompt_cn: A sticker sheet display in digital illustration format. The composition is in landscape orientation with a light yellow polka-dot pattern background. The stickers are arranged in a 2-row by 3-column grid layout, showcasing 6 emoji stickers featuring the same 2D anime character. Each sticker has a thick white outline along its edges, giving a three-dimensional die-cut sticker effect. The consistent sticker character is a cute girl in a 2D anime style with long pink twin-tail hair, blunt bangs, white cat-ear hair accessories on top of her head, a classic blue sailor uniform, a large red bow tied at the chest, and deep emerald-green large eyes. In the upper-left sticker, the girl wears a bright smile with her right hand raised high in a greeting gesture, and the lower-left corner features the English word 'HELLO' in pink with a thick white outline. In the upper-middle sticker, the girl playfully winks with one eye while forming a heart shape with both hands in front of her chest, with three small floating red hearts around her and the red English word 'LOVE' at the bottom. In the upper-right sticker, the girl has large teardrops at the corners of her eyes, holding white tissues in both hands to wipe her tears with a pitiful, aggrieved expression, and the upper-right corner features the blue text 'TAT'. In the lower-left sticker, the girl puffs out her cheeks with arms crossed over her chest in an angry pose, with a red anger symbol (💢) drawn to the right of her head, and the purple English word 'HUMPH' below. In the lower-middle sticker, the girl's eyes are wide open, both hands covering her cheeks, mouth exaggeratedly open in an "O" shape showing an extremely shocked expression, with the orange English word 'OMG' in the upper-left corner. In the lower-right sticker, the girl laughs with her eyes closed, giving a thumbs-up with her right hand pointing forward, with yellow four-pointed sparkling star effects in the background, and the bright green English word 'OK!' at the bottom. The overall image has vibrant colors, primarily using soft macaron tones, with lighting and shading rendered in a Japanese cel-shading flat-color style, featuring clean and smooth character outlines full of vitality and fun.

title: Doodle-Style Future Education Infographic
prompt_cn: A doodle-style educational slide infographic with a 16:9 aspect ratio. The overall background is a flat, solid light yellow. The image adopts a colorful, thick-lined colored pencil hand-drawn style with vibrant, rich colors and a distinctly doodled brushstroke texture. At the top center of the image is a prominent hand-drawn large title with a thick black border, written in bold black English letters: 'WHAT ARE FUTURES?'. Below the main title, four white rounded-rectangle cards with thick black hand-drawn outlines are neatly arranged in a 2×2 grid layout. The upper-left card has a uniform blue hand-painted background title banner at the top reading '1. The Problem'; inside the card, a farmer wearing a straw hat holds a green wheat stalk, beside a baker wearing a tall white hat pointing at a steaming oven, both with thought bubbles above their heads containing red question marks; below, in hand-drawn English lettering, the full text reads: 'Farmer Bob grows wheat. Baker Sue needs wheat for bread. Both worry about price changes!'. The upper-right card has a green banner at the top reading '2. The Agreement'; inside, two hands are shaking, with a scroll-like piece of paper floating between them, on which a golden lock and several coins are drawn; below, the full text reads: 'They sign a "Futures Contract". They agree to trade wheat for $5 in 3 months.'. The lower-left card has a red banner at the top reading '3. Locking the Price'; inside, a large silver padlock firmly locks a green price tag marked '$5', with an open calendar drawn beside it featuring a clock icon on the calendar page; the full text below reads: 'No matter what happens to the market, Bob gets $5 and Sue pays $5. It is safe!'. The lower-right card has a purple banner at the top reading '4. Summary'; inside, a young person wearing a blue backpack and red-rimmed sunglasses is drawn.

title: Ukiyo-e Flash Cards
prompt_cn:
A vertical rectangular language learning flashcard designed in the traditional Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print style. The image is divided into upper and lower sections, surrounded by a dark blue Japanese traditional seigaiha (wave pattern) border, with an aged, rough-textured cream-yellow washi paper background.

The upper area, occupying approximately two-thirds of the image, features a ukiyo-e style illustration. At the center of the image sits a calico cat (with white, black, and orange patches) in an upright seated posture, plump in physique, with a thin red cord tied around its neck from which hangs a small golden round bell. The cat is rendered using traditional flat-color application techniques and delicate black outlines. The cat's background is a classic Japanese landscape: in the far distance, the blue-and-white silhouette of Mount Fuji with snow-capped peaks; in the middle ground, a few stylized layered clouds; in the foreground, several pink cherry blossom petals drifting in mid-air with the wind. In the lower-right corner of the illustration is a red square faux-antique seal containing the seal script Chinese character '猫'. The entire illustration area is colored primarily in indigo, vermilion, moss green, and cream, possessing the characteristic registration offset feel and vintage charm unique to woodblock prints.

The lower area, occupying approximately one-third of the image, serves as the flashcard's information display section, centered and clearly structured. At the very top is a slightly smaller line of Japanese hiragana reading 'ねこ'; directly below is the most prominent and largest Japanese kanji '猫'; directly beneath the kanji is the smaller romanized spelling 'neko'; further below is the English translation 'Cat' in bold typeface. At the very bottom of the lower half, a bilingual example sentence is included, with the Japanese '猫が桜の木の下で寝ている。' on top and the corresponding English translation 'The cat is sleeping under the cherry tree.' below. All text is in black, with fonts carrying a slight brush-written stroke quality, perfectly harmonizing with the overall ukiyo-e classical visual aesthetic.
