title: Hand-Drawn Isometric View
prompt_cn: A hand-drawn style illustration rendered in a classic isometric view. At the center of the image is a cutaway three-dimensional architectural model of a cozy two-story café-cum-bookstore, composed in a horizontal layout, with a light beige blank background to highlight the main structure. The building is divided into two floors. The first floor is the café area, with black-and-white vintage checkered floor tiles. On the left side is an L-shaped wooden bar counter, on which sit a silver semi-automatic Italian espresso machine, several white coffee cups, and a transparent pastry display case containing croissants. Behind the counter stands a young male barista wearing a brown apron, intently brewing coffee. In front of the counter are three wooden high-legged bar stools arranged side by side. On the right wall hangs a blackboard with the menu clearly written in white hand-lettered script: 'Espresso', 'Latte', 'Matcha', 'Pastry'. In a corner of the first floor sits a lush Monstera deliciosa plant. An L-shaped staircase with wooden handrails leads up to the second-floor loft reading area. The second floor has natural wood-toned flooring, with a Bohemian-style geometric-patterned rug laid in the center. On the rug is a mustard-yellow single-seat armchair, beside which is a small round table holding an open silver laptop and a steaming cup of coffee. Along the back wall of the second floor is a full-height solid wood bookshelf stretching from floor to ceiling, densely packed with books of various colors. On the side wall is a vintage poster printed with the text 'Jazz Night'. The building's exterior retains portions of red brick wall surface, with green ivy climbing across it. Outside the door is a gray cobblestone path, beside which stands a black vintage street lamp. Above the building's entrance hangs a black cast-iron double-sided sign with the shop name 'Café de la Lune' written in elegant lettering. The artwork employs a style of fine pen linework combined with warm, bright watercolor washes, with lines possessing the natural texture characteristic of hand-drawing. The color palette is dominated by warm wood tones, brick red, vintage green, and warm yellow. The lighting is set as soft afternoon sunlight, casting clean, parallel diagonal shadows on the ground and objects, presenting a comfortable, leisurely, and detail-rich miniature model visual effect.

title: Chalkboard-Style Café Hand-Drawn Menu
prompt_cn: A vertically composed blackboard chalk illustration in the style of a vintage café hand-drawn menu. The background is a deep green chalkboard, its surface covered with slight white chalk dust and blurred, hazy smudge marks left by a chalkboard eraser, conveying a highly realistic physical texture. All elements in the image are rendered with the characteristic grainy lines and cross-hatching of chalk, primarily in pure white, pale yellow, and light brown. At the top center of the image is a ribbon-shaped border frame, inside which bold white chalk lettering reads 'CAFE & BAKERY.' Directly beneath the ribbon is a smaller line of handwritten Japanese: '本日のおすすめ' (Today's Recommendations). The visual focal point at the center of the image is a meticulously drawn hot latte in white and light brown chalk, sitting on a circular coaster. A heart-shaped latte art pattern is traced on the surface of the coffee, and above the rim of the cup three curling wavy lines represent rising steam. To the lower right of the coffee cup is a croissant, its layered dough texture and crispy shadows rendered with pale yellow and white chalk strokes. Scattered around the coffee are a few loose coffee beans and simple four-pointed star motifs. The lower half of the image contains a neatly typeset menu list, with items on the left, prices on the right, and sparse chalk dotted lines connecting them in between. From top to bottom, the entries read: 'Hot Coffee' — '¥450,' 'Cafe Latte' — '¥500,' 'Croissant' — '¥300,' 'Pancake' — '¥650.' Along the very bottom edge of the image, the business hours are written in flowing cursive English: 'Open 10:00 - Close 20:00.' The lighting is even throughout, and the strong dark background contrasts sharply with the bright chalk strokes, imbuing the piece with a rich hand-drawn aesthetic.

title: Urban Night View Through Raindrop Glass
prompt_cn: A wide-format composited photograph presenting a scene of an urban nightscape viewed through a layer of wet glass with a pronounced water droplet texture. The foremost plane of the image is covered with a realistic transparent glass material effect, its surface densely covered with glistening raindrops of varying sizes. Some water droplets, affected by gravity, are meandering down the glass surface, leaving clear transparent water trails; the edges of the glass exhibit a slight condensation fog effect. Through this layer of glass, the background is a photograph of a bustling city nightscape. Neon signs of varying heights hang on both sides of the background street; headlights of cars driving along the street emit warm yellow beams, while their taillights glow a bright red. Blurred silhouettes of pedestrians holding umbrellas and wearing dark coats are faintly visible along the roadside. The overall lighting conveys a strong cinematic quality. The red, blue, purple, gold, and other colored neon lights in the background undergo physical refraction through the foreground raindrops, transforming into large expanses of rich and psychedelic circular light spots (bokeh effect) across the image. The sharp, crisp foreground raindrop texture contrasts dramatically with the defocused, blurred, and dazzling city background, creating a striking sense of depth of field and visual contrast.

title: Fruit Juice Splash Effect Ad Photography
prompt_cn:
A commercial advertising product photography image. The frame adopts a 16:9 wide-format composition, with a product placed centrally as the visual focal point—a transparent, slender cylindrical glass bottle filled with vivid emerald-green cold-pressed fruit and vegetable juice. The bottle surface is covered with condensation droplets, presenting a minimalist style with absolutely no text, logos, or labels attached.

Surrounding this central glass bottle is a group of fresh raw ingredients radiating outward in an "explosion" formation, splashing in all directions, presenting a highly dynamic freeze-frame effect. The specific ingredients suspended and flying in all directions include: several curled, vividly green kale leaves with clearly visible veins; cut green apple chunks; translucent thin cucumber slices; yellow lemons cut in half with juice splashing in all directions; several stalks of fresh celery with leaves attached; and several pieces of raw ginger with rough skin. These ingredients are accompanied by countless tiny transparent water droplets and green juice splashes, distributed in 3D throughout the air, extending dramatically toward both the left and right sides of the frame.

The background is set as a dramatically modern solid-color space, employing colors that represent health and brand identity: the background center is a bright highlight emerald green, smoothly transitioning toward the edges of the frame into deep dark green, creating a strong vignette effect that makes the central product particularly prominent.

In terms of lighting and visual details, the image employs dramatic lighting typical of professional commercial photography. Bright side rim lights precisely delineate the edge contours of the glass bottle and every piece of ingredient suspended in mid-air, reinforcing the three-dimensionality and crispness of the objects. The bottle and central ingredients on the focal plane are extremely sharp, while the flying ingredients closest to the lens edges and farthest away carry a slight motion blur effect, enhancing the sense of depth and velocity of the outward explosion scene. The entire scene is completely free of text, with extremely high color saturation and stark light-shadow contrast, objectively conveying the freshness and vitality of the ingredients.

title: Handmade Miniature Treehouse Landscape Model
prompt_cn:
A photograph showcasing a handmade diorama art style, with the frame extending horizontally to present an exquisitely crafted miniature world brimming with childlike wonder and imagination. The entire scene is constructed entirely by hand from twigs, cardboard, clay, moss, dried flowers, and paper, visually rich with the natural organic textures of rough wood grain, soft moss, and paper. At the center of the frame is a miniature treehouse built upon an irregular arrangement of branches, its main structure assembled and sculpted from irregular thin twigs, brown cardboard, and rustic clay. Extending from the front of the treehouse is a simple small balcony, closely enveloped around and beneath by fluffy green natural moss and a few clusters of dark pink dried small flowers.

Seated on the balcony is a small girl crafted with clay and paper textures, wearing a light beige dress and holding an open miniature paper book in her hands. The book's inner pages lie flat, illustrated with tiny colorful plants and forest drawings. Nestled closely beside the girl is a small cat in a crouching position, perched on whose nose bridge is a pair of extremely tiny wire-frame round glasses, its head tilted slightly forward with its gaze fully focused on the illustrations in the book.

The lighting is soft natural diffused overhead light at a medium-low intensity, conveying a tranquil atmosphere. The gentle light forms subtle highlights on the open book pages and the edges of the cat's metal glasses. A trace of subtle natural rim light filters through openings in the surrounding miniature forest, delicately outlining the silhouettes of the girl, the cat, and the treehouse. The color palette is grounded in natural forest greens and earth browns, with cardboard and paper contributing soft neutral tones. The background is densely filled with moss and dried flower plant structures, presenting a deep, natural moss-green color. Image details are extremely sharp and clear, with no vignetting, glow, refraction, or film grain effects, perfectly capturing the physical textures of the miniature materials. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of quiet companionship and natural narrative, bearing the signature handcrafted quality and fairytale metaphor characteristic of artist Zho's ZH4O series.

title: Logo Miniature Hyper-Realistic Photography
prompt_cn: A vertical ultra-realistic miniature photography work. At the center of the frame is a massive 3D physical logo with the English text 'BRAND NAME' clearly and completely engraved on its surface. The logo retains its original shape and vivid colors. Around and on the surface of the logo, there are numerous realistic miniature human figurines at approximately 1:50 scale engaging in various interactions. Some figurines stand on scaffolding, painting the edges of the logo with brushes; some climb the logo structure using ladders and ropes; others wipe the surface clean with cloths, while some hold miniature cameras to take photos. The figurines are equipped with props such as ladders, ropes, and buckets. The background is a clean, pure white, non-gradient studio backdrop. The shot is captured from a macro photography perspective with shallow depth of field and a slight overhead angle to emphasize the massive sense of volume. The lighting consists of soft diffused white light from above and fill light from the side, casting realistic and delicate tiny shadows on the pure white ground and around the logo. The colors are true to life, and the text 'BRAND NAME' is crisp and sharp.

title: Bread Lion Sculpture Still Life
prompt_cn: This is a highly creative, high-end still life photography image in vertical composition. At the very center of the frame is a highly realistic lion sculpture, entirely crafted and carved from an assortment of baked breads, perfectly fitting the vertical space of the image. The lion is seated in a dignified and majestic posture. Its luxuriant, voluminous mane is composed of layers upon layers of golden, crispy French croissants with an appetizing buttery sheen, where each paper-thin, ready-to-flake puff pastry layer is clearly visible. The lion's face, torso, and stout forelimbs are primarily made from well-browned baguettes and whole-wheat rustic European-style hard breads, whose surfaces retain the natural rough texture, irregular holes, and crackled hard crusts of real bread — these natural bread characteristics are ingeniously used to simulate the lion's taut muscular structure and facial contours. The lion's eyes are finely polished from dark rye bread blocks, with pumpkin seeds placed as pupils; the tip of the nose is a small French bread roll densely sprinkled with white sesame seeds. The overall color palette presents a warm, rich, and extremely lifelike range of golden-brown, caramel, and toasted baking hues. The image uses professional studio soft lighting, with gentle and delicate light falling upon the sculpture, precisely delineating every undulation, crack, and crispy texture on the bread surfaces, while casting soft, gradual shadows on the right side. The background is a pure, deep warm-gray seamless backdrop paper, directing all visual focus entirely onto the sculpture subject. The image quality delivers ultra-high-definition macro details — even the tiny pores on the bread crust, a few scattered flaky pastry crumbs and several sesame seeds on the base are all clearly visible.

title: Creative Tomato Hot Air Balloon Ad
prompt_cn:
A widescreen-ratio minimalist creative advertisement image. The frame features a pure white background with generous negative space, and the overall style is clean, high-contrast, and imaginative. Positioned slightly left of center is a real, vibrantly colored red tomato with a realistic surface sheen, natural three-dimensional shadows, and a green stem on top. This real tomato is cleverly integrated into a set of black hand-drawn ink line doodles. Loose and playful black single-line strokes sketch several converging ropes beneath the tomato, connecting to a simple line-drawn small square basket of a hot air balloon below. Inside the basket is a drawn stick figure wearing aviator goggles with a scarf fluttering behind its neck, holding up a monocular telescope and gazing toward the right side of the frame. The real red tomato is creatively repurposed here as the envelope (balloon) of the hot air balloon. Around the tomato, simple black brushstrokes depict several parallel arc lines indicating wind flow, along with two or three casually outlined clouds.

Centered at the very top of the frame, in prominent bold black sans-serif English typeface, the advertising copy reads: 'FRESH IDEAS TAKE FLIGHT'. Centered at the very bottom of the frame, the brand logo is clearly arranged: bold black text 'NATURE FARMS', with a small tilted leaf icon drawn in minimalist black lines placed immediately to the left of the text. The overall visual is an interplay of real, colorful still life objects interwoven with whimsical black-and-white two-dimensional doodles — a clever concept with strong visual impact.

title: Embroidery-Style Fox Forest Illustration
prompt_cn: A horizontal illustration simulating traditional hand embroidery, set against a background of unbleached beige woven linen with clearly visible warp-and-weft fabric texture. The scene depicts a magical, fairy-tale natural landscape in which all visual elements exhibit the authentic texture of colored embroidery threads stitched onto cloth. At the center of the composition is a stylized, adorable orange-red little fox, its body formed by dense satin stitch with lustrous threads aligned along the direction of fur growth, creating a slightly raised three-dimensional contour and a strong tactile quality. Beneath the fox's feet, undulating meadows are laid out in flat stitch using green threads of varying shades. In the upper left corner, a golden sun is embroidered with radial, bold stitch marks representing its rays; several puffy white clouds float in the sky, their edges outlined with fine backstitch and their interiors filled with plump white yarn. Surrounding the fox are lush decorative elements in a folk embroidery style, including various softly colored pink, pale purple, and yellow flowers with rounded petal lines, their pistils composed of dense French knots that form distinctly raised, granular textures. On both sides of the composition, several fairy-tale-like small trees are symmetrically arranged, their canopies rendered in rounded geometric patterns and their trunks bearing visible stitch marks. The blank linen areas are dotted with cross-shaped symbols, tiny stars, and red berry-like French knots as accents. The overall palette is dominated by soft pastel tones and traditional folk colors, with light skillfully casting tiny shadows on the embroidery threads to enhance the thickness and materiality of the yarn, creating a warm, cozy, and magically enchanting storybook atmosphere.

title: Embroidered Portrait
prompt_cn: A close-up of a hand-embroidered portrait with a macro photography texture. At the center of the frame is an embroidered forest goddess with a serene countenance, composed to fill the entire vertical canvas. The background is a dark grayish-brown coarse-spun linen fabric, with clearly visible warp-and-weft weave texture and tiny fiber fringes. The goddess's portrait is composed of embroidery threads in various earth-tone hues, primarily including dark gold, deep green, copper-brown, and off-white. The stitches are three-dimensional and richly layered, clearly showcasing handmade stitch traces such as satin stitch, running stitch, and French knots. The goddess's facial contours are delineated with delicate off-white and light brown fine threads; her eyes are gently closed, her expression exuding a solemn and sacred aura. Her long hair is formed by layered and coiled embroidery threads of varying thickness in dark gold and copper-brown, interspersed among the strands are fern leaves embroidered in deep green thread, handcrafted geometric totems, and tiny floral motifs. Soft sidelight illuminates the embroidery surface, casting subtle three-dimensional shadows on the raised threads and the linen base texture, accentuating the material's heft and tactile authenticity. The overall image radiates a rustic, natural, and profoundly sacred artistic atmosphere.

title: Felted Wool Brown Bear Scene
prompt_cn: A stop-motion animation style miniature handcrafted scene photograph. The main subject is a small brown bear handmade from wool felt, positioned at the visual center of the frame. The surface of the small brown bear is covered with soft wool fibers, featuring distinct felting textures and uneven hand-stitched seam marks. The bear has a round and adorable body shape, wearing a light blue small felt vest, with a red yarn scarf tied around its neck. One of its paws holds a miniature basket woven from coarse hemp twine, containing two small red wool felt apples. The small brown bear is set within a miniature fairy-tale forest scene constructed from layered fabrics and soft-colored props. The ground is composed of multiple overlapping layers of non-woven felt in green and earthy yellow tones, with irregularly cut edges, simulating undulating grassland. A few small pale pink and goose-yellow wool felt mushrooms are scattered around the bear's feet. In the background stand several miniature trees, their trunks tightly wound with brown chunky yarn, and their canopies formed from large clumps of green and mint-colored wool felt. The image uses a wide-format composition, and the macro photography perspective produces a shallow depth of field effect, with the background slightly blurred, perfectly focusing attention on the bear and the textural details of the foreground. Warm, soft sidelight illuminates the scene, casting gentle shadows on the wool and fabric surfaces, greatly accentuating the plush tactile quality of the fibers. The overall color palette consists of warm earth tones and soft macaron colors, and the entire scene—composed entirely of felt and yarn—exudes the warmth of handcraftsmanship and the cozy charm of a fairy-tale picture book.

title: Felted Wool Little Fox Miniature Scene
prompt_cn:
A stop-motion animation style felt art photograph. The main subject is a handcrafted anthropomorphic little fox made of wool felt, exhibiting a strong tactile quality, soft fibers, uneven stitching, and pronounced felt texture. The little fox is positioned slightly below center in the frame, with an orange felt body and white cheeks; its eyes are made of small black beads sewn on. It wears a red felt hooded cloak with deliberately retained rough white stitching along the edges, and holds in its hand a miniature basket woven from thin jute twine.

The little fox is set within a miniature diorama box, with an overall vertical composition suited for portrait orientation. The background is composed of layered, softly toned fabrics, with light blue and mint green felt pieces stacked to form distant mountains and sky. Surrounding the little fox are fairy tale-like, softly colored props: the ground is covered with dark green tweed fabric, and a small path made of coiled beige thick yarn winds forward; on either side grow several felt-crafted pink and pale blue mushrooms with white polka dots sewn onto their caps; among the grass are scattered small flowers sewn from fabric scraps and colorful buttons. On both sides of the frame are tree trunks formed from brown curled felt, with canopies of layered, irregularly shaped green felt pieces extending upward, filling the vertical space.

The lighting is warm and soft, cast from the upper side, with a slight warm yellow halo at the edges, perfectly highlighting the fluffiness of the wool fibers, the undulation of the stitching, and the physical thickness of the fabrics. The overall depth of field is shallow, with the background slightly blurred, exuding a warm fairy tale charm—as if a still frame from a stop-motion animated fairy tale constructed entirely of felt, yarn, and fabric with exquisite tactile quality.

title: Nostalgic Afternoon Sunlight
prompt_cn:
A vertically composed children's picture book illustration, presenting a summer afternoon scene brimming with childlike charm and nostalgic warmth. The background depicts a tranquil green backyard, with the main subject shaded beneath a tall, lush old tree. The tree's stout tawny-brown trunk extends upward from one side of the frame, its enormous canopy occupying the upper portion of the composition with layers upon layers of green leaves. Warm afternoon sunlight filters through gaps in the foliage, casting dappled golden light and shadow across the ground and lawn. A string of wind chimes combining metal and wood hangs from a higher branch, slightly tilted, conveying the dynamic of being gently swayed by a breeze.

On the ground beneath the old tree is a "pillow fort" constructed from colorful pillows, floral-print bed sheets, and soft knitted blankets. One corner of a blanket is cleverly draped and secured over a lower branch, forming a cozy tent-like semi-enclosed space. The interior of the fort is lined with a thick rug, surrounded by striped and solid-colored throw pillows of various sizes.

In the cool shade inside the fort, a little boy lies on a soft cushion, quietly napping. He has fluffy short hair and wears comfortable summer cotton short sleeves and shorts, with a thin blanket casually draped over his chest, his sleeping expression peaceful. Beside him, a golden retriever with soft, golden fur is curled up, eyes closed, head resting on its two front paws, dozing off alongside the boy.

On the grass in front of the boy and the golden retriever sits a light-colored wooden tray. On the tray rests a clear glass pitcher filled with pale yellow lemonade with fresh lemon slices and ice cubes floating inside, accompanied by a glass with a red-and-white striped straw, and a white ceramic plate filled with chocolate chip cookies. The overall color palette leans warm, dominated by vibrant natural greens, warm sunlight golds, and soft fabric hues. The lighting is gentle, exuding a lazy, tranquil, and nostalgically comforting atmosphere.

title: Japanese Mecha Design Blueprint
prompt_cn:
A Japanese anime-style sci-fi mecha mechanical design sheet (horizontal illustration). The overall image employs precise, clean linework and semi-realistic cel-shading techniques, presenting the quality of an official anime setting collection design page. The dominant color palette consists of soft dark red, medium gray, and metallic tones. The main subject is a sci-fi mecha displayed in an exploded/deconstructed view, laid out in a reference sheet format.

On the left-center of the frame, occupying a larger area, is the mecha's full-body front view in an angled three-quarter standing pose, showcasing slender limbs, layered red-and-gray alternating armor plates, exposed metallic hydraulic rods, and complex knee joint assemblies; the chest armor is heavy, and the shoulder pauldrons are broad with exhaust louvers. The upper right of the frame features a head close-up, including front and side views, displaying the streamlined red head casing, silver-gray faceplate, a gold V-shaped antenna on the forehead, and glowing green main monitor (eyes). The lower right showcases hand and weapon close-ups, including the intricate joint construction of mechanical fingers in open and clenched-fist positions, as well as a side view of a large metallic beam rifle equipped with a scope and energy magazine. The lower center of the frame features a partial close-up of the dorsal thrusters, displaying exhaust nozzles, folding metal wings, and intricate internal turbine structures.

Scattered around the various components are leader lines and handwritten-style concept annotations in Japanese and English. Above the full-body view is a prominent title: 'TYPE-04 ASSAULT MECHA', followed by smaller Japanese text: '强袭型机动兵器 零四式'. Beside the head close-up are annotations: 'メインカメラ', 'V字型アンテナ', and a handwritten note 'センサー感度调整必要'. Beside the weapon close-up: '高出力ビームライフル' and 'エネルギーパック'. Beside the thrusters: 'メインスラスター'. Along the edges of the frame are scattered notes: 'Note: Armor joints need more flexibility.' and '装甲の軽量化'.

The background is rendered in a loose watercolor anime landscape style, with subdued, understated tones that do not overpower the foreground. The bottom of the frame and the distant background depict moss-covered grassland ruins with scattered massive concrete blocks, while the far background faintly reveals steep cliff silhouettes and a futuristic sci-fi city skyline. The four corners of the frame feature subtle crosshair registration marks and reference lines, perfectly balancing the rigor of an industrial blueprint with the artistic expressiveness of anime illustration.

title: Recipe Infographic Design
prompt_cn: A wide-format minimalist-style recipe infographic, shot from a completely overhead perspective, with a clean pure white background. The overall image is divided into two main areas, top and bottom, presenting the preparation process of creamy garlic mushroom pasta in a clear, logical layout. In the upper left corner, the main title 'Creamy Garlic Mushroom Pasta Recipe' is written in a black sans-serif font. On the left side of the upper half, real overhead photographs of each prepared ingredient are neatly arranged, each accompanied by black label text: a small bundle of raw spaghetti, labeled '200g spaghetti'; some sliced fresh button mushrooms, labeled '150g mushrooms'; three peeled garlic cloves, labeled '3 garlic cloves'; a small glass pitcher containing white light cream, labeled '200ml cream'; a small wooden spoonful of golden olive oil, labeled '1 tbsp olive oil'; a block of pale yellow Parmesan cheese, labeled 'parmesan'; and a few fresh green parsley leaves, labeled 'parsley'. On the right side of the upper half is a preparation step flowchart, connected by black dashed lines linking three minimalist-style black line icons with accompanying text descriptions: the first node is a steaming pot icon, with the text '1. Boil pasta' written below; the dashed line extends to the right to the second node, a flat sauté pan icon, with '2. Sauté garlic & mushrooms' written below; the dashed line continues to the right to the third node, a bowl-shaped mixing icon with a stirring spoon, with '3. Mix with cream' written below. The dashed line then extends downward from the third icon, reaching directly to the bottom center of the image. At the bottom center of the image, an overhead close-up photograph of the final dish is displayed: a white round plate holds the finished creamy garlic mushroom pasta, with noodles coated in a rich white sauce, sautéed golden-brown mushroom slices scattered across the surface, and the top garnished with grated Parmesan cheese shavings and chopped green parsley. The overall visual style is clean and modern, with bright and evenly distributed lighting. The colors of the ingredients and the finished dish are vivid and natural, forming a comfortable contrast against the white background, and all text is clearly legible.

title: Eiffel Tower Origami Model
prompt_cn:
A digital photography work in portrait orientation. At the center of the frame is an extremely complex and exquisite origami model of the Eiffel Tower. The model is folded from paper with a noticeable fibrous texture in warm gray and light gold tones, accurately reproducing the tower's four-sided base, tiered observation decks, and soaring spire. The layers of paper are meticulously staggered, and the geometric structure is rigorous. Thanks to the vertical format, the slender silhouette of the tower is fully displayed and stretched out in the lower-center portion of the frame.

Directly above the tower model, the word 'PARIS' appears, composed of bold, origami-style three-dimensional letters. The five letters are arranged in an elegant arch formation, appearing to float, and are folded from highly saturated paper in the classic colors of the French flag—deep blue, pure white, and vivid red. Each letter itself features clearly visible creases and a multi-faceted, blocky three-dimensional quality.

The background is a soft and minimalist light beige neutral tone, with a surface bearing subtle rough watercolor paper texture and very faint abstract geometric embossing, creating a clean and airy space. Soft, diffused natural light enters from the upper-left side of the frame, forming delicate highlights along the edges and ridges of the origami, while casting soft, gradient shadows within the layered folds of the paper and onto the background. The light and shadow treatment greatly enhances the visual depth and sharpness of every crease. The overall visual style is realistic and lifelike, brimming with the craftsmanship of handmade artistry, highlighting the material texture of the paper, the precision of the geometry, and the harmonious aesthetic of the overall color palette.

title: 1920s Fairy Tale Illustration
prompt_cn: A vintage fairy-tale illustration in the style of 1920s Arthur Rackham. In a horizontal composition, it presents a dark, profound enchanted forest. The overall palette consists of desaturated, soft watercolors dominated by ochre, olive green, antique brown, and faded indigo, with the background carrying the textural quality of aged parchment. The artistic style employs extraordinarily delicate and intricate black ink lines for contours and cross-hatching, imbuing the scene with a mysterious, enchanting, and slightly eerie atmosphere. On both sides and in the background grow enormous ancient trees with rough, gnarled bark, their textures faintly revealing twisted humanoid face contours. The roots grip moss-covered rocks and soil like gaunt claws. Twisted, entangled branches interweave overhead into a canopy that blocks the sky, allowing only a few dim, pale shafts of light to filter through and illuminate the ground-level vines and giant ferns. In a clearing at the center, a hare wearing a tattered Victorian-era velvet waistcoat with a pocket watch chain across its chest leans against a cluster of large red-capped, white-spotted mushrooms. On a branch to the left perches a sharp-eyed old crow with a string of small rusted bells around its neck. In the crevices among tree roots and in midair, several semi-transparent small faeries with dragonfly wings and slightly pale, uncanny faces flutter about, carrying faintly glowing miniature lanterns. In the low shrubbery on the right, an enormous toad wearing a monocle squats on a lichen-covered stone. Multiple magical objects are hidden throughout the scene: at the base of the central mushrooms, a glowing purple crystal key protrudes from the soil; inside a hollow of the old tree on the left sits an antique hourglass with silver sand streaming through it; at the bottom of a puddle near the toad lies a compass emitting a golden glow with its needle spinning wildly. At the top center of the image floats an elegant, flowing black hand-lettered calligraphic title: 'The Whispering Woods'. In a blank parchment area at the lower right corner, a riddle is written in classical italic handwriting: 'I have no voice, but I sing in the wind. I have no eyes, but I watch from the shadows. Seek the key beneath the red cap to find the truth.'

title: 1950s Style Poster
prompt_cn:
This is a vintage travel promotional poster in the mid-century modern graphic design style of the 1950s. The image features a vertical composition with an overall tone that is optimistic, nostalgic, and strongly promotional. The entire scene is composed of flat geometric color blocks, with no complex gradients or shadows, relying on vivid color contrasts and sharp edges to define forms. In the foreground, a man and woman ride a bright mustard-yellow vintage Vespa-style scooter, constructed from simple flat color block shapes. The man sports a retro slicked-back hairstyle and wears a white shirt with navy-blue high-waisted trousers; the woman sits on the back seat, wearing a coral-red dress and a white silk headscarf, her posture cheerful and carefree. The midground uses deep ochre and reddish-brown geometric rectangles and semicircular color blocks to abstractly outline the iconic arched structure of the Roman Colosseum. The background features an expansive Tiffany-blue sky, across which a streamlined silver-white classic early-era jet airliner soars at a tilted upward angle, trailing two straight white contrails behind its tail.

The poster contains strong typographic elements and eye-catching promotional slogans. The top of the poster, occupying roughly the upper quarter of the composition, displays a prominent oversized location label in a retro bold sans-serif typeface with bright red letters: 'VISIT ROME'. Directly beneath the main title is a smaller line of italicized subtitle text in navy blue: 'EXPERIENCE THE ETERNAL CITY!'. Above the contrails left by the airplane, a yellow script-style slogan reads: 'FLY THE MODERN WAY'. At the bottom of the poster, a deep blue horizontal rectangular color block serves as a footer bar, neatly displaying bold white promotional text: 'BOOK YOUR DREAM VACATION TODAY WITH PAN-GLOBAL AIRLINES'. In the lower-right corner of the footer bar, in very small white type, is the inscription: 'EST. 1955'. The overall color palette exhibits a vintage high-saturation quality, with typography and geometric forms seamlessly integrated.

title: 1950s Vintage Travel Poster
prompt_cn:
A 1950s mid-century modern style vintage travel promotional poster in a vertical composition. The image is composed entirely of flat, pure geometric color blocks with no complex light-shadow transitions or gradients, exhibiting a classic silkscreen printing texture and a slight vintage paper grain. The overall palette is warm, optimistic, and nostalgic, primarily utilizing period-characteristic colors such as mint green, warm orange, mustard yellow, deep navy blue, and coral pink.

The background presents a highly abstracted and stylized California natural landscape: above is a large semicircular warm orange sun, below which overlap coral pink mountain ranges composed of sharp triangles and a navy blue ocean delineated by smooth, wavy lines. In the lower-middle portion, a pale yellow winding road cuts through the scene, upon which travels a red 1950s streamlined vintage convertible sports car assembled from simple geometric shapes, carrying two minimalist silhouetted figures wearing sunglasses. Flanking the road stand several towering palm trees with straight, slender dark brown trunks and canopies made of sharp geometric green polygons that extend vertically and break through the horizontal lines of the background.

The poster incorporates bold typographic design and prominent text elements: spanning the full width at the top of the image is a massive bold sans-serif uppercase English title in deep navy blue reading 'CALIFORNIA'. Directly above this large title, a smaller line of mustard yellow text is aligned, reading 'VISIT SUNNY'. At the very bottom, a wide warm orange horizontal rectangular color block serves as a base, with prominent white uppercase English promotional text centered within it reading 'THE GOLDEN STATE AWAITS YOU!'. Additionally, vintage landmark labels are scattered throughout: on the pink mountain range color block to the left, a small black arrow-shaped label is overprinted containing white English lettering reading 'PALM SPRINGS'; near the coastline on the right in a mint green area, another black label pointing toward the ocean reads 'PACIFIC COAST HIGHWAY'. The entire poster is rich in design sensibility, perfectly embodying mid-twentieth-century graphic aesthetics and an upbeat commercial promotional atmosphere.

title: Nine-Grid Chibi Stickers
prompt_cn:
A vertical 3D cute-style sticker collection sheet. The background is a smooth gradient transitioning from pure white at the top to a soft pastel pink-blue at the bottom, creating a relaxed, positive, and playful atmosphere. At the center of the image, 9 chibi-style 3D character stickers are arranged in a 3-row by 3-column grid layout. Each sticker has a distinct thick pure-white outline along its edges, presenting a refined 3D-rendered texture reminiscent of glossy clay figures or exquisite blind-box collectible toys. The stickers' protagonist is a chibi cute little girl with large eyes and slightly blushed round cheeks, who appears in 9 completely different outfits, poses, and expressions across the stickers. Each sticker is accompanied by a three-dimensional speech bubble with a white outline, containing clearly printed black text of commonly used social phrases.

Specific sticker details are as follows:
Top-left: The little girl wears a bright yellow raincoat with its hood up, happily raising both hands high, mouth open in a big laugh. The text in the speech bubble reads 'Good Morning!'.
Top-center: The little girl wears pink pajamas, rubbing one eye with one hand while yawning, with tiny teardrops at the corners of her eyes. The text in the speech bubble reads 'Sleepy...'.
Top-right: The little girl wears a blue sailor outfit, playfully winking one eye and making a scissors hand (V-sign gesture) with her right hand. The text in the speech bubble reads 'OK!'.
Middle-left: The little girl wears a bright red hoodie, cupping both cheeks with her hands, eyes sparkling with highlight stars, mouth agape in a surprised "O" shape. The text in the speech bubble reads 'WOW!'.
Center: The little girl wears mint-green overalls, pressing her palms together at her chin, slightly bowing her head, her gaze innocent and pleading. The text in the speech bubble reads 'Please~'.
Middle-right: The little girl wears a light purple dress, tightly hugging an oversized red three-dimensional heart with both arms, eyes closed with a blissful sweet smile. The text in the speech bubble reads 'Love You!'.
Bottom-left: The little girl wears a gray tracksuit, lying face-down on the ground with a weary expression, a huge blue sweat drop on her forehead. The text in the speech bubble reads 'Tired...'.
Bottom-center: The little girl wears a loose orange chunky-knit sweater, holding a steaming white mug with both hands, smiling leisurely. The text in the speech bubble reads 'Coffee Time'.
Bottom-right: The little girl wears a dark blue nightgown adorned with yellow star patterns, cheerfully waving her right hand with a radiant smile. The text in the speech bubble reads

title: Floral Perfume Luxury Photography
prompt_cn:
A high-end, luxurious commercial product photography image in a vertical portrait composition. At the center of the frame sits an exquisite perfume bottle, placed steadily atop a pure white cylindrical marble pedestal. Draped across the surface of the pedestal is a piece of champagne-colored silk, which cascades elegantly over the pedestal's edges with soft, lustrous folds. The perfume bottle is crafted from crystal-clear, weighty glass, revealing the pale pink perfume liquid within, and is topped with a smooth rose-gold cylindrical cap. Printed clearly in rose-gold text at the center of the bottle, from top to bottom, are the uppercase letters 'LUMINESCENCE', followed by the smaller text 'EAU DE PARFUM' below, and 'PARIS' centered at the bottom.

Surrounding the perfume bottle and marble pedestal, clusters of softly colored flowers are artfully arranged at varying heights, primarily consisting of pale peach-colored lisianthus, soft pink peonies, and ivory-white roses. The color palette of these flowers forms a gentle pastel tonal scheme that perfectly echoes and complements the pale pink and rose-gold tones of the perfume bottle, greatly enhancing the noble quality of the image. The flowers extend naturally along the vertical space, with some delicate petals gently resting on the edges of the champagne silk and marble pedestal, enriching the layering of the composition.

Soft natural light pours in from the upper left of the frame, penetrating the glass bottle to create captivating highlights and refractions, while casting delicate, soft shadows on the silk and flower petals. The image employs a shallow depth-of-field effect, with petals close to the lens in the foreground and flowers in the distant background rendered in a soft, beautifully blurred bokeh, ensuring that the perfume bottle and brand text at the visual center appear supremely sharp and crisp. The overall presentation achieves a premium luxury advertising photography style with an exceptionally high sense of 3D photorealism.

The image employs a shallow depth-of-field effect, with petals close to the lens in the foreground and flowers in the distant background rendered in a soft, beautifully blurred bokeh, ensuring that the perfume bottle and brand text at the visual center appear supremely sharp and crisp. The overall presentation achieves a premium luxury advertising photography style with an exceptionally high sense of 3D photorealism.

title: Through the Dream Labyrinth
prompt_cn:
A horizontally composed fairy tale storybook illustration, employing a rear-side tracking perspective with a strong sense of speed and dynamism. The main subject is a young boy wearing loose blue-and-white striped pajamas, sprinting at full speed through a fantastical space. The boy's body leans dramatically forward, with his long, pointed nightcap and the edges of his clothing fluttering violently backward in the wind. His right hand tightly grips a vintage brass lantern that emits a bright glow. As he runs, a long trail of countless shimmering golden star dust and luminous particles streams behind the lantern and his body.

The boy dashes through a floating labyrinth composed of dreamscape elements. Scattered throughout the frame and into its depths, various doors float at staggered heights: on the right side, a heavy mahogany door stands half-open with blinding white light piercing through the gap; in the upper left, an arched stone door entwined with glowing vines hovers in mid-air; further in the distance, several small colorful wooden doors of varying sizes can be seen. Clocks of various forms are scattered throughout the space—there are enormous pocket watches with surfaces warped and distorted as if melting, as well as antique grandfather clocks suspended in mid-air with scrambled dial numbers. Materialized "whispers" in the air take the form of glowing, semi-transparent ribbons and scraps of paper swirling around the boy. On the ribbons, glowing italicized English words are clearly visible: 'Wake up', 'Hurry', and 'Follow the light'.

The dominant color palette of the scene consists of deep indigo blue and warm amber gold. The background is an unfathomably deep indigo-blue dreamscape void, while the lantern's glow, the starlight trail, the clock hands, and the glowing text ribbons all present a bright amber gold, creating a visually striking contrast between cool and warm tones. The overall painting style has a quintessential watercolor fairy tale illustration quality, with natural color transitions and soft, dreamlike lighting, fully conveying a whimsical, wondrous atmosphere along with a fast-paced sense of urgency.

title: Chengdu Travel Map
prompt_cn:
A vertical hand-drawn travel map illustration. The background is a sheet of parchment with an aged, vintage texture, rendered in a Studio Ghibli art settei (art collection) style that blends watercolor washes and stains with pen-and-wash techniques. The overall color palette is warm, vibrant, and full of a lived-in atmosphere. The map employs an organic, free-flowing isometric perspective, eschewing rigid grid layouts in favor of a whimsical aesthetic.

At the top of the image, a gracefully folding ribbon is drawn, with the main title '成都慢行图' (Chengdu Slow Travel Map) written in the center of the ribbon in elegant, naturally imperfect hand-written running regular script (xingkai) calligraphy. Scattered throughout the map are exquisitely cute miniature buildings and landmark icons: several adorably chubby miniature pandas in a bamboo forest, with '熊猫基地' (Panda Base) hand-written at a playful, slightly tilted angle beside them; rows of delicate miniature red lanterns and traditional street lanes with '锦里' (Jinli) written at a tilted angle; traditional courtyards of dark-gray brick and gray tile with '宽窄巷子' (Wide and Narrow Alleys) written at a tilt; ancient buildings surrounded by red walls with '武侯祠' (Wuhou Shrine) written at a tilt; thatched cottages nestled among bamboo groves with '杜甫草堂' (Du Fu Thatched Cottage) written at a tilt; a miniature teahouse with bamboo chairs and square tables with '人民公园' (People's Park) written beside it. The typography of all landmark labels is organic and fluid, naturally tilting along the forms of the buildings, with no rigid horizontal lines.

A stylized blue water ribbon meanders through the entire map, representing the Jinjiang River. Between the water ripple textures, the characters '锦江' (Jinjiang) are elegantly written along the curved path, perfectly conforming to the river's bends. The map is also dotted with hand-drawn annotations: a tiny red chili pepper icon with '吃火锅!' (Eat hotpot!) written beside it; a small steaming teacup icon with '喝茶咯!' (Let's drink tea!) written beside it; in the upper part of the image, a cloud outline sketched with hand-drawn lines, with '锦江区' (Jinjiang District) written inside the cloud.

In the lower-left corner, a legend box with a hand-drawn irregular border is drawn, containing small icons arranged with their corresponding hand-written labels: a miniature teacup corresponding to '茶馆' (Teahouse), a panda face corresponding to '熊猫' (Panda), and a temple roof corresponding to '古迹' (Historic Site). At the lower-right edge, a red square seal stamp with the texture of a hand-carved zhuanke (seal carving) is affixed, bearing the character '蓉' (Rong, the abbreviation for Chengdu), with the red clay seal impression slightly overlapping the edges of the map. All text throughout the image exhibits the running regular script (xingkai) texture as if written by the same pen, seamlessly blending with the soft watercolor washes and the confident, lively pen lines.

title: Outdoor Half-Body Portrait Photography
prompt_cn: A high-resolution outdoor portrait photograph in a wide horizontal composition. The main subject is a young East Asian woman, captured in a half-body close-up from the waist up. She wears a bright, joyful smile with her mouth slightly open, revealing neat, white upper teeth, her expression natural and vivid. She has fair, smooth skin, bright black upturned eyes, a delicate nose, and lips in a natural soft pink tone. Her hair is dark, thick, and slightly wavy, flowing long, with a pair of white-framed round sunglasses pushed up on top of her head. She is wearing a red, form-fitting, wide-neckline sleeveless cropped tank top, the hem cut slightly short, subtly exposing a hint of her flat midriff and navel. Around her neck, she wears a delicate silver fine chain with a small cross pendant; on her left shoulder, a black strap from a backpack or crossbody bag is clearly visible. Her right hand is raised in front of her, fingers slender and painted with light-colored nail polish, the fingertips pinching a vivid, glossy red spherical object resembling a cherry or lollipop. The subject is situated on a sunny city street, with the background featuring a horizontally extending reddish-brown brick building whose wall is lined with repeating vertical architectural columns or pilasters, topped with light-colored capitals. Strong direct sunlight casts sharp, well-defined dark shadows on the subject and the brick wall. Beneath the subject's feet is a sunlit sidewalk paved with light-colored tiles. The overall image is warm and brightly lit, with crisp and sharp details, vibrant colors, and an atmosphere brimming with energetic, joyful summer vibes.

title: Panel Comic Manuscript
prompt_cn:
A horizontal black-and-white Japanese manga panel manuscript, rendered in the raw draft style of *Kimetsu no Yaiba* (*Demon Slayer*). The image is dominated by rough, tension-filled pencil and pen line art with strong hand-drawn traces, incompletely erased structural guidelines, and hasty hatching shadows. The page is divided from right to left into three irregular panel frames.

The first panel in the upper right is a character close-up. The main subject is Kamado Tanjiro's eyes and forehead—his brows are tightly furrowed, his gaze resolute, and the scar on his left forehead is clearly visible. The edges of the figure have messy hand-drawn shading. Beside him is an irregularly shaped elliptical speech bubble with clearly written Chinese text inside: '就算拼尽全力，我也要斩断这份悲伤！' (Even if I exhaust all my strength, I will sever this sorrow!)

The second panel in the upper left depicts a ferocious demon. The demon emerges halfway from shadowy, snow-covered ground with sparse dead branches, its face covered with multiple eyes of varying sizes, its mouth agape and full of sharp fangs. The background is filled with dense, sketch-textured radial speed lines. Beside the demon is a string of exaggerated hand-written onomatopoeia: '唰！' (Swoosh!), connected above to an explosion-shaped speech bubble with spiked edges, containing the text: '哈哈哈，就凭你这小鬼？' (Hahaha, you think a brat like you can stop me?)

Below is a wide panel spanning the entire page width, depicting an extremely dynamic combat action. Tanjiro grips his Nichirin Blade tightly with both hands, his body lunging far forward, executing a powerful horizontal slash. Surrounding the blade are water-flow special effects rendered with rough, continuous brushstrokes, with the water dynamics expressed through fluid spiral lines and splashing water droplet sketches. On the right side of the image is a long, narrow narration box reading: '水之呼吸，壹之型……' (Water Breathing, First Form...), and at the leading edge of the blade's slashing trajectory, the technique name is written in enormous, powerful bold characters: '水面斩击！' (Water Surface Slash!)

The overall composition is tight, with no color fill whatsoever—light, shadow, and volume are conveyed solely through the density of black-and-white linework, preserving the strong atmosphere of a manga panel rough draft and intense visual impact.

title: Anime to Real Life
prompt_cn:
This is a 16:9 aspect ratio side-by-side comparison image, showcasing the visual effect of a "1:1 anime-to-real-person" transformation of an anime character. The image is vertically bisected into left and right halves by a thin centered white line.

The left half is rendered in an authentic nijigen Japanese anime style, with glowing white text labeled '2D原画' (2D Original Art) in the upper-left corner. The main subject is a cyberpunk-style girl with silver blunt-bangs short hair and a streak of purple hair at the left temple. The character wears a black techwear leather jacket with glowing bright blue lines at the collar, and a metal choker around her neck. She carries a katana emitting neon pink luminescence over her right shoulder, staring coolly straight ahead. The background is a hand-drawn style cyberpunk rainy night street, blurred with bokeh, dotted with indistinct red and blue neon signs.

The right half is a flawless photorealistic live-action recreation, with white text labeled '真人实拍' (Live-Action Photography) in the upper-right corner. The real-life model on the right perfectly replicates the left-side character's facial features, hairstyle, outfit styling, and pose, achieving precise 1:1 alignment in proportion and composition. The model's skin exhibits extremely realistic texture and sheen, with fine pores, three-dimensional facial shadows, and a wet gleam from raindrops clearly visible. The silver-and-purple hair displays authentic hair texture and light scattering, while the black techwear leather jacket presents premium leather creases, material texture, and sharp reflections off metal zippers. The glowing katana on the shoulder casts realistic pink ambient light, naturally illuminating the model's right cheek and hair strands. The background is similarly a blurred cyberpunk street, but transformed into a genuine photographic wide-aperture depth-of-field effect, with raindrops forming lifelike bokeh orbs in front of the lens.

The overall image features strong light-and-shadow contrast, with a color palette dominated by cool blue and neon pink. The flat cel-shading coloring on the left and the extremely realistic physically-based lighting rendering on the right create a striking visual impact.

title: Young Asian Girl Sitting in a Concrete Courtyard
prompt_cn: A hyper-realistic high-angle candid photograph. The image adopts a 16:9 wide-format composition, presenting a natural and casual everyday scene. At the visual center is a young Asian girl, crouching and sitting in a cement courtyard with a rough texture and slight mottling. The girl is turned sideways, looking back over her shoulder with her gaze slightly upward, making eye contact with the camera. Her facial details are extremely lifelike—her skin is porcelain-white and delicate, radiating a natural soft glow; her lips are closed with a shy, subtle smile at the corners of her mouth, and her large, bright round eyes paired with prominent aegyo-sal (charming under-eye fat) accentuate her playful and adorable expression. She wears a sage green knitted open-back long-sleeve top, with the soft knit texture clearly visible and the long sleeves naturally draping down to cover most of her palms; on the bottom, she pairs it with light blue denim shorts, her bare feet in a pair of tan flat sandals. One of the girl's arms stretches outward, teasing a ginger-colored cat beside her; the cat has a slender leash tied around its neck, with fluffy fur in a warm tone. On the other side of the frame, a rustic wooden table is placed, draped with a pink ethnic-style tablecloth featuring intricate geometric patterns and fringed edges. The overall lighting is soft and bright, with a harmonious color palette—sage green, ginger, pink, and the gray cement ground create rich visual layers. The image possesses 8K-resolution-level extreme clarity, faithfully reproducing every detail from the yarn fibers of the knit sweater, the skin texture of the subject, to each individual strand of the cat's fur, brimming with a sense of everyday life and the dynamic beauty of a candid capture.

title: Statue of Liberty AR Data Overlay
prompt_cn:
A realistic wide-angle landscape photograph with an overlaid layer of white hand-drawn style augmented reality (AR) technical information. The image uses a vertical (portrait) composition, with the majestic Statue of Liberty standing prominently in the center. Behind the statue extends the expansive New York City skyline and the shimmering waters of the harbor. The ambient lighting is bright outdoor daylight, with true-to-life natural colors and a sharp, crisp image.

Superimposed over the realistic landscape are pure white engineering-blueprint-style data analysis graphics, rendered in an advanced technical overlay style reminiscent of F1 race broadcast telemetry graphics. Key parts of the statue are marked with white, hand-drawn-textured rough leader lines: one leader line points to the raised torch, with a handwritten-style label 'Torch' at its end; another leader line points to the crown on the head, labeled 'Crown Rays'; a third leader line points to the statue's torso, labeled 'Copper Shell.'

On one side of the statue, a set of large vertical dimension measurement arrows is drawn, starting from the ground pedestal and terminating at the very top of the torch, with the total height data annotated in handwritten script beside it: 'Total Height: 305 ft 1 in.' Additionally, small white wireframe icons float in mid-air: a miniature anemometer icon with airflow lines annotated with wind load data 'Wind Load: 50 mph,' and another icon displaying a geometric microstructure annotated with the material composition 'Material Composition: Copper & Iron.' The overall visual seamlessly merges the lifelike urban natural scenery with precise structural engineering analysis.

title: Vintage Canvas Shoe Deconstruction Flat Lay
prompt_cn:
A product teardown flat-lay photograph. On a light gray matte seamless surface, the individual cut pieces and components constituting a classic vintage canvas sneaker are neatly laid out flat. The image is shot from a top-down view using a knolling composition, with all parts maintaining even and precise spacing between them, spread horizontally to suit a wide-format frame.

The upper portion of the image displays the sole components: a piece of off-white rubber outsole, clearly showing the wavy anti-slip tread pattern on its underside; beside it is a long white rubber foxing strip (binding tape) with an extremely fine black accent line along its edge, naturally presenting a gentle arcing curve.

The central portion of the image features the main fabric cut pieces arranged in the middle: two pieces of gray coarse twill canvas upper panels, each displaying the streamlined contour of the left and right sides of the shoe upper, with pre-punched stitch holes clearly visible along the edges of the cut pieces; placed between the two upper panels is a semi-circular white matte rubber toe cap; immediately adjacent to the uppers, two slender gray canvas eyelet strips are laid flat, each inset with eight shiny silver metal eyelets.

The lower portion of the image displays the accessories and internal structures: a slender gray canvas tongue; an off-white foam insole with an ergonomic arch support design, featuring black retro bold English lettering 'VINTAGE' printed at the heel area with 'FOOTWEAR' directly beneath it; two pure white cotton laces coiled extremely neatly into two symmetrical oval loops; scattered nearby are two small crescent-shaped canvas reinforcement pieces for the heel counter, as well as a square white fabric shoe label clearly printed with the black sans-serif text 'SIZE 42' and slightly smaller text '100% COTTON' below it.

The lighting employs even, soft overhead diffused illumination, eliminating harsh shadows, so that the texture of every material — the rough fibers of the canvas, the slightly tacky surface of the rubber, the specular highlights of the metal — is rendered with utmost fidelity. The overall color tone is gentle, neutral with a cool bias, presenting a minimalist aesthetic combined with the rigorous craftsmanship of industrial shoemaking, with the image possessing extremely high clarity and sharpness.

The upper portion of the image displays the sole components: a piece of off-white rubber outsole, clearly showing the wavy anti-slip tread pattern on its underside; beside it is a long white rubber foxing strip (binding tape) with an extremely fine black accent line along its edge, naturally presenting a gentle arcing curve.

The central portion of the image features the main fabric cut pieces arranged in the middle: two pieces of gray coarse twill canvas upper panels, each displaying the streamlined contour of the left and right sides of the shoe upper, with pre-punched stitch holes clearly visible along the edges of the cut pieces; placed between the two upper panels is a semi-circular white matte rubber toe cap; immediately adjacent to the uppers, two slender gray canvas eyelet strips are laid flat, each inset with eight shiny silver metal eyelets.

title: Doodle-Style Fat Orange Cat Fun Illustration
prompt_cn: A doodle-style horizontal illustration. The main subject is a humorously exaggerated fat orange tabby cat. The cat's body is drawn as a massive irregular circle, while its four limbs and tail are stick-thin and bent like matchsticks, creating a strong proportional contrast and comedic effect. The cat's face sports an oversized pair of crooked black-framed sunglasses, and its mouth is drawn as a casual wavy line, appearing lazy and impatient. It is sitting on a wobbly, extremely tiny three-legged wooden stool, its two small paws clutching an irregular bright-blue mug larger than its own head. A few thick black lines coiling like springs rise from the rim of the mug, representing wafting steam. The overall artwork employs naïve, crude linework with rough, casual contour edges, carrying the texture of hand-drawn marker illustrations. The background features a clean off-white paper texture, and in the broad open spaces on either side of the orange cat, a few black spiral lines, asymmetrical four-pointed star patterns, and several exaggeratedly enlarged coffee beans are casually scattered. In the upper-right corner of the image, a line of black uppercase English letters is scrawled in rough handwritten doodle lettering: 'NEED COFFEE!', with letters varying in size and arranged crookedly, perfectly matching the overall naïve and humorous style.

title: Doodle-Style Cat Skateboarding Illustration
prompt_cn:
A hand-drawn doodle-style illustration in horizontal composition. At the center of the image is a humorously exaggerated fat cat. The cat's body is extremely enlarged, presenting an irregularly shaped giant elliptical blob, while its four limbs are drawn extremely short and uneven in thickness, awkwardly standing on a ridiculously tiny skateboard with wobbly, crooked lines. The cat's facial expression is comical—its eyes consist of two circles of mismatched sizes with asymmetrically placed pupils, its mouth is a casual wavy line, and several whiskers of varying lengths jut out in disorderly directions from both cheeks. Its tail curls upward like a spring, standing erect behind its body.

The linework exhibits a strong sense of childlike naïveté, resembling doodles casually drawn with crayons or thick markers, with contour lines that are intermittent, not fully closed, and uneven in thickness. The skateboard wheels are irregular polygons, and beneath the skateboard and to its left-rear, several simple parallel rough short lines and splattered ink dots are drawn to suggest the sense of forward-gliding speed. Above and to the upper right of the cat's head, the English word 'Wheee!' is written in distorted, rough handwriting, with letters varying in size and arranged at staggered heights.

The entire background is largely left blank, with only a cloud of exaggerated shape drawn in messy spiraling scribble lines in the upper-left area of the image. The overall color palette is dominated by rough black linework, with a few patches of orange-yellow color casually smeared onto the cat's body, completely exceeding the black contour lines, and the skateboard deck is colored in bright green. Through extremely disproportionate shape exaggeration and crude, innocent brushstrokes, the image creates a lighthearted and humorous visual effect.

title: Home Light & Shadow Triptych
prompt_cn: A composite photo of continuous portrait photography, with the frame divided into three horizontally equal-width panels arranged vertically from top to bottom. The background is an IKEA-style interior space filled with a sense of everyday life and warm ambiance; the blurred rear reveals a kitchen with light-colored countertops, wooden cabinets, minimalist warm-toned pendant lights, and various household items, all bathed in soft natural light. The overall color tone leans cool white, with a Japanese-style film-like soft-focus filter quality and a fresh, gentle visual effect. Light falls evenly from the front-side, producing no strong shadows in the frame—only extremely subtle volumetric shadows along the cheeks and bridge of the nose, rendering the skin texture with delicate, natural reflections and luster. The subject across all three panels is the same young woman wearing a pale gray-blue camisole top with slender straps; the soft, body-hugging fabric harmonizes with the low-saturation background palette, casting gentle highlights under the light that naturally accentuate her body contours. Her hair falls loosely over her shoulders with a slight fluffiness and airy quality, the wispy edge strands revealing soft, layered light. Her facial proportions are balanced: slightly large eyes with a soft eye shape and subtly extended outer corners, conveying a strong sense of engagement; a straight, naturally slender nose bridge; and full lips wearing light pink lipstick. In the top first panel, the subject faces the camera straight-on with naturally relaxed shoulders, a cute and playful expression, blowing a flying kiss toward the lens with one hand raised to lightly touch her slightly pouted lips. In the middle second panel, her body rotates slightly to the side, her head tilts gently, and her soft gaze rests on the camera; her lips are naturally closed in a transitional instant just before a smile emerges, carrying a subtle emotional undertone. In the bottom third panel, her posture is more relaxed and at ease, displaying a warm and bright smile with hair casually falling, presenting a natural, authentic, and completely unguarded moment of relaxation as if on a sunny afternoon or just after waking in the early morning.

title: Claymation Sci-Fi Movie Poster
prompt_cn:
A widescreen sci-fi adventure movie poster. The overall image presents an extremely realistic claymation style. All characters, objects, and environmental elements in the scene appear as handcrafted clay models, with clearly visible fingerprint impressions on their surfaces, soft rounded edges, and subtle imperfections inherent to handmade craftsmanship, as if captured with a macro lens as a real photograph on a miniature stop-motion animation set.

Standing at the center of the frame is a retro astronaut, whose spacesuit is shaped from white and orange clay pieces joined together, with natural wrinkles and slight pinch marks at the joints, and the helmet's transparent visor reflecting the set lighting. Beside the astronaut is a cylindrical silver-gray clay robot with a single glowing blue clay eye, its seam lines and irregular edges clearly visible on the body.

The background is a miniature model set of an alien wilderness. The ground is laid with rough reddish-brown clay, its surface covered with craters and the scratches and granular texture left by sculpting tools. The distant night sky backdrop is deep purple, dotted with small white clay stars, and a massive planet hangs in the sky, formed by kneading yellow and red clay together, displaying marble-like swirling color patterns. The lighting layout simulates real studio spotlights, with rim lighting from the side-back delineating the three-dimensionality of the characters and terrain, casting soft physical shadows that perfectly highlight the authentic material quality and substantial weight of the clay.

Printed clearly at the very top of the poster is a white tagline: 'BEYOND THE STARS, A NEW ADVENTURE BEGINS.' At the visual center of the bottom of the frame is the large three-dimensional movie title: 'COSMIC QUEST,' with the letters exhibiting a handcrafted yellow clay texture—bold, dimensional, and with a naturally slight unevenness. At the very bottom of the poster is a smaller line of white credits: 'A CLAYMATION FILM DIRECTED BY JOHN DOE PRODUCED BY JANE SMITH.'

A widescreen sci-fi adventure movie poster. The overall image presents an extremely realistic claymation style. title: Korean-Style Street Female Close-Up Portrait
prompt_cn: A hyper-realistic, high-quality close-up portrait photograph in landscape orientation. At the center of the frame is a young woman embodying Korean street fashion and modern chic. She has dark, voluminous long hair, meticulously braided into two high, artistically styled plaits that fall naturally above her ears. A few loose strands are casually secured by several uniquely shaped matte brown accent hair clips, while other wispy strands fall freely, artfully framing her cheeks. She wears a halter-neck top with a drawstring tie design. Perched on her nose bridge is a pair of thick-framed brown cat-eye glasses, deliberately pulled slightly low to reveal her soft hazel eyes. Her makeup is refined and artistic: brown artistic eyeliner, dewy peach-toned blush, soft warm-toned eyeshadow blended around the eyes, delicate pearlescent shimmer and glitter accenting the under-eye area and cheeks, lips coated in a glossy, plump red lip gloss, and skin presenting a naturally luminous, dewy "glass skin" finish, with facial pores and skin texture rendered in exquisite detail under ultra-high resolution. The woman's head is slightly tilted, her gaze relaxed yet confident as she looks directly into the camera, posing with one hand gently cradling her cheek. The background is a minimalist indoor studio setting; the landscape format allows generous beige and brown-toned background space on both sides of the subject, creating an elevated sense of negative space. In terms of lighting, a bright, direct light from the front illuminates the subject's face and body, akin to a camera flash fired head-on, dramatically accentuating the material textures of her skin, hair, makeup glitter, and clothing; simultaneously, soft studio fill lighting accompanies in the background. The overall image conveys a cinematic quality with a warm beige-brown tone, and the perspective of an 85mm lens delivers striking visual impact reminiscent of a Korean fashion magazine editorial spread.

title: Underwater Half-Face Close-Up Portrait
prompt_cn: A vertically composed underwater macro photography close-up portrait, tightly cropped to reveal only the left half of a young woman's face. Her face is fully submerged in crystal-clear water, with fair skin rendered in extremely high hyperrealistic textural detail. The focal point lands precisely on her left eye—clear and bright, with a calm and serene gaze that nonetheless conveys a profound and intense sense of staring. Light refracts through the water surface, casting intricate and mesmerizing caustic reflections and fluid-like dappled ripples of light across her skin, where crisp, bright highlights interweave with cinematically soft shadows. Utilizing a shallow depth of field, the foreground and background feature blurred, suspended fine water droplets and delicate bubbles, adding a strong sense of spatial dimensionality. Along the right edge of the frame, dark strands of hair are faintly visible, drifting and unfurling naturally in the water like ribbons. No clothing is visible in the frame; the composition focuses purely on the interplay of water, light, and the subject's skin. The overall color tone is clear and translucent, creating a surreal, dreamlike, ethereal, and tranquil visual atmosphere.

title: Girl Making a Heart with Hands
prompt_cn:
A high-resolution extreme close-up portrait photograph with a film-like soft quality, in vertical composition. The subject is a young East Asian woman whose face—eyes, nose, and lips—fills nearly the entire frame, with no clothing or background visible. Her head is slightly tilted, and her hands are held directly in front of the lens, forming a clear heart-shaped hand gesture as a foreground element.

She has straight black hair, with a few stray strands naturally falling across her face and the corners of her eyes. Her skin is smooth with a naturally translucent, luminous glow. Her eyebrows have a naturally soft-arched shape. She has dark brown almond-shaped eyes, with eye makeup comprising delicate eyeliner, individually defined lashes, and a soft pearlescent shimmer on the eyelids. Her expression is playful and lively: one eye is cheekily closed in a wink while the other is softly open, with a small beauty mark (teardrop mole) clearly visible beneath the left eye. Her full lips are coated in a bright pink mirror-gloss lip glaze, pursed in a pouty kiss expression. No jewelry or accessories are visible in the frame, and the background is entirely obscured due to the extreme close-up framing.

The lighting is soft diffused light with even overall illumination, minimal facial shadows, and a naturally delicate highlight quality on the skin. The lens angle is a straight-on, eye-level shot with an extremely shallow depth of field; the focus falls sharply on her open eye and pouted lips, while her hands forming the heart shape in front of her face carry a natural, slight bokeh effect. The overall image conveys a cute, playful, intimate, and highly expressive aesthetic atmosphere.

title: Hand-Drawn Fashion Style Concept Breakdown
prompt_cn:
A hand-drawn illustration-style fashion concept breakdown sheet in portrait orientation. The background features a soft beige parchment paper texture with subtle paper fiber details, evoking the quality of a high-end design sketchbook. The overall lighting is clean with soft shadows, and the image presents a high-quality 2D fashion magazine illustration aesthetic, perfectly balancing sophistication with a subtly sensual atmosphere.

At the center of the composition is a full-body illustration of a fashionable female character. Her pose is natural yet dynamic, with her weight on her right leg, left hand casually tucked into a trouser pocket, and right hand slightly raised to brush aside the wavy long hair near her ear, exuding confident charm. She wears a sharply tailored khaki mid-length belted trench coat over a black semi-sheer botanical floral lace fitted base layer that subtly reveals skin texture beneath; on the lower half, high-waisted slim-fit matte leather pants that outline smooth leg contours, and black pointed-toe stiletto ankle boots.

Surrounding the central figure are structured breakdown panels and handwritten annotations distributed around the periphery, with all annotation text connected to corresponding areas by thin lines, rendered in dark gray handwritten font, bilingual in Chinese and English.

The upper left corner features an expression board area containing four side-by-side head close-ups:
The first expression is calm and confident with slightly upturned corners of the mouth, annotated: 'Neutral / 中性.'
The second expression shows slightly flushed cheeks with a slightly downcast gaze, annotated: 'Shy / 害羞.'
The third expression has widened eyes and slightly parted lips, annotated: 'Surprised / 惊讶.'
The fourth expression features a sharp gaze with slightly furrowed brows, annotated: 'Focused / 专注.'

The left side and lower left corner display layered clothing and fabric close-ups:
A circular magnified view shows the trench coat cuff's buckle strap and stitching, annotated: 'Gabardine fabric / 华达呢面料.'
A micro-magnification circle shows the delicate lace mesh and floral pattern of the inner base layer, annotated: 'Soft lace with floral pattern / 柔软植物纹蕾丝.'
A rectangular frame shows the subtle sheen and surface undulation of the leather pants, annotated: 'Matte leather / 哑光皮革.'
A hand close-up displays slender fingers wearing silver knuckle rings, annotated: 'Silver ring details / 银质戒指细节.'

The upper right side features a skin texture close-up:
Displaying the smooth skin shadows of the shoulder, neck, and collarbone area, annotated: 'Sk

title: Autumn Fashion Girl Hand-Drawn Calendar
prompt_cn: This is a cute and fashionable calendar illustration in portrait ratio (9:16), presenting an overall fresh and bright watercolor hand-drawn texture with vivid yet soft colors. The background is a pure white minimalist space without any superfluous decorative elements, fully highlighting the main character and text content. Positioned slightly right of center is a young, fashionable female character with slightly exaggerated body proportions—a somewhat oversized head, a slender waist, large dewy eyes, and round rosy cheeks, wearing a radiant smile. Her pose is lively and playful: her left hand is raised beside her cheek making a "V" sign, while her right hand gently holds a bag strap. To reflect the localized characteristics and seasonal feel of autumn in Beijing, the character wears a bright yellow autumn knit cardigan over a white turtleneck sweater, paired with a red plaid mini skirt. On her head she wears a white fluffy knitted beret, on the bridge of her nose sits a pair of vintage round gold-rimmed glasses, around her neck is tied a silk scarf printed with an abstract Great Wall pattern, and she carries a small red crossbody bag adorned with a tanghulu (candied hawthorn) motif. The text layout is neat and well-balanced with even white space. At the top center of the image is the large and prominent Gregorian calendar date number '24'. Directly below '24' is the English month 'OCTOBER', and below the English month is the year '2024'. To reflect the localized characteristics and seasonal feel of autumn in Beijing, the character wears a bright yellow autumn knit cardigan over a white turtleneck sweater, paired with a red plaid mini skirt. On her head she wears a white fluffy knitted beret, on the bridge of her nose sits a pair of vintage round gold-rimmed glasses, around her neck is tied a silk scarf printed with an abstract Great Wall pattern, and she carries a small red crossbody bag adorned with a tanghulu (candied hawthorn) motif.
