title: Dynamic City Weather Card
prompt_cn: A portrait-ratio 3D miniature cartoon-style isometric rendering that incorporates UI interface elements. The scene is viewed from a 45-degree overhead angle with a centered, minimalist composition against a soft, pure, light pale blue solid-color background, creating an overall fresh and soothing visual style. At the center of the image is a set of exquisitely detailed miniature models of Shanghai's iconic landmark buildings, primarily including the Oriental Pearl TV Tower with reflective metallic and glass sphere textures, the Shanghai Tower in its gracefully spiraling upward form, the distinctively shaped Shanghai World Financial Center, and the Jin Mao Tower. The architectural models are precisely modeled with realistic PBR materials, showcasing soft and refined textures with lifelike light and shadow reflections. The scene is set in partly cloudy turning sunny weather, with weather elements creatively rendered in 3D and integrated into the cityscape: several soft, fluffy, three-dimensional white cartoon clouds float and intersperse among the skyscrapers, with some cloud layers wrapping around the midsections of the towers. Soft, realistic sunlight cascades from the upper side, gilding the edges of buildings and clouds with warm highlights and casting gentle shadows on the miniature Huangpu River surface and between buildings, creating an immersive, dynamically interactive atmosphere. Centered at the top of the image, neatly typeset weather UI information floats with no background behind the text and icons, slightly overlapping with the spires of the buildings below. At the very top is the Chinese city name in large font: '上海' (Shanghai); directly below is a prominent, refined 3D weather icon showing a round golden sun half-hidden behind a white cloud; immediately below the icon is the temperature range text in medium font: '18°C - 24°C'; at the very bottom is the date text in extra-small font: '10月24日 星期四' (October 24, Thursday). All text uses a clear sans-serif typeface with clean, unified typography.

title: Four Seasons Change Infographic
prompt_cn:
This is a landscape-format infographic poster designed for third-grade elementary students. Its overall visual style imitates Eric Carle's iconic hand-painted tissue paper collage art style. The image is filled with vivid color overlays, prominent brushstroke textures, and irregular paper-edge cutouts as if trimmed with scissors, brimming with childlike charm and a handmade feel. The background has an off-white paper texture with a subtle grainy quality.

Centered at the very top of the poster are eye-catching collage-style English letters. The main title in large bold type reads 'THE FOUR SEASONS IN TORONTO,' with a slightly smaller subtitle 'CANADA' directly beneath it.

The main body of the image is divided horizontally into four side-by-side vertical rectangular panels, each showcasing one season in Toronto, separated by subtle white-space gaps.

The illustrations include several large blue-to-purple gradient raindrops in the sky, a few blooming pink and deep red tulips on the ground below, and tender green grass blade collages with visible brush marks. At the very bottom of the panel are two lines of clear black handwritten English: 'Rain melts the snow. Tulips bloom at High Park!'

The second panel from the left is the summer section: at the top, letters with bright yellow and orange mixed textures spell 'SUMMER.' The central illustration features a huge sun with radial orange-yellow intense brushstrokes, below which is Lake Ontario water rendered with deep blue wave textures. The illustration depicts a tree with a brown wood-grain textured trunk, its canopy composed of large overlapping torn pieces of red, orange, and yellow paper collage. Several distinctively Canadian red maple leaves drift through the air along a few pale blue wind lines. At the bottom it reads: 'Leaves turn red an

title: Dan Dan Noodles Premium Poster
prompt_cn:
A hyper-realistic high-end Chinese noodle restaurant commercial food poster, using a vertical composition with a pure black background. The image has no pedestals or supporting platforms whatsoever; all elements float freely in mid-air. At the visual center of the top of the image, a luxurious-looking title floats, reading '担担面 DAN DAN NOODLES'. The Chinese characters are rendered in a highly expressive handwritten calligraphic brush style, presenting a heavy and three-dimensional 3D sculptural golden metallic texture with delicate brushed metal surface grain, emanating a warm golden luster, reflecting realistic highlights under intense studio lighting, as if pure gold-cast brushstrokes suspended in mid-air.

Below the golden main title, seven deconstructed layers of dan dan noodles are vertically suspended in sequence. All layers are displayed from a 45-degree overhead angle with unified realistic lighting and shadow effects. The first layer is a pile of bright red dried chili flakes and golden Sichuan pepper powder. The second layer consists of naturally scattered pale yellow crushed peanuts and vivid bright green scallion rings. The third layer is coiled and stacked pale yellow handmade alkaline noodles with clear texture, each strand distinctly visible. The fourth layer features scattered yellow ya cai (preserved mustard greens) and emerald green peas. The fifth layer is a transparent glass bowl filled with deep red chili oil soup base, its surface gleaming with an oily sheen and clear reflections, with visible floating chili particles. Layers one through five maintain even, normal spacing between them.

The sixth layer is a larger blank transitional space, with spacing two to three times that of the layers above. This area contains no large ingredients—only finely suspended oil droplets, wisps of rising steam, and tiny falling ingredient fragments, creating ample visual separation and spatial breathing room.

The seventh layer, positioned at the very bottom, is a complete finished bowl of dan dan noodles served in a traditional deep brown ceramic bowl. The bowl perfectly integrates all the ingredients from above: pale yellow noodles coated in glistening bright red chili oil, topped with crushed peanuts, green scallions, ya cai, peas, and red chili flakes. The noodles appear in an appetizing just-tossed state, glossy with oil and emitting faint wisps of steam. The size, proportion, and angle of the finished noodle bowl are completely consistent with the deconstructed ingredients above, with a bright starburst lens flare effect at its lower right corner.

title: Seaside Cinematic Female Portrait
prompt_cn: A close-up portrait photograph in portrait ratio. The main subject is a young woman standing on a beach at dusk. Her dark hair is tousled by the sea breeze, with a few strands casually sweeping across her face. The woman's skin texture is natural and realistic, with a subtle flush and a delicate film grain quality. She wears a white thin spaghetti-strap top on her upper body, paired with denim bottoms. Behind the woman is the deep, dark ocean waves and a moody sky, with soft twilight hues blending across it—interweaving gray-pink, blue-gray, and gentle lavender tones, creating a tranquil ambient atmosphere. The image employs a portrait close-up composition with the focal point concentrated on the woman's face and upper body. The overall visual presents a low-saturation, cool-toned cinematic film style with soft natural dusk lighting and gentle contrast. The image carries a layer of hazy atmosphere and slight film grain, exuding a rich melancholic mood. The image details are extremely lifelike, exhibiting 8K-level ultra-high resolution.

title: Horoscope Fortune Card
prompt_cn:
A literary hand-drawn flat illustration-style horoscope story card. In landscape composition, the image presents a vintage and gentle low-saturation Morandi color palette, with delicate paper texture and colored-pencil edge quality. On the left side of the image is a warm and romantic illustration: a short-haired girl wearing a cotton-linen maxi dress and a literary beret sits beside a vintage wooden desk, cradling a steaming cup of coffee in her hands, quietly gazing up at the sky. Above her head is a deep yet gentle night sky background, dotted with twinkling stars that form a clear Libra constellation line pattern. At the center of the starry sky floats an exquisite hand-drawn golden balance scale, with a miniature sun on one end and a crescent moon on the other, symbolizing inner equilibrium. Surrounding the girl are lush hand-drawn potted plants including Monstera deliciosa and eucalyptus leaves, adding natural vitality.

On the right side of the image is an elegantly typeset horoscope text area, set against a warm oatmeal-colored background, bordered by hand-drawn dashed-line frames and tiny starburst motifs. At the top center is a prominent retro-print large title reading '天秤座今日运势' (Libra Today's Horoscope). Below the title are five information blocks, each preceded by a small icon (star, heart, briefcase, gold coin, four-leaf clover) as a visual guide. The text is in an elegant handwritten typeface, with specific content clearly legible, as follows:
'整体运势：今日运势平稳，保持内心的平衡是关键，适合进行深度的自我探索。' (Overall Fortune: Today's fortune is steady; maintaining inner balance is key, and it is suitable for deep self-exploration.)
'爱情运：感情方面有小惊喜，单身者可能在转角遇到心动，有伴侣者宜安排浪漫晚餐。' (Love Fortune: Small surprises in romance; singles may encounter someone special around the corner, while those in relationships should arrange a romantic dinner.)
'事业运：工作上会有新的灵感迸发，团队合作能让你事半功倍，请大胆表达创意。' (Career Fortune: New inspiration will spark at work; teamwork will help you achieve twice the results with half the effort—express your creativity boldly.)
'财运：偏财运不错，但切忌冲动消费，适合做长线理财规划。' (Wealth Fortune: Windfall luck is good, but avoid impulsive spending; it is suitable for long-term financial planning.)
'幸运色：燕麦色' (Lucky Color: Oatmeal)
'幸运数字：7' (Lucky Number: 7)
The overall layout is well-arranged with staggered elements, richly combining illustrations and text. The hand-drawn lines are fluid and natural, the colors are warm and comfortable, the lighting is soft, and the details are abundant with extremely high clarity, exuding a literary and fresh atmosphere.

title: 3D Pop-Up Book Illustration
prompt_cn: A 3D pop-up book illustration in landscape composition. At the center of the image is a thick hardcover book lying flat and open, with a miniature pop-up scene formed by multiple layers of paper folding and unfolding rising from the pages. The main subject of the scene is a fairytale-like magical forest mushroom house. The mushroom house features a large pale pink paper-sculpted mushroom cap with white polka dots, beneath which is a white house body with visible paper texture, fitted with a half-open arched wood-grain paper door and two small round windows emitting warm yellow light. Around the mushroom house, multiple layers of paper-sculpted elements are arranged in varied heights: a winding cobblestone path in alternating mint green and pure white leads to the front door, flanked by layered pastel mint green paper bushes, pine tree silhouettes of varying heights, a few paper-sculpted little rabbits peeking out from behind the bushes, and butterflies supported in mid-air by thin paper strips as if fluttering. The image uses a soft pastel mint green and pale pink core color palette, exuding an overall handcrafted, whimsical charm. The viewing angle is a slightly tilted overhead perspective, perfectly showcasing the depth of layered paper, spatial dimension, and detailed mechanical structure of the pop-up. Soft light cascades from the side, casting delicate and realistic shadows between the layers of rough-textured paper, greatly enhancing the three-dimensional effect. On the flat left-side bottom page of the open book, a line of English fairytale opening text is clearly printed in black vintage serif font: 'Once upon a time in the magical forest...'.

title: Handheld Product Upload Display
prompt_cn: A minimalist style high-end skincare product commercial photography image. The background of the scene is a beige wall bathed in warm afternoon sunlight, with a fine, soft granular texture and smooth finish, retaining a small amount of natural, minor imperfection textures on the surface. The light exhibits a soft diffused quality, creating a subtle and dreamlike atmosphere. There are no extraneous objects in the frame; the overall color palette consists solely of the natural beige wall color, presenting a minimalist high-end aesthetic. On the horizontally wide-format wall, a clear, elongated, and sharp dark shadow is cast—the silhouette of a human hand gripping a skincare bottle. The shadow contour of the bottle is extremely precise, perfectly rendering the cylindrical bottle body, the flat minimalist cap, the clean edges, and the harmonious proportions. At the center of this dark bottle shadow, clean and crisp pure white typographic text is precisely superimposed, with the spacing, size, and placement of the text perfectly aligned to the contour edges of the shadow, as if directly projected onto the shadow. The text content is clearly legible from top to bottom: the brand name 'LUMIÈRE' at the top, the product name 'HYDRATING SERUM' centered, the ingredient description in smaller font 'HYALURONIC ACID + VITAMIN B5', and the volume indication '30 ml / 1.0 fl oz' at the bottom. The slender and artistically rendered shadow cuts diagonally across the large expanse of white space on the wall, creating a striking contrast of light and dark and a captivating play of light and shadow.

The slender and artistically rendered shadow cuts diagonally across the large expanse of white space on the wall, creating a striking contrast of light and dark and a captivating play of light and shadow.

title: Y2K Night Street Photography Candid
prompt_cn:
A landscape-oriented nighttime street photography shot with a strong early-2000s Y2K aesthetic and raw paparazzi-style candid look. At the center of the frame, a young woman stands beside a vintage metallic public payphone. She has her back to the phone, her body slightly angled, turning her head over her shoulder to look directly into the camera with a cold and detached gaze. The woman wears a fitted black corset top paired with loose, low-rise cargo jeans, both hands tucked into the back pockets of the jeans, her posture casual and rebellious. Her face is clear and realistic with well-defined features, her makeup bearing millennial hallmarks such as thinly arched eyebrows and glossy lip gloss, and her long straight hair has a slightly tousled look.

The background is a nighttime city street. Under the harsh on-camera direct flash, the subject is brightly illuminated, casting sharp, hard-edged black shadows onto the phone booth and the wall behind her. The background falls off rapidly into darkness, producing an extremely high highlight-to-shadow contrast. In the distance, the out-of-focus city nightscape features blurred, elongated streaks of colorful car lights (bokeh spots of red, yellow, and white intermingled), creating a bustling and dynamic urban nighttime atmosphere. In the lower-right corner of the frame, a glowing retro red digital timestamp clearly displays the text '11 05 2001'. The overall image carries a film grain and gritty texture, perfectly replicating the raw visual effect of early digital cameras shooting at night with a strong flash.

title: Poolside Retro Summer Girl
prompt_cn: A high-resolution, realistic photographic portrait in landscape orientation. On a bright, sunny day, a young woman sits at the edge of a swimming pool. She has voluminous long curly hair with a delicate white flower hair clip pinned to one side. She wears a vintage-style two-piece set: the top is a white sleeveless cropped blouse covered in subtle sky-blue floral prints, featuring a prominent sky-blue fold-over collar and a bow at the front; the bottom is a mini skirt with a pattern matching the top. She has a soft expression on her face, gazing directly into the camera. In the background, the expansive and vivid azure pool water shimmers and sparkles under the sunlight, with tropical green foliage rendered in a blurred depth-of-field effect in the distance. The image employs bright and natural cinematic lighting; sunlight creates specular reflections on the water surface and meticulously delineates the texture of the subject's hair strands, facial contours, and the printed details of the fabric, resulting in an overall bright color palette brimming with a fresh, summery atmosphere.

title: Tropical Outdoor Portrait Photography
prompt_cn: A high-quality outdoor natural photograph presenting a bright and fresh tropical vacation portrait style. The frame adopts a 16:9 wide aspect ratio with a slight low-angle close-up perspective. The main subject is a female figure, her body turned slightly to one side. She is raising one arm, with her fingertips gently touching the rustic wooden roof structure above. Her facial features remain natural and authentic, with skin exhibiting a healthy, sun-kissed glow and cheeks bearing a soft, natural blush. She has long, slightly tousled dark hair, with one side tucked behind her ear, adorned with a large white frangipani flower at the temple. Her gaze is soft and filled with curiosity, looking beyond the camera. Around her neck, she wears a delicate gold chain necklace. In terms of clothing, she wears an oversized beige long-sleeved button-up shirt in lightweight fabric, with the top few buttons left undone, revealing a tiny embroidered 'Polo Ralph Lauren' brand logo on the chest; through the open shirt, a cropped animal-print top worn underneath is clearly visible. The subject is situated in a tropical beach hut or a seaside wooden gazebo, with natural-toned wooden beams and a thatched roof spanning across the top of the frame. Thanks to the wide-format composition, the expansive background behind the subject is fully displayed and clearly visible. The background features a stretch of clear, azure ocean beneath a bright sky dotted with scattered white clouds. In the far distance, an extending city skyline and coastal buildings can be clearly discerned. Bright natural sunlight cascades down, creating warm highlights on the subject's skin and clothing. The overall depth of field is sharp, with both the main subject and background remaining crisp. The color tones are vivid and lively, full of coastal vitality, conveying a leisurely, warm, and relaxed tropical vacation atmosphere.

title: Retro Film Night Driving Candid
prompt_cn: A vintage film photography photo in a wide banner aspect ratio. The main subject is a young woman sitting in the passenger seat of a fast-moving vintage car, leaning her upper body back and out through the open car window. She has long brown curly hair that is violently blown backward through the air by the extreme wind, creating a dynamic full of tension. She wears a white off-shoulder knitted top. The background is set on a nighttime city road or highway; due to the car's high speed and the dark environment, the scenery outside the window dissolves into completely blurred, streaked dark trails and warm light bands, with no discernible shapes of any specific buildings or objects. The image employs heavy motion blur and soft focus effects, with the surface covered in prominent vintage film coarse grain texture. The lighting is in a low-light environment, with the woman primarily illuminated by a warm, soft vintage camera flash, interweaving and blending with the trailing, streaked ambient street lights in the background. The overall color tone is dark, and the interplay of light, shadow, and the blurred background collectively creates a dreamy, melancholic, and wind-swept atmospheric visual experience. The wide-format composition reinforces the sense of speed conveyed by the woman leaning out of the car window and the extending light trails in the background.

title: Low-Light Focused Anime Female Portrait
prompt_cn: A hyper-realistic anime-style female portrait illustration in vertical composition. The background is pure black. A narrow spotlight beam with sharp edges focuses on the center of the subject's face, with the surrounding areas rapidly falling off and vanishing into profound darkness, creating intense high-contrast chiaroscuro. The main subject is a woman with long black hair, with a few strands draped across her face, the ends of her hair blending completely into the shadows. She gazes directly at the camera with a mysterious look in her eyes. The fingertips of one hand lightly touch her lips, her posture shy and hesitant. The subject wears a black long-sleeve knitted sweater, with her torso and clothing almost entirely disappearing into the dark shadows, revealing no discernible details. The overall color palette is somber, the atmosphere mysterious and filled with dramatic tension, with the visual focal point concentrated entirely on the illuminated area of the face.

title: Cable Car Casual Sporty Portrait
prompt_cn:
A casual outdoor lifestyle portrait photography shot. The main subject of the image is a woman seated on a bench inside a cable car gondola. The woman wears a warm, gentle smile with relaxed eyes, her head tilted slightly downward while gazing at the camera. She has brown hair that is loosely tousled and slightly disheveled, with natural wispy bangs framing her face on both sides of her cheeks. She is dressed in a light gray casual athletic outfit—the upper half featuring a slim-fit spaghetti-strap crop top, and the lower half a pair of comfortable light gray loose wide-leg sweatpants. On her feet, she wears a pair of white Adidas sneakers with black stripes. On her right wrist, she wears a white smartwatch.

In terms of posture, she is seated sideways on the bench, her body upright yet relaxed, with her shoulders turned slightly toward the camera. Her legs are naturally relaxed and slightly bent, one arm casually resting on her knee, while the other arm gently supports her body to maintain balance.

Regarding the environment and background, through the cable car windows, vibrant natural scenery is visible. The background includes lush green trees, expansive forests, and rolling hills in the distance, with cable car cable lines clearly visible stretching across the sky.

In terms of visuals and composition, the image employs a medium-full shot in vertical composition, with the camera angle presenting a slight low angle, facing the subject directly. The focus is sharply concentrated on the woman, with the background given a slight soft-focus bokeh treatment to emphasize the subject. The lighting is soft natural daylight with warm golden hour tones, sunlight casting a gentle glow on the woman's skin and clothing. The overall color palette is woven from nature's greens, the sky's soft blues, the light gray of her clothing, and warm skin tones, presenting a fresh, relaxed, sunny, and natural atmosphere.

title: Red & Blue Dual-Tone Cinematic Portrait
prompt_cn: A hyper-realistic, cinematic-grade portrait photography work in vertical composition. At the center of the frame is a young woman, presented in a three-quarter profile view with her face tilted slightly upward. She has short black hair, the strands soft with a casually tousled feel. The woman wears a confident smile with a natural gaze, her arms crossed over her chest, dressed in a solid cyan long-sleeve crew-neck shirt. The background is a deep, pure black studio setting. The image exhibits dramatic lighting effects: from the right side, a bright red rim light is cast, precisely outlining the edges of her hair, facial contour, shoulders, and arms on the right; from the left side, a soft cool blue fill light illuminates her left cheek and clothing details. The red and blue dual-tone lighting creates a striking warm-cool contrast on the subject, greatly enhancing the three-dimensionality and cinematic atmosphere of the image. The rendering of the subject's face is extremely detailed, with skin texture, pores, and catchlights in the eyes all clearly and realistically depicted. At the edge corners of the frame, a line of signature letters is clearly visible: 'Shreya Yadav'.

prompt_cn: A vintage-style fashion photography shot in portrait orientation. At the center of the frame stands a young, fashionable woman, leaning against a flat, solid-colored wall. She wears a finely tailored black pinstripe vest paired with matching black pinstripe trousers, her hands casually tucked into her trouser pockets, exuding a confident yet effortless pose. She has voluminous, thick brown hair styled in large, loose waves with soft curls, gently tousled by a light breeze, conveying an ethereal sense of dynamic movement. Strong, high-contrast lighting strikes the figure, casting dramatic, deep, and heavy shadows onto the wall behind her, creating a cinematic visual tension imbued with mystery. The entire image carries a pronounced coarse-grain vintage film texture, and the interplay of light and shadow perfectly evokes a romantic 1990s aesthetic. The composition possesses the quintessential editorial quality of a fashion magazine spread, emanating an atmosphere that is slightly melancholic yet utterly captivating and glamorous.

title: Girl Glancing Back Lazily on Rattan Chair
prompt_cn:
A portrait-orientation indoor portrait photography shot. At the center of the frame is a young woman seated on a light brown rattan sofa, her upper body twisted backward, looking back over her shoulder toward the camera with a friendly, natural smile. She has long dark brown hair, one side pinned back with a simple hair clip. She wears a loose, beige casual short-sleeve T-shirt, with a printed graphic partially visible on the back featuring the uppercase letters 'FRISTON' along with some graphic design elements. On the lower half, she wears light blue washed denim shorts and a pair of white sneakers.

The sofa is fitted with comfortable white cushions. On the floor around the sofa, a few everyday clothing items are casually scattered, creating a relaxed, languid atmosphere rich with authentic, lived-in charm. The background consists of light-colored interior walls.

The shot is framed in a medium view with a slightly elevated eye level. The lighting is soft, warm indoor light, and the overall color palette is dominated by off-white, light denim blue, rattan brown, and white, presenting a cozy warm tone. The photographic style carries a strong documentary and candid snapshot quality, with moderate depth of field and a subtly soft, blurred background. The image bears a hint of subtle film grain, with slightly desaturated colors, exuding the classic charm of film photography.

title: Cinematic Night In-Car Intimate Portrait
prompt_cn:
A cinematic nighttime in-car portrait photography shot in portrait orientation. The main subject is a young woman seated inside a moving car. She leans slightly toward the open car window while her center of gravity remains securely on the car seat, turning her head back to gaze at the camera. Her expression is relaxed and natural, her eyes conveying a sense of intimacy, with a hint of a playful smile at the corners of her lips. Her hair is swept backward by the night wind rushing in through the car window, with strands scattering loosely in mid-air. The facial details of the subject are crisp and lifelike, her skin exhibiting a soft, warm glow. She wears a loose cream-colored knit sweater with the neckline lazily slipping off to one side, revealing a bare shoulder and collarbone, the soft knit texture of the sweater clearly visible.

The camera angle is positioned inside the car, extremely close to the subject, with a tight composition that creates an intense sense of intimacy. The focus is precisely locked on the subject's face and her wind-swept hair, while the edges of the foreground faintly reveal the blurred outline of the car window frame.

Outside the car window lies a dim nighttime road backdrop. The sky displays a deep navy blue, with hazy moonlight diffusing through thin clouds across the horizon. The soft streetlights lining both sides of the road are elongated by the vehicle's rapid movement, transforming into streaks of glowing, desaturated light trails in the background. The overall color palette blends deep navy blue with desaturated cool tones, artfully punctuated by soft pink halos of light. The light-shadow contrast is low, brimming with emotional tension, the entire scene enveloped in a subtle vintage blue-gray cinematic atmosphere, with the image surface overlaid by a layer of soft, dreamlike, fine film grain texture.

title: Winter Forest Retro Film Portrait
prompt_cn: A cinematic 90s vintage film photography portrait. The composition employs a tilted Dutch angle, full of dynamism and visual tension, perfectly utilizing the vertical aspect ratio to convey depth. The subject is a young woman of about 23, leaning in a relaxed posture against a thick tree trunk, holding up a vintage camera in a shooting pose with both hands. She wears a winter-layered oversized flannel plaid shirt over a thick dark knit sweater. Influenced by gravity and the tilted camera angle, her sleek long hair falls naturally to one side. Her demeanor carries a touch of artistry and playfulness, capturing a vivid moment in nature photography. The background is a winter woodland; due to the tilted perspective, the otherwise straight tree trunks behind her form geometrically striking diagonal lines in the frame, further reinforcing the dynamic composition. In terms of lighting, the image presents a richly nostalgic color grading style—bright areas glow with warm orange halos while shadows take on cool blue tones, creating a strong warm-cool color contrast that evokes a serene yet dreamlike atmosphere. The entire image is covered with extremely pronounced, heavy film grain and noise texture, presenting a classic, editorial-style masterpiece of 90s vintage aesthetics.

title: Burgundy Cutout Dress Fashion Editorial
prompt_cn:
A hyper-realistic high-fashion photography editorial. The subject is a Western female model, elegantly reclining on her side on the floor. The model has sleek long straight hair with light, wispy air bangs and flawless skin. On her upper left arm, there is a delicate fine-line floral tattoo—subtle yet clearly visible. She props her head up with the elbow of one hand resting on the floor, her gaze directed straight into the camera, creating intense eye contact and exuding a sensual yet sophisticated fashion aura.

The model wears a deep burgundy semi-sheer halter-neck dress, showcasing intricate knit textures and highly artistic cutout designs, brimming with the luxurious quality of a magazine editorial.

The background is a stylized softly gradient dark velvet drape. The composition is horizontal, and the shallow depth of field from an 85mm lens renders the background in a beautifully soft bokeh, directing the visual focus entirely onto the model.

The lighting employs soft Rembrandt lighting, sculpting dimensional highlights and shadows on the model's face, with the classic inverted triangle light patch formed on one cheek. The overall color palette is rich and deep—the deep burgundy garment contrasts with the fair, luminous skin under refined lighting. The image has extremely high clarity, brimming with the artistic tension of high-end fashion photography.
prompt_en:
A hyper-realistic high-fashion photography editorial. The subject is a Western female model, elegantly reclining on her side on the floor. The model has sleek long straight hair with light, wispy air bangs and flawless skin. On her upper left arm, there is a delicate fine-line floral tattoo—subtle yet clearly visible. She props her head up with the elbow of one hand resting on the floor, her gaze directed straight into the camera, creating intense eye contact and exuding a sensual yet sophisticated fashion aura.

The model wears a deep burgundy semi-sheer halter-neck dress, showcasing intricate knit textures and highly artistic cutout designs, brimming with the luxurious quality of a magazine editorial.

The background is a stylized softly gradient dark velvet drape. The composition is horizontal, and the shallow depth of field from an 85mm lens renders the background in a beautifully soft bokeh, directing the visual focus entirely onto the model.

The lighting employs soft Rembrandt lighting, sculpting dimensional highlights and shadows on the model's face, with the classic inverted triangle light patch formed on one cheek. The overall color palette is rich and deep—the deep burgundy garment contrasts with the fair, luminous skin under refined lighting. The image has extremely high clarity, brimming with the artistic tension of high-end fashion photography.

title: Hiker Overlooking the Rocky Mountains
prompt_cn: A slightly blurry vertical landscape photograph with the quality of an early 2006 digital camera. In the lower-center of the frame, a hiker stands with their back to the camera on a rugged dirt trail, gazing into the distance. The hiker carries a large dark blue mountaineering backpack with a gray sleeping pad strapped to the outside and a water bottle tucked into the side pocket. The hiker wears a red hardshell jacket, khaki quick-dry pants, and sturdy brown hiking boots. The dirt trail winds from the very bottom of the frame toward the middle ground, its surface scattered with loose gravel, flanked by low alpine meadow shrubs and a few evergreen pines. The background features the spectacular Rocky Mountains—towering, undulating gray rock peaks rising into the clouds, with patches of white snow dotting the summits and valleys, their layered ridgeline silhouettes occupying the upper half of the frame. The sky is blanketed with heavy gray-white clouds, and diffused soft light envelops the entire scene, creating a vast and tranquil natural atmosphere. The image exhibits the typical characteristics of an early digital camera: the overall focus is slightly soft, edges lack sharpness, shadows carry mild digital noise, and the colors appear somewhat muted with a dated quality. In the lower-right corner, there is a clearly visible orange-yellow early digital camera timestamp text: '08/15/2006'. The vertical composition perfectly showcases the depth of the trail and the towering grandeur of the mountain range.

The visual center of the frame is a woman laughing heartily, wearing a thick winter coat, holding a mug filled with hot cocoa in both hands, with wisps of steam rising gently above the rim. Her expression is vivid and natural, radiating holiday joy. Light snow is falling from the sky, with fine white snowflakes drifting through the air, some scattered on her hair and clothing. The background is set at a Chicago Christmas market, and due to shallow depth-of-field treatment, it exhibits a pronounced blur and bokeh effect. Behind the subject, the outlines of traditional wooden market stalls can be faintly discerned, with Christmas wreaths and other holiday decorations hanging from them. Dense festive lights dissolve into warm yellow and multicolored circles of light in the defocused background, creating a dreamy bokeh effect. The overall image carries the slight noise and digital pixel texture characteristic of low-resolution imagery. The lighting is soft, and the cool tones of the winter night snowscape interweave with the warm tones of the market lights, conveying a rich and cozy winter holiday atmosphere.

title: Late Night Backseat Intimate Moment
prompt_cn: This is a photograph exhibiting the native nighttime photography aesthetic of the Y2K millennial era. It employs a vertical mid-shot composition suited to an 896×1200 aspect ratio, with an eye-level perspective. The main subjects are a man and a woman seated in the back seat of a car late at night, leaning closely together, with facial features and proportions kept naturally realistic. The man wears an all-black suit ensemble with a black shirt underneath, tenderly wrapping his arm around the woman's neck and leaning down to gently kiss her temple. The woman's eyes are softly closed, her expression serene, her body leaning gently toward the man. She is dressed in an elegant black long-sleeve high-neck dress made of a thick matte fabric, with shoulders fully covered, presenting a classic fitted silhouette. The image simulates the shallow depth-of-field effect of an 85mm portrait lens, lit with strong direct on-camera flash illumination. The harsh light creates sharp highlights on the subjects' skin and on the rain-wet car window glass, while casting hard-edged black shadows on the seat behind them, producing extremely high contrast between light and dark. The car interior is dim, with a subtle haze lent by the cold night air. The background consists of fogged car window glass, its surface covered with distinct raindrops, with portions of the glass reflecting the intense white flash light. Through the softly defocused background beyond the car windows, warm blurred light spots from city street lights outside faintly emerge in the deep darkness of night. The overall visual impression is intimate and tranquil, imbued with a rich retro documentary atmosphere.

title: Portrait Through Camera Screen
prompt_cn: A close-up photo focused on the back of a compact Canon digital camera, composed in portrait orientation, presenting a 'picture-within-a-picture' visual effect. The camera body occupies the frame, revealing a surface material with subtle texture, with physical buttons and dials surrounding the screen edges. Clearly visible UI elements and buttons include a circular 'FUNC/SET' scroll wheel button, a 'DISP.' button, and an 'IMAGE STABILIZER' label on the side of the body. The glowing LCD screen at the center of the camera displays a half-body close-up snapshot of a young woman. The woman on the screen is in a nighttime indoor setting, with long black hair cascading naturally, a few loose strands falling across her cheeks, her lips slightly parted, her expression soft and natural. The strong built-in direct on-camera flash illuminates her, creating harsh and glaring highlights on her cheeks and hair strands, with facial features rendered particularly prominent under the intense light. Behind the woman, the background is a dim and slightly cluttered kitchen, where kitchen appliances, shelving, and metallic surfaces with faint glimmers all appear in soft, out-of-focus blur due to depth of field and low light. The photo preview on the screen contains no accompanying text or logos. The overall color tone of the image is slightly muted with a cool undertone, the screen image carries a natural LCD grain texture and faint screen glow, perfectly replicating the nostalgic, raw, and documentary snapshot feel of early 2000s digital cameras, with the strong flash contrast against the dark background creating a visually striking tension evocative of the era.

title: Pink Twin-Tail Girl Chat Emoji Pack
prompt_cn:
A color hand-drawn style two-dimensional chibi (Q-version) LINE chat sticker sheet, in a 16:9 wide-format aspect ratio. The overall layout adopts a 4-row by 6-column grid arrangement, neatly displaying 24 individual half-body portrait stickers. The background is pure white to highlight the sticker subjects.

The main subject across all stickers is the same two-dimensional anime girl character: featuring pink twin tails, wearing a prominent black large bow and white lace-trimmed headband (the headpiece maintains correct structure and high consistency across all stickers), dressed in a blue-and-white sailor uniform with a red bow tie. Each sticker is accompanied by clearly legible black handwritten Simplified Chinese text, covering common chat phrases and internet memes. The specific stickers are as follows:

Row 1:
Column 1: The girl smiles and waves hello, with the text '早上好！' (Good morning!)
Column 2: Her eyes turn into sparkling stars, hands clasped together full of anticipation, with the text '谢谢大佬！' (Thanks, boss!)
Column 3: Teary-eyed, biting a white handkerchief, with the text '呜呜呜...' (Waaah...)
Column 4: Arms crossed over chest, cheeks puffed up in an angry look, with the text '生气了！' (I'm angry!)
Column 5: Bowing her head, with a single giant blue sweat drop on her forehead, with the text '对不起嘛' (Sorry~)
Column 6: Head tilted, with a red three-dimensional large question mark appearing above her head, with the text '啊？' (Huh?)

Row 2:
Column 1: Body melting like liquid, slumped over a desk, with a white semi-transparent soul escaping from her mouth, with the text '不想上班' (Don't wanna work)
Column 2: Both hands holding a cup of bubble milk tea, sucking hard on the straw, cheeks puffed out, with the text '吨吨吨' (Gulp gulp gulp)
Column 3: Eyes ablaze with roaring flames, hands with motion blur rapidly typing on a keyboard in front of her, with the text '开卷！' (Let's grind!)
Column 4: Lying down peacefully with eyes closed, a sleep bubble with 'Zzz' characters rising from the tip of her nose, with the text '晚安' (Good night)
Column 5: Both hands covering her face, eyes wide open, mouth exaggeratedly agape in an O-shape, with the text '震惊！' (Shocked!)
Column 6: Confidently winking with one eye closed, extending her right hand with a thumbs-up, with the text '包在我身上' (Leave it to me)

Row 3:
Column 1: Looking down at a glowing phone screen, blushing and covering her mouth while giggling, with the text '磕到了' (I'm shipping it)
Column 2: Both hands holding up a protest wooden sign with a red X mark, expression cold and indifferent, with the text '退退退！' (Back off!)
Column 3: Eyes closed, mouth wide open, one hand slapping the desk forcefully, with vibration lines around it, with the text '哈哈哈哈哈' (Hahahahaha)
Column 4: Wearing black pixel-style sunglasses

title: Dreamy Girl Smiling in the Breeze
prompt_cn: A realistic-style close-up portrait photo, exhibiting the typical vintage film aesthetic of a disposable camera, composed in portrait orientation. At the center of the frame is a young woman, of medium build, with the lens focused on her face, neck, and partial shoulders. Her eyes are closed, her head tilted slightly backward, and her face is beaming with a radiant smile full of ecstasy and extreme joy. She has long hair with a natural and voluminous texture, being swept by a gentle breeze, with strands suspended mid-air displaying a light and flowing dynamic beauty. She is wearing a thin, light-colored silk camisole top that complements the atmosphere of the image. The background is heavily blurred, creating a magical and ethereal ambiance, presenting dreamlike gradient tones of soft purple, gentle pink, and pale blue interwoven together, with softly glowing particles or stardust specks faintly floating in the air. Visually, the photo carries the lo-fi characteristics of a disposable camera, including noticeable film grain, slight vignetting, and a warm orange light leak effect that naturally bleeds in from the edges of the frame. The lighting appears to consist of a slight frontal flash combined with soft ambient light, rendering the skin texture on the subject's face realistic with a subtle luminosity, while the overall color tone is both nostalgic and imbued with an otherworldly, ethereal beauty.

title: Film Flash Female Portrait
prompt_cn: A vertical portrait photograph in the style of a raw independent film still, the image saturated with intense film grain and carrying a deliberate imperfection and rough texture. At the center of the frame in a close-up shot is a young woman. Her hair is loosely pinned back, with several disheveled strands falling naturally, casting noticeable shadows around her eyes under the strong direct light. She faces the camera straight on, the corners of her lips slightly upturned in a wry half-smile that seems to see through everything. She wears a charcoal-gray cardigan with a distinctly visible knit texture. The lighting exhibits the characteristic harsh on-camera flash effect typical of secondhand film cameras—high-intensity frontal hard light illuminates the woman's face and upper body while casting a heavy, sharp-edged black silhouette shadow of her figure onto the wall behind her. Behind the woman is a cluttered background wall covered with various papers. These include several black-and-white film stills with torn edges, their images faintly showing blurred rainy night street scenes and dark-toned human silhouettes. Interspersed among the stills are many yellowed sticky notes and torn notebook scraps casually affixed with transparent tape, bearing handwritten English notes in black ink. The text on the notes can be clearly made out: on the left side of the frame, one reads 'Scene 04: The Encounter'; on the right, a slightly larger piece of paper reads 'Where do we go from here?'; in the corner near the woman's shoulder, a small note reads 'Don't forget to breathe'; and another note resembling an everyday list reads 'Milk, bread, film rolls'. The overall color tone leans cool and dark, and the high-contrast harsh lighting combined with the textured clothing and the detail-rich background wall collectively construct an authentic, decadent, and narratively charged indie film atmosphere.

title: Girl & Golden Retriever by Sunset Bus
prompt_cn: A portrait-orientation photography shot. The frame captures a heartwarming pet moment inside a bus. At the center of the image is a young woman sitting in a window seat on the bus, turned sideways, with a natural, genuine smile on her face, gazing tenderly at a Golden Retriever in her arms. The dog's two front paws rest on the lower edge of the bus window as it curiously looks outside. The woman wears a casual beige knitted cardigan, and her slightly wavy brown hair gleams with a subtle sheen under the sunlight. The setting is at sunset; through the wide bus window, a captivating evening vista is visible. The sky displays a warm gradient of orange-red, pink, and purple sunset glow, while the distant city skyline and silhouettes of trees appear soft in the twilight. Interior details of the bus are visible, including the blue fabric seat beneath the woman, the window frame, and a metal handrail faintly visible at the top of the frame. The lighting exhibits classic golden hour characteristics—warm, soft rim light streaming through the window from a side-backlit angle, tracing bright contour highlights along the woman's profile, her hair strands, and the dog's golden fur. The image employs a shallow depth of field effect, with the sunset scenery outside and the bus interior moderately blurred, while the focal point remains sharply on the woman's warm smile and the adorable pet. The overall color tone is warm, healing, and full of everyday life atmosphere.

title: Secret Message on a Yellow Fruit
prompt_cn: A close-up macro photograph. At the center of the frame, a ripe yellow fruit is placed horizontally, occupying the vast majority of the image space. The yellow fruit peel exhibits a bright yellow color with natural subtle textures and a few light brown speckles. On the smooth curved surface of the yellow fruit peel, a lengthy secret message is densely handwritten in black marker. The black lettering has a slightly cursive style, closely arranged following the curvature of the yellow fruit, and is clearly legible. The text reads: 'Agent K, the rendezvous point has been compromised. Move to sector 4 immediately. The package is hidden inside the false bottom of the blue suitcase at the station lockers. Locker number 402. The combination is 8-1-5-9. Do not trust the courier. Destroy this message after reading. We are running out of time.' The background is deeply blurred by an extremely shallow depth of field, faintly revealing the texture of a dark-toned wooden tabletop surface. The deep background creates a strong contrast in both luminance and color against the bright yellow fruit subject. Soft, overhead side lighting illuminates the yellow fruit surface evenly, not only accentuating the three-dimensionality and sheen of the peel but also highlighting the faint reflections produced by the black ink adhering to the fruit skin. The composition is tight, with the focal point entirely concentrated on the section of the yellow fruit bearing the text, presenting an extremely high level of sharpness and realistic photographic quality.

title: Black & White Pixel Animal Poster
prompt_cn:
A 16-bit pixel art style poster. The background is a clean and crisp light gray. The image uses a landscape composition with a neat 3-row by 5-column grid layout, with an overall visual effect reminiscent of a retro video game character selection screen or a pixel-art encyclopedia compendium. Centered at the top of the poster is a clear line of black retro pixel font title reading 'BLACK AND WHITE ANIMALS'.

The main body of the image consists of 15 square grids with dark gray thin pixel borders, each grid showcasing one black-and-white animal found in nature. The animals are all rendered in finely detailed high-contrast pixel blocks, with a clear black retro pixel font English name directly below each animal.

The first row of grids from left to right: a giant panda sitting and munching on pixel bamboo, labeled 'GIANT PANDA' below; a zebra standing in profile with distinct pixel stripes, labeled 'ZEBRA'; an upright penguin with a black back and white belly, labeled 'PENGUIN'; a leaping orca displaying its streamlined black-and-white body, labeled 'ORCA'; a skunk with its fluffy tail raised and prominent white stripes along its back, labeled 'SKUNK'.

The second row of grids from left to right: a Dalmatian dog with black-and-white spots in a seated pose, labeled 'DALMATIAN'; a badger with its head lowered foraging, bearing its signature black-and-white facial stripes, labeled 'BADGER'; a ring-tailed lemur standing upright with its long black-and-white ringed tail raised, labeled 'RING-TAILED LEMUR'; a Malayan tapir standing in profile with its distinctly segmented black-and-white coloration, labeled 'MALAYAN TAPIR'; a puffin standing with black-and-white plumage and its characteristic triangular beak, labeled 'PUFFIN'.

title: Vintage Pickup Dusk Fashion Portrait
prompt_cn: This is a portrait photography shot with an outdoor fashion magazine editorial style, composed in a wide-format horizontal orientation, inspired by automotive and road trip (Petro) aesthetics and lifestyle. The main subject is a young girl standing beside a vintage red pickup truck, her body slightly tilted, naturally leaning against the edge of the driver's side window. The girl has a red bandana tied on her head and wears a thick white faux-fur coat over a minimalist-style white top. She has slightly curly, voluminous long hair, with strands displaying a natural sense of movement as if gently tousled by a breeze. The girl wears a confident, slightly dreamy expression with a relaxed gaze. The scene is set outdoors at dusk, with brilliant golden sunset afterglow illuminating the entire landscape from the side-rear, casting a warm rim light over the girl's face, the white fur coat, and the red body of the truck. The expansive background showcases a quintessential American wilderness highway landscape—behind the red truck, a straight road extends into the distance, flanked on both sides by arid sandy ground and low scrubland, with undulating low mountain ranges in the far distance. The sky displays a magnificent sunset palette transitioning from golden-yellow to orange-red. The overall image tone is warm and rich, with abundant light and shadow depth, perfectly combining the rugged outdoor scenery with refined high-fashion sensibility.

The upper right is Step 2, with a green title reading 'Step 2: Add Hot Water.' The illustration shows a black Japanese kyusu teapot pouring hot water—depicted with white steam lines—into the bowl containing matcha powder. Below it are three lines of black instructional text: 'Pour 2 oz (60ml) of hot water. Ideal temperature is 175°F (80°C). Do not use boiling water.'

title: San Francisco Frosted Glass Weather UI
prompt_cn: A modern-style weather forecast app interface design mockup in a horizontal aspect ratio. The background is a slightly Gaussian-blurred photograph of San Francisco's scenery, showcasing the magnificent Golden Gate Bridge, with its red suspension bridge towers standing amid the iconic bay morning fog, and the sky displaying a soft blue-to-orange gradient. The main interface is composed of semi-transparent panels with a frosted glass texture (Glassmorphism), featuring soft white edge highlights and subtle shadows. In the upper left of the image is a large primary weather information area: the top displays the location 'San Francisco, CA' in bold white sans-serif font; below it is an extra-large numeral '62°F' alongside a yellow-and-white "partly cloudy" icon (a sun partially obscured by a white cloud); beneath the temperature is the status text 'Partly Cloudy'; to the right, three supplementary data items are arranged horizontally: 'Humidity: 65%', 'Wind: 12 mph', and 'Precipitation: 0%'. The lower half of the image features a horizontal semi-transparent glass panel spanning most of the width, with a small subtitle '5-Day Forecast' in its upper left corner. Inside the panel, five column cards are evenly distributed horizontally, each containing from top to bottom the day of the week, a weather icon, and high/low temperatures: the first column text reads 'Mon', below it is a cloud icon with horizontal fog lines, and the bottom text reads '64° / 52°'; the second column text reads 'Tue', below it is a bright yellow sun icon, and the bottom text reads '66° / 53°'; the third column text reads 'Wed', below it is an icon of a white cloud partially covering a sun, and the bottom text reads '63° / 51°'; the fourth column text reads 'Thu', below it is a gray cloud icon with blue raindrops, and the bottom text reads '60° / 50°'; the fifth column text reads 'Fri', below it is an icon of two overlapping gray clouds, and the bottom text reads '62° / 51°'. The overall composition of the image is balanced, UI elements are neatly arranged, the lighting is bright and soft, all text is in pure white, the information is clear and legible, and it exhibits a very high level of commercial design polish.

At the center of the frame is a young male protagonist wearing a white lab coat over a black T-shirt, with round-framed glasses, holding an open silver laptop with both hands. He is staring in surprise at a blue teardrop-shaped slime on the ground in front of him. Above the protagonist's head is an oval speech bubble with the text: 'Wait, I got reincarnated? And I still have my laptop?'. Floating above the slime is a semi-transparent system prompt box reading: 'Slime encountered!'.

Initializing Neural Network!'.

Third panel (Twist): From the code magic circle, a small, clunky, boxy robot (representing an AI agent) has been summoned. The robot walks up to the slime but begins spinning aimlessly in place, getting knocked around and toppling over from the slime's gentle bumps, with confusion circle symbols emerging above its head. title: Fashion Week Street Flash Portrait
prompt_cn: Paparazzi-style candid street portrait photography. The wide-format image employs a slightly low-angle close-up perspective, tightly focused on a man's face and shoulders. The man possesses an exceptionally sculpted and striking facial structure, and he is glancing back over his shoulder to gaze at the camera, with a confident and slightly playful smirk on his lips. He wears a thick-textured dark turtleneck sweater, and on his face sits a pair of avant-garde black fashion sunglasses, exuding an effortlessly cool street-fashion aura. Behind the man, the horizontally extending background is heavily blurred by depth of field, revealing bustling crowds; vaguely visible are other fashionably dressed blurred figures, staggered streetlights, and interwoven bokeh spots, creating an atmosphere reminiscent of the noisy, crowded, and vibrant scene outside Paris Fashion Week. The lighting simulates a harsh on-camera flash effect (harsh flash), casting high-contrast hard shadows along the edges of the subject's jawline and in the folds of his turtleneck sweater. The overall photograph exhibits pronounced high-ISO noise and coarse film grain, with no excessive retouching whatsoever, greatly intensifying the raw tension and documentary feel of this unrehearsed, frozen-in-the-moment capture.

title: Neural Network Factory Cross-Section
prompt_cn:
A horizontal illustration in the signature hand-drawn cutaway style of Stephen Biesty, visualizing a two-layer neural network as a massive and extraordinarily complex industrial processing factory. The layout is horizontal, presenting the physical data-processing flow from left to right. The art style is rendered in extremely fine black-and-white pen linework, supplemented with vintage light watercolor washes, revealing architectural and mechanical interior cross-sections brimming with dense, microscopic details.

At the very top of the image, a large title in a vintage serif typeface reads 'TWO-LAYER NEURAL NETWORK'.

On the left side of the image is the "Input Layer," depicted as four towering feed silos constructed from a hybrid of brick masonry and cast iron. The outer walls of the silos are cut away to expose internal spiral conveyors and crushers. Numerous tiny workers push minecarts, tipping glowing blue crystal ore (representing raw data) into hoppers at the top. Slender black leader lines connect to these structures with annotation text reading: 'Input Data Sorter', 'Input 1', 'Input 2', 'Input 3', 'Input 4'.

At the center of the image is the "Hidden Layer," composed of five enormous spherical processing boilers with intricately complex internal structures, arranged side by side. From the four input silos on the left, a dense, spider-web-like tangle of brass pipes extends outward, ensuring that every silo has a pipe connecting to each and every one of the central boilers (visualizing the fully connected layer). The pipes are fitted with large hand-wheel regulating valves. The boilers are cut away to reveal multiple layers of gears, agitator shafts, and glowing red steam combustion chambers at the bottom (visualizing the activation function). Hundreds of tiny workers in blue overalls move about on complex metal scaffolding, staircases, and catwalks—some are collaboratively turning heavy brass valves (representing weight adjustment), others are reading instrument panels, and one worker is sitting on a suspended steel beam drinking coffee on a break. Leader-line annotations in this area include: 'Synaptic Weight Valve', 'Hidden Layer Chamber', 'Bias Input Pump', 'Activation Function Generator'.

On the right side of the image is the "Output Layer," containing two towering precision distillation columns. Thick pipes extending from the five hidden-layer boilers at the center—

Dozens of tiny workers are bustling about on the scaffolding; some are straining to turn brass valves on the pipes with enormous wrenches, accompanied by a black ink annotation reading 'Worker calibrating the weight valve.'

At the center of the image is the hidden layer, with a massive cast-iron sign suspended from above reading 'HIDDEN LAYER.' This area contains four enormous cylindrical mechanical processing towers, labeled 'Neuron Processing Unit.' All four towers are shown in cross-section, revealing complex pistons, spinning centrifuges, and massive boilers at their bases burning with orange flames, with the boiler casings labeled 'Activation Boiler.' Each processing tower is connected to a small, suspended water tank from which liquid continuously flows into the main tower, with a sign hanging on the tank reading 'Bias Gen

title: Neural Network Factory Cross-Section Illustration
prompt_cn: A complex cutaway cross-section illustration in the style of Stephen Biesty, presented in a vertical/portrait composition. The main subject is a magnificent Victorian-era multi-story mechanical factory, sliced open vertically, ingeniously designed to represent the structure of a two-layer neural network. The illustration employs extremely fine ink line work with soft, vintage watercolor washes, brimming with dense microscopic details. The topmost floor of the factory represents the input layer, featuring three enormous brass funnel-shaped receiving chambers where hundreds of tiny workers in vintage overalls busily push data-symbolizing blocks into the funnels, with fine-line leader labels reading 'Input Layer,' 'x1,' 'x2,' and 'x3.' Below the top floor is an intricate network of pipes, pulleys, and interwoven conveyor belts transporting material downward; the pipes are fitted with massive metal valves, with small workers hanging from them turning valve wheels to regulate flow, representing weights, with labels reading 'Weights.' The middle level of the factory is the expansive hidden layer, housing four enormous spherical steam boilers (symbolizing neuron nodes) arranged side by side, their metal casings partially cut away to reveal complex gears in operation and boiling fluids inside. Engineers carrying clipboards patrol the metal walkways between the boilers, inspecting gauge panels bristling with needles, with leader labels reading 'Hidden Layer,' 'Activation,' 'Node 1,' 'Node 2,' 'Node 3,' and 'Node 4.' Pipes extending from the bottoms of these boilers interweave and converge once more, leading to the factory's lowest level—the output layer. The bottom floor houses two precision terminal stamping machines, converting the converged fluids into final solid modules and outputting them onto inspection tables, where a factory owner wearing a top hat carefully examines long paper tape strips extruded by the machines, with labels reading 'Output Layer,' 'Prediction,' 'y1,' and 'y2.' The cut-away face of the building clearly reveals red brick walls, heavy timber trusses, and riveted steel beams. The color palette is dominated by warm parchment yellow, rusty iron red, vintage brass tones, and soft aqua blue. The overall style combines a strong industrial-mechanical aesthetic with humorous and vivid microscopic narrative charm.

title: Ghibli Style
prompt_cn: A portrait-oriented animation illustration rendered in the classic Studio Ghibli art style. At the center of the scene, an ancient stone stairway winds upward, its surface weathered and covered with thick emerald-green moss and a few small white wildflowers. A young girl with short black hair stands midway up the stone steps, wearing a light blue vintage dress with a white Peter Pan collar and carrying a worn brown leather satchel on a cross-body strap. She tilts her head slightly upward, her expression conveying curiosity and wonder as she gazes at the forest above. In the foreground grass to the girl's left, a mysterious fantastical small creature hides—round and plump, entirely snow-white, with two long ears—holding up a giant green taro leaf as an umbrella. The background is a lush, vibrant ancient forest. Several enormous old-growth trees, so wide they would require several people to encircle, rise from the ground with clearly defined bark textures, their surfaces draped with thick vines and fern plants. The background foliage is rendered in distinct layers, exhibiting the translucent quality of traditional watercolor painting with an extraordinarily rich range of green tones. In the upper portion of the image, bright sunlight penetrates the dense canopy, forming several distinct golden Tyndall beams that gently fall upon the girl's skirt hem and the moss-covered stone steps, creating vivid dappled lighting effects. Through gaps in the leaves at the very top of the frame, a deep blue sky is faintly visible at a great height, along with a single massive, cotton-candy-like midsummer cumulus cloud with a strong sense of volume. The overall art style conveys a rich sense of summer healing and a fantastical fairy-tale atmosphere. The characters and creatures are rendered using delicate cel-shading flat coloring techniques with soft edge lines, seamlessly blending with the hand-painted watercolor-textured, high-detail background.

title: Young Couple Polaroid Photo
prompt_cn: A vintage Polaroid-style indoor photography snapshot. The main subjects are a young man and a young woman, positioned at the center of the frame, embracing each other closely. The man wears a simple dark casual T-shirt, and the woman wears a light-colored knit top. Their arms wrap around each other's shoulders and backs in an intimate yet natural pose. They tilt their heads slightly toward one another, facing the camera with relaxed, casual smiles, their facial features clearly visible. This is an ordinary snapshot full of everyday life atmosphere, with no deliberately arranged props or elaborate decorations in the frame. Behind the two, the background is an entire clean white curtain with naturally draping vertical fabric folds. The lighting vividly simulates the effect of a camera flash fired directly in a dark room—a strong, uniform single artificial light source spreads evenly from directly in front onto the two subjects, rendering their facial skin tones and clothing fully exposed with highlights slightly blown out, while casting sharp, hard-edged black shadows onto the white curtain behind them. The overall image quality carries the typical physical characteristics of a Polaroid camera, exhibiting a slight soft-focus blur and noticeable film grain texture. The color palette has a vintage faded quality with a slight color cast, and the edges show mild vignetting, perfectly recreating the atmosphere of an unretouched, old-fashioned candid snapshot.

title: Light Minimalist Infographic
prompt_cn: A landscape-oriented, light-colored, minimalist-style infographic. The background is a pure pale yellow, with an overall soft and warm color tone and ample whitespace in the layout. At the top center of the image, there is a prominent black bold main title reading '一杯咖啡的旅程' (The Journey of a Cup of Coffee), immediately followed below by a smaller line of light gray subtitle text: '从种子到杯中的奇妙蜕变' (The Wondrous Transformation from Seed to Cup). In the central area of the image, four process steps are arranged horizontally from left to right, evenly spaced. Above each step is a dark yellow circular background block containing a white minimalist flat-style icon; below each icon are a black bold sub-heading and a gray explanatory paragraph, in that order. The steps are connected by gray minimalist rightward linear arrows ('→'), creating clear visual guidance. The first step on the far left features a plant icon with several leaves and coffee cherries inside the circle, with the sub-heading '1. 种植与采摘' (1. Planting & Harvesting), and the explanatory text: '在高海拔地区精心培育，手工采摘成熟的红色咖啡果实。' (Carefully cultivated in high-altitude regions, ripe red coffee cherries are hand-picked.) The second step features a large coffee bean and flame icon inside the circle, with the sub-heading '2. 处理与烘焙' (2. Processing & Roasting), and the explanatory text: '经过水洗或日晒处理后，在适宜温度下烘焙出独特的香气。' (After washed or natural processing, roasted at suitable temperatures to develop unique aromas.) The third step features a pour-over coffee kettle and dripper icon inside the circle, with the sub-heading '3. 研磨与萃取' (3. Grinding & Extraction), and the explanatory text: '将烘焙好的咖啡豆研磨成粉，用热水释放出浓郁的咖啡精华。' (Roasted coffee beans are ground into powder, and hot water is used to release the rich coffee essence.) The fourth step on the far right features a steaming coffee cup on a saucer icon inside the circle, with the sub-heading '4. 品鉴与享受' (4. Tasting & Enjoyment), and the explanatory text: '在宁静的时光里，细细品味每一滴咖啡带来的醇厚与温暖。' (In tranquil moments, savor the richness and warmth that every drop of coffee brings.) The overall composition is symmetrically balanced, with rounded and clean icon lines and no superfluous cluttered decorations, perfectly embodying modern minimalist design aesthetics.

title: Nutrition Comparison Infographic
prompt_cn: A vertically formatted, print-grade nutritional comparison infographic poster with a strict vertical half-and-half layout, where the canvas is divided into left and right sections by a straight line running down the exact center. At the top of the canvas, centered and spanning both halves, is a prominent large uppercase bold sans-serif headline reading 'COLA VS SPARKLING WATER,' with a smaller subtitle beneath it reading 'NUTRITION FACTS BATTLE.' The left half features a gradient background from dark red to bright red. In the upper-center of the left side is a flat-style illustration depicting a classic red aluminum can alongside a glass filled with ice cubes and dark cola, with a straw inserted in the glass. Below the illustration is white bold text reading 'COLA.' Beneath the text, detailed nutritional data is arranged vertically, each item accompanied by a minimalist white line icon: text reading 'Calories: 140 kcal' with a flame icon, text reading 'Sugar: 39g' with a stacked sugar cubes icon, and a smaller ingredient description reading 'Ingredients: Carbonated water, high fructose corn syrup, caramel color, phosphoric acid, caffeine.' At the bottom of the left half are three white-bordered tags reading 'High Sugar,' 'Artificial Additives,' and 'Energy Spike.' The right half features a gradient background from dark blue to light blue. In the upper-center of the right side is a flat-style illustration echoing the left side, depicting a streamlined transparent glass bottle alongside a glass containing clear water, dense bubbles, fresh lemon slices, and green mint leaves. Below the illustration is white bold text reading 'SPARKLING WATER.' Beneath the text, nutritional data is arranged vertically, aligned to match the height of the left side: text reading 'Calories: 0 kcal' with a hollow circle icon, text reading 'Sugar: 0g' with a single green leaf icon, and an ingredient description reading 'Ingredients: Carbonated mineral water, natural lemon essence.'

title: Cozy Living Room Group Portrait Painting
prompt_cn: A high-quality 3D fairy-tale-style plush illustration in widescreen composition. At the center of the scene sits a wide, yellow-brown vintage fabric sofa with a worn retro texture and corduroy ridges, its edges featuring several visible stitched patches and fringe, with scattered throw pillows bearing bohemian geometric patterns. Fourteen plush characters of varying shapes and lifelike textures are crammed tightly onto and around the sofa. Seated right in the center of the sofa is the largest character—a fluffy big orange tabby cat. Nestled to the left of the orange cat is a cream-colored long-eared rabbit wearing blue denim overalls, cradling half a carrot. Perched on the rabbit's head is a small gray cat wearing round-framed glasses. To the right of the orange cat leans a chubby brown bear wearing a red knitted beanie, cuddling a pink spherical piglet in its arms. On the left edge of the sofa backrest, two small green frogs lie side by side. On the right edge of the backrest, a small red fox leans forward and peers downward. On the right edge of the seat cushion sit a small penguin wearing a yellow scarf and a small black-and-white Border Collie. Standing on the left armrest is a small yellow dog wearing a sailor suit. On the vintage floral-patterned rug in front of the sofa sit a small brown squirrel carrying a red mushroom on its back and a small blue elephant curling a cookie with its trunk. From the gap beneath the sofa, a small hedgehog pokes out half its body. All characters are gazing intently at an old-fashioned CRT retro television with a walnut shell casing positioned in the right foreground, topped with V-shaped metal rabbit-ear antennas and side-mounted knobs. The scene employs dual cool and warm lighting sources: through a mullioned window on the left, a beam of warm golden sunset light streams in, illuminating floating dust motes in the air and casting windowpane-shaped light patches on the wooden floor; the retro TV screen emits a cool bluish-white glow that falls upon the focused faces and soft fur of the plush characters, creating delicate rim lighting along their edges. The interior background wallpaper features a faint floral pattern. The overall color palette is rich yet soft, filled with a warm, healing, and nostalgic atmosphere.

title: Retro Typography Poster
prompt_cn: An 80s retro-style graphic design typography poster in a horizontal wide-format composition. Prominently arranged horizontally across the exact center of the canvas is the enormous English word 'TYPOGRAPHY,' occupying the vast majority of the visual space. The word is set in an extremely heavy, tightly packed sans-serif uppercase bold typeface with thick letterform strokes and minimal letter-spacing, conveying a strong geometric block-like presence. The letter bodies are deep black with a classic retro print chromatic aberration offset effect: the letters cast a hot pink (magenta) shadow toward the lower left and a fluorescent blue (cyan) shadow toward the upper right, with the two colored shadows producing intersections and blending where they overlap at the letter edges. The entire canvas deeply incorporates an 80s halftone dot style—the colored shadow areas of the text are not solid colors but are composed of densely arranged, gradually scaled pop-art-style circular halftone dots, presenting a distinct retro print granularity and moiré texture. The poster's background base color is an off-white paper texture with slight aged yellowing traces. The negative space around the edges of the canvas is accented with sparse scattered pink halftone dot clusters, blue fine lines, and small print registration crosshair marks as typographic decoration. The lighting across the canvas is flat and even, with strong and vivid color contrasts, perfectly replicating the visual characteristics of traditional ink printing.

title: City Letter Fusion
prompt_cn:
A highly realistic photograph of a Berlin street scene, composed in portrait orientation. The weather is clear and sunny, with bright sunlight streaming diagonally from the upper left of the frame, casting deep shadows with crisp, sharp edges onto the buildings and street, lending the image a strong sense of three-dimensionality. The core of the image is a row of six distinctive buildings standing side by side along a wide street, whose façade contours, balconies, rooftops, and load-bearing structures ingeniously form the giant uppercase letters 'BERLIN,' while maintaining extremely realistic architectural physical details.

From left to right, the first building (B) is a classic warm-yellow stone old apartment building; its left side is a straight solid wall, while the right side features two large semicircular bay windows with circular balconies arranged vertically, perfectly outlining the shape of 'B.' The second building (E) is a white Modernist apartment block; the left side serves as the main load-bearing wall, while three tiers of heavy cantilevered horizontal concrete balconies project from the right side, forming the three horizontal strokes of 'E.' The third building (R) is a red-brick vintage structure; its upper half features a large semicircular arched window, and its lower right is supported by a stout diagonal external brick staircase and flying buttress, forming the diagonal leg of 'R.' The fourth building (L) has a tall dark-gray classical tower on its left side, with a ground-floor street-level shop fitted with a flat, dark metal awning that extends far to the right, forming the base stroke of 'L.' The fifth building (I) is an extremely narrow vertical tower, its façade composed of straight curtain-wall glass and dark steel framing that reflects sunlight, resembling an upright column. The sixth building (N) consists of two identical slender vertical sub-towers connected by an enclosed glass skybridge corridor that slants diagonally from the upper left to the lower right, forming the shape of 'N.'

The upper third of the frame is reserved for an azure sky dotted with a few wispy clouds. The ground floors of the buildings are filled with authentic signs of life: ivy-clad wall corners, a sidewalk café with open parasols, and clearly visible glass shopfront windows. The street foreground at the bottom of the frame is paved with typical Berlin cobblestones, featuring a zebra crossing, several bicycles parked against iron railings, black vintage streetlamps, and a few pedestrians walking by. The pedestrians and streetlamps cast long, high-contrast shadows on the ground under the bright sunlight. The overall color palette is rich and saturated, material textures are clearly visible, and the image skillfully integrates typographic art into authentic urban street photography.

title: Food Photography
prompt_cn: An extremely photorealistic professional food photography shot, composed in portrait orientation. Slightly below the center of the frame, a close-up showcases an exquisite salmon nigiri sushi, placed on a natural-wood-toned rectangular serving board with deep, pronounced wood grain. The sushi is based on a bed of translucent, distinctly grained, slightly glistening vinegared rice, topped with a thick-cut slice of salmon sashimi. The salmon flesh exhibits a vivid, appetizing orange-red hue with clearly defined parallel white fat marbling lines, glistening with the moist sheen and subtle oily luster characteristic of fresh ingredients. The top of the salmon is meticulously garnished with several glistening, translucent orange salmon roe and a small mound of verdant freshly grated wasabi; the surfaces of the salmon roe display specular highlight reflections. The close-up lens paired with an extremely shallow depth of field renders the foreground sushi and the wood grain texture of the serving board beneath it exceptionally sharp and crisp, while the background is completely dissolved by the strong bokeh effect into soft dark-brown and warm-yellow tones, with faintly discernible blurred edges of a Japanese teacup and warm, diffused circular ambient light spots. The image employs natural, soft side-backlighting, as if gentle light were filtering through a window, perfectly delineating the three-dimensionality and moist sheen of the ingredients as well as the edge contours of the wooden serving board. The overall color tone is warm and refined, possessing the lighting quality of a professional food photography studio, firmly locking the viewer's visual focus onto the extraordinarily realistic micro-textures of the ingredients.
