title: Typography Sports Car Silhouette Poster
prompt_cn:
A horizontal vector typographic illustration poster. The background is a pure deep navy blue, and the central subject is a vintage sports car side-profile silhouette composed entirely of deformed, interlocking English words. The car's form spans the entire wide-format image. All text is set in bold, dynamic sans-serif typefaces, with the edges, stretch directions, and typographic flow of the words perfectly conforming to the streamlined curves and physical contours of the sports car, the interior filled completely with text, leaving no excess gaps.

The smooth parabolic line from the car's rooftop to the hood is formed by the large, bright red word 'ADRENALINE', its letters stretched and naturally curved to follow the aerodynamic arc of the body. The side door area is filled with the bold, heavy block letters of 'CLASSIC' in vivid yellow, the letters tightly compressed top-to-bottom to form the solid flank of the car body. The window section is composed of the angled, pure white word 'FREEDOM', the tilt of the letters precisely delineating the geometric shapes of the windshield and side windows.

The chassis and tires of the sports car are likewise sculpted from text: the front wheel is formed by the white word 'SPEED' bent end-to-end into a perfect circle; the rear wheel is formed by the white word 'POWER' curved into an equally sized circle; at the hub center of each wheel, the small bright yellow word 'SPIN' is placed as an accent. The headlight position at the front is formed by the bright yellow word 'GLOW', while the exhaust pipe at the rear is formed by the orange word 'ROAR' radiating outward, conveying a strong sense of motion.

The overall color scheme employs a highly visually impactful, high-contrast palette—red, yellow, and white text stands out strikingly against the deep navy blue background. The style is clean and neat, with crisp, sharp edges, no gradients or cluttered background elements, relying purely on the deformation and arrangement of text to construct the sports car's volume and sense of speed.

title: Blue Whale Illustration Made of Text
prompt_cn: A wide-aspect-ratio vector typographic illustration. The main subject is a large blue whale swimming to the left, whose entire silhouette is composed entirely of tightly arranged bold, lively English words—the text itself replaces solid lines and color fills to sculpt the whale's physical form. The words naturally curve, stretch, and scale along the streamlined body contours of the whale, seamlessly filling the entire outer silhouette. The whale's head is formed by the large dark-blue word 'WHALE' and the bright-blue word 'GIANT'; the streamlined torso section is densely packed with alternating cyan and dark-blue words 'OCEAN,' 'DEEP BLUE,' 'MAJESTIC,' 'SEA,' and 'WATER'; the pectoral fin below is formed by the curved word 'SWIM'; and the forked tail flukes are composed of the words 'WAVES' and 'NATURE' extending outward to both sides. All textual content is clearly legible. The image features vivid color contrast: the words constituting the whale are predominantly in cool tones of deep-sea blue, cyan, and bright blue, while the background is a large expanse of pure, clean bright yellow in a warm tone. The solid-color background contains no gradients, noise, or superfluous decoration, dramatically highlighting the shape of the blue whale. The overall aesthetic is that of a clean, crisp vector graphic with smooth, sharp edges; the typography is dynamic and creative, in keeping with the themes of ocean and nature.

title: Fox Painter Under Mount Fuji
prompt_cn:
A set of vertically formatted Japanese ukiyo-e cinematic wa-fū monogatari three-panel illustrations, divided into upper, middle, and lower panels. The overall color palette centers on indigo, ochre, and cherry-blossom pink, evoking a mood of wabi-sabi and poetic sentiment. Each panel features white calligraphic brush-stroke subtitles at the bottom.
First panel (top): Mid-shot composition. A fox painter sits on a wooden engawa veranda overlooking Mount Fuji, wearing a plain ochre-colored kimono and a woven bamboo kasa hat. The fox curls its fluffy tail around a painting brush, the tip dipped in indigo-blue pigment from a porcelain dish, tracing continuous mountain ridge lines on a plain white round fan (uchiwa) in front of it. The setting is a karesansui dry landscape garden of raked white sand and accent stones; in the distance stands snow-capped Mount Fuji beneath a sky with faintly drifting thin clouds. Generous negative space emphasizes the painter's professional posture. Bottom subtitle in Chinese: '将山河，收于方寸' and in English: 'Capturing mountains on a fan.'
Second panel (middle): Close-up shot. Focus on the tip of the fox painter's brush. The brush tip gently picks up ground cherry-blossom petal powder; pink pigment bleeds and diffuses across the painting, transforming into scattered falling petals at the foot of Mount Fuji within the artwork. The background features a bokeh-blurred real cherry tree with pink branches swaying, real cherry-blossom petals drifting through the air, echoing and complementing the colors on the paper—emphasizing the magical moment of creation and the diffusion of color. Bottom subtitle in Chinese: '让四季，在笔下轮回' and in English: 'Seasons turn at my brush tip.'
Third panel (bottom): Wide-shot composition. Dusk as the sun sets. The fox painter contentedly holds a steaming cup of tea in both hands, sitting on the engawa gazing outward. Between the wooden eaves and pillars hang its completed works—landscape-painted round fans, washi paper lanterns, and opened wagasa parasols. Warm golden sunset light gilds the entire garden, the hanging pieces, and the fox with a golden rim; in the distance Mount Fuji stands quietly in the twilight. The scene is serene and filled with a sense of fulfillment where art and life merge. Bottom subtitle in Chinese: '此间风物，即成永恒' and in English: 'This moment, forever.'

title: Wasteland Arena Movie Storyboard Sketch
prompt_cn: This is a vertically formatted film storyboard illustration rendered in an ultra-detailed pencil sketch style, presenting an overall heavy sepia and earth-toned palette. The background is a sheet of sepia-toned paper with a subtle aged/distressed texture. At the top center of the page, a handwritten uppercase English title reads: 'STORYBOARD: WASTELAND ARENA'. Below the title, three rectangular storyboard frames with thick black-line borders are arranged vertically, depicting a continuous cinematic narrative sequence set inside a massive, destroyed domed arena. The first frame (top) is a grand establishing wide shot depicting the interior ruins of the enormous domed arena. The arena's dome has ruptured, revealing a large, irregular breach, with broken, intricate, and twisted metal steel truss structures dangling from its upper edges. Through delicate sketch hatching and reserved highlights, dramatic volumetric light (God rays) pours down through the breach, penetrating the dust-laden air and creating intense chiaroscuro contrast. The ground is heaped with massive concrete debris and rubble. At the base of the light shaft, amid the rubble, stand four extremely diminutive silhouettes of human survivors. In the lower-left corner of this frame, handwritten text reads: 'SCENE 1 - EXT. ARENA RUINS - DAY. WIDE SHOT.' The second frame (middle) is a medium shot, pulling closer to reveal the four post-apocalyptic survivors. They wear tattered wasteland-style cloaks, gas masks, heavy scavenging backpacks, and carry crude metal weapons. They stand on uneven rubble and debris, gazing upward. Strong top lighting strikes their shoulders and heads, with deep pencil shading delineating heavy volumetric form, and clearly visible dust particles permeate the surrounding air. The lower-left corner is annotated: 'SCENE 2 - MED SHOT. SURVIVORS ENTER THE LIGHT.' The third frame (bottom) is a low-angle upward shot, with the foreground featuring an extremely detailed close-up of rubble and a section of rusted, twisted metal I-beam. One of the survivors is lifting a leg to step over this metal wreckage, creating a strong sense of perspective. In the upper background, the blurred silhouette of the shattered dome and cascading intense light are visible. The lower-left corner is annotated: 'SCENE 3 - LOW ANGLE. SEEKING A PATH.' The entire image, through dense pencil cross-hatching, masterful sketch shading, and the warm enhancement of the sepia-toned base paper,

title: Minimalist Coffee Product Studio Photography
prompt_cn:
A cinematic concept product photography image in a commercial studio-shot style. The overall aesthetic is minimalist with architectural design sensibility and a wide aspect ratio. The background is a clean warm-gray curved cyclorama wall (seamless infinity cove). A high-end softbox light is positioned at the upper left, casting soft, delicate gradient shadows on the backdrop and object surfaces; the overall tone is warm, restrained, and exudes a premium feel.

The core of the composition is a display formed by geometric podiums of varying heights, alternating in material between smooth matte beige micro-cement and dark polished walnut wood. Along the base edge of the display, a light-gray decorative rug with a subtly refined geometric woven texture serves as a foundational accent for the scene.

At the highest point in the visual center stands a cylindrical podium of dark polished walnut wood. Atop the cylinder sits the hero product: a bag of matte dark charcoal-black coffee bean packaging, its front printed with minimalist white English lettering reading 'COFFEE ROASTERS' and the slightly smaller text 'DARK BLEND.' To the left of the central cylinder is a shorter matte beige micro-cement cubic podium; a beige canvas tote bag leans casually against the edge of the cube in a natural, creased form, printed with simple black English lettering reading 'EVERYDAY ESSENTIALS.' Extending from the very front of the display are two beige micro-cement steps; on the step surface sits a rough, rustic stoneware ceramic coffee cup, and right beside it is a scented candle in a smoky-gray semi-transparent glass jar, adding visual layering to the foreground.

Carefully arranged minimalist decorative objects surround the scene without competing for attention. At the right rear, a pure-white minimalist matte-finish vase holds several slender, upright dried eucalyptus branches, casting faint shadows on the warm-gray wall. At the left mid-ground, three minimalist hardcover books are neatly stacked; the white and gray spines clearly display black English words 'ART' and 'DESIGN.' Behind the stack of books, a premium decorative framed print featuring generous negative space and abstract black-and-white linework leans at an angle. The entire composition is rigorously structured with clear visual hierarchy; the coffee product collection is artistically arranged across multiple levels, with detail quality achieving 8K ultra-high-definition resolution.

title: Dark-Style Summer Matcha Limited Edition Ad
prompt_cn: A horizontal banner web advertisement image, presenting a high-end dark aesthetic style with professional studio lighting effects. The overall background is a deep, dark black with a subtle, moody atmosphere. On the far left of the composition, bold white text is arranged vertically—the upper line reads 'SUMMER MATCHA 2026' in English, immediately followed below by the Chinese characters '限定发售'. Directly beneath these two lines of text, there is a minimalist-style UI button with the text 'Order Now' clearly displayed inside it. Transitioning to the center-left of the frame, a glowing neon-green geometric light ray elegantly pierces through the dark background space. At the exact center, an exquisite black ceramic shallow dish is partially illuminated by soft lighting, piled with a mound of finely textured, vivid emerald-green Uji matcha powder. On the center-right of the frame, a high-speed photography freeze-frame effect is presented, with several crystal-clear ice cubes suspended in mid-air, accompanied by dynamic splashes of pure white cream and milk liquid, full of kinetic energy. The exterior wall of the glass is coated with a layer of frost, showcasing ultra-fine water droplet condensation effects that refract cold, crisp glimmers of light against the dark-toned lighting. Inside the cup is a rich green matcha and milk blended liquid. The composition extends perfectly in the horizontal direction, with all elements distributed in a balanced manner and a clear visual focal point.

title: Outdoor Life Vector Sticker Set
prompt_cn: A sticker layout image in a modern trendy vector illustration style. The image is in landscape orientation, with a solid, highly saturated deep midnight blue background providing extremely high color contrast. Nine independent, non-overlapping stickers are evenly scattered across the frame, arranged in a neat knolling layout. The overall visual style strictly adheres to modern mono-line art. The internal illustrations of all stickers are outlined with dark brown lines of completely uniform stroke weight—smooth, rounded, and fluid. The interior fill color of each sticker is a flat, solid cream white with no gradients, shadows, or 3D effects whatsoever, presenting a purely two-dimensional vector appearance. The outermost edge of every sticker features a thick, well-defined pure white die-cut border, physically separating it from the dark background. The specific contents of the stickers include a series of elements related to a modern outdoor lifestyle brand: 1. Character Mascot: A bust portrait of a young girl wearing a knitted beanie and round retro glasses, with a playful smile. 2. Animal Mascot: A close-up of a pet dog's head with an outdoor adventure bandana tied around its neck. 3. Core Product: A modern minimalist travel tumbler with streamlined textures on the body. 4. Core Product: A classic vintage film camera, with details including a circular lens, flash, and shutter button. 5. Abstract Symbol: A cluster of stylized campfire, with flames composed of smooth geometric teardrop shapes. 6. Abstract Symbol: A geometric-style pine tree, formed by three stacked layers of rounded chevron lines. 7. Lifestyle Object: A vintage compass with a simplified cross-shaped directional needle inside. 8. Brand Name Sticker: The English brand name rendered in bold modern sans-serif typeface, reading 'OAK & ECHO'. 9. Tagline Sticker: A ribbon banner with a fold effect, bearing the uppercase English tagline 'EXPLORE MORE'. The color palette is highly unified—the cream white subjects, dark brown mono-lines, and deep blue background create a high-contrast visual effect, with a clean and orderly layout.

title: Coffee Brand Vector Sticker Design Set
prompt_cn: A modern trendy vector line-art illustration style sticker sheet design in portrait orientation. The background is a single high-contrast Deep Navy Blue. Evenly distributed across the canvas in a knolling layout are 10 non-overlapping independent sticker designs, themed around the fictional premium coffee brand 'AURA COFFEE'. All stickers strictly adhere to a minimalist flat 2D vector appearance, with absolutely no gradients, shadows, or 3D effects. The internal details of each sticker are rendered in absolutely uniform-weight, smooth, rounded pure black monoline strokes. The interior fill color of all stickers is a pure Off-White, and each sticker is surrounded by a thick, well-defined pure white die-cut border that clearly separates it from the dark background. The 10 specific sticker contents are as follows: 1. A half-body portrait of a short-haired girl wearing round vintage sunglasses, casually sipping an iced coffee through a straw with a laid-back demeanor. 2. An iconic lidded takeaway hot coffee paper cup with the brand name 'AURA' written in uppercase English at the center of the cup body. 3. An espresso machine composed of minimalist lines, with the brew head, portafilter handle, and steam wand clearly visible. 4. A top-down overhead view of a latte with saucer, featuring delicate heart-shaped latte art lines on the coffee surface. 5. A vintage hand-crank coffee bean grinder with a crank handle. 6. A plump-contoured croissant with several smooth curved lines on its surface to convey the flaky pastry texture. 7. A cute anthropomorphic coffee bean character with slender arms and legs, wearing a playful smile on its face and raising one hand to wave hello. 8. A text-only sticker designed in chunky bubble letter style, reading 'BREW' in uppercase English. 9. title: Hyper-Realistic Food Infographic Poster
prompt_cn:
This is a high-definition, hyper-realistic food photography and editorial-grade infographic poster in a vertical portrait orientation (approximately 3:4 ratio). The image presents 8K ultra-high-definition quality, employing a center-weighted vertical composition with no cropping or scaling. The photographic style features a shallow depth of field, with the food subject rendered crisp and sharp while the background is softly blurred. Lighting is cinematic studio-grade, with soft directional key light sculpting the extremely lifelike textures of the food, accompanied by subtle rim light along the edges, and highlights controlled to perfection. The image is divided into upper and lower scene modules, both containing suspended or falling freeze-frame motion elements. All infographic leader lines are thin, smooth, rounded gold lines, connecting text labels composed of metallic gold elegant serif typography (for ingredient names) and pure white clean sans-serif typography (for ingredient descriptions).

The upper half of the poster features a soft pastel pink smooth gradient background, with even lighting and no harsh shadows. At the center of the frame is a vertically stacked assortment of cake slices, levitating above a white ceramic round plate. The cake body comprises vanilla sponge cake layers, pristine white fresh cream layers, raspberry cream layers, and chocolate cream on top. Suspended dynamically in the air around the cake are fresh raspberries, blueberries, strawberries, vanilla and chocolate-flavored macarons, milk chocolate chunks, mint leaves, fine crushed nut fragments, and breadcrumbs frozen in mid-air. This section includes five sets of leader lines and text labels:
The first gold line points to the vanilla cake layer, with the text: 'Vanilla Cake – soft, fluffy sponge cake layered with white cream filling'
The second gold line points to the floating macarons, with the text: 'Macaron – creamy filling between almond meringue shells'
The third gold line points to the raspberries, with the text: 'Raspberries – juicy, fresh raspberries'
The fourth gold line points to the chocolate chunks, with the text: 'Chocolate Bar – chunks of smooth milk chocolate'
The fifth gold line points to the raspberry cream layer, with the text: 'Raspberry Cream – soft sponge cake

title: Luxury Perfume Sand Ad Photography
prompt_cn:
A high-end luxury product advertising photograph, utilizing a horizontal composition and shallow depth of field. From a direct top-down overhead perspective, a premium perfume bottle lies flat on a cream-colored fine sand surface with delicate texture. The perfume bottle features a thick, transparent rectangular glass body containing a pale golden liquid, topped with a smooth gold metallic cylindrical cap. The front of the perfume bottle is fully visible and positioned upright, with a minimalist white square label affixed to the center. The label bears clearly printed black serif text reading 'L'Éternité', beneath which are two smaller lines of black sans-serif text reading 'EAU DE PARFUM' and '100 ml - 3.4 FL.OZ.' respectively.

The cream-colored fine sand surface surrounding the perfume displays gentle, undulating wave-like traces suggesting recent breeze or manual interaction. The perfume is placed at the visual center of the frame, with generous blank space intentionally left around it. In the blank area of the lower right corner, a small dry branch bearing two half-open white magnolia blossoms and several emerald-green leaves is elegantly placed; in the upper left corner, three pristine white magnolia petals are sparsely scattered as supplementary visual elements, naturally enhancing the richness of the scene.

A warm, bright beam of natural sunlight streams diagonally from the upper left corner of the frame, casting clear and realistic warm-toned shadows on the lower right side of the sand undulations, the perfume bottle, and the magnolia flowers. Under the sunlight, the transparent glass bottle body creates bright golden caustic light patterns on the sand surface. The overall image presents an extremely high degree of photorealism at a 3D rendering level, with the focal point sharply concentrated on the front of the perfume bottle, while the scattered petals at the edges and sand surface textures exhibit a delicate bokeh transition. The overall lighting is sophisticated, warm, and serene.

title: Five-Grid Cheesy Food Poster
prompt_cn:
A vertically composed five-panel food action photography poster. The frame is evenly divided from top to bottom into five horizontal rectangular zones. The entire composition employs ultra-high-detail macro lenses with a shallow depth of field, blurred backgrounds, and focuses on the appetizing moment of two hands tearing food apart. The color tone is uniformly warm with a cinematic feel.

First zone (top): At the center of the frame, a pair of hands is pulling a freshly baked pizza slice away from the main pie. Long, elastic strings of mozzarella cheese stretch between the slice and the pie. The pizza crust edges feature a blistered, charred, crispy texture from baking; the surface emits visible white steam, and fine crumbs are falling through mid-air. The lighting is warm, oven-inspired cinematic lighting. The upper-left corner of the frame bears the white text '1/5,' and the lower-right corner displays a clear label reading 'CHEESE PULL.'

Second zone: Two hands are breaking open a syrup-soaked piece of Baklava. The paper-thin phyllo pastry layers crack and fracture clearly as they are pulled apart, revealing the interior filled with crushed emerald-green pistachio filling. Thick honey syrup forms glistening threads across the gap, with droplets of syrup suspended in mid-air about to drip. The lighting is a golden warm light. The upper-left corner bears the text '2/5,' and the lower-right corner displays the label 'SYRUP & CRUNCH.'

Third zone: Two hands are breaking a chocolate lava cake in half from the center. A smooth, rich, glossy dark chocolate molten lava is surging from the cake's core; steam rises slowly, and tiny dark cake crumbs hover suspended in mid-air. The lighting presents a soft, warm-toned spotlight effect. The upper-left corner bears the text '3/5,' and the lower-right corner displays the label 'MOLTEN CHOCOLATE.'

Fourth zone: Two hands are tearing apart a frosted cinnamon roll. The sticky cinnamon-sugar filling stretches into shiny, glossy threads across mid-air as it is pulled apart; white frosting slowly drips along the edges of the dough, and the internal fluffy, soft dough fiber texture is extremely clearly visible. The lighting is warm, cozy bakery-room lighting. The upper-left corner bears the text '4/5,' and the lower-right corner displays the label 'STICKY PULL.'

Fifth zone (bottom): Two hands are separating a slice of classic New York cheesecake. The interior of the cake reveals an ultra-dense, creamy texture that slowly parts as it is pulled apart; the crispy brown graham cracker crust base fractures from the center, and the cross-section shows a subtle creamy stretching texture. The lighting is soft, warm-toned studio light. The upper-left corner bears the text '5/5.'

title: Tokyo Miniature City 3D Map
prompt_cn: A macro photography–style 3D miniature landscape image. At the center of the frame is a vintage-style Tokyo street map laid flat on a dark, rough-hewn wooden tabletop. Rising upward from this two-dimensional flat map, a photorealistic 3D miniature Tokyo cityscape grows and emerges in three dimensions, resembling an exquisite city sandbox model. The miniature landscape contains extremely fine physical structures: a red-and-white miniature Tokyo Tower soars skyward with its steel lattice framework clearly visible; the white zebra-crossing stripes of the Shibuya Crossing crisscross on the ground, surrounded by tiny glowing LED billboards; an antique-styled architectural model of Senso-ji Temple's Kaminarimon gate is situated on one side, with a miniature red lantern hanging at its center. The city blocks and park areas are dotted with multiple miniature cherry blossom trees in full pink bloom, adding a touch of nature to the steel jungle. Among the densely packed modern skyscrapers, extremely tiny silhouettes of pedestrians and vehicles are faintly visible; a white miniature elevated rail track spans across city blocks, with a white Shinkansen bullet train running on it. Deep in a street corner, several exquisite miniature Japanese ramen shops hang traditional noren curtains, with warm yellow light glowing from their windows. On the map paper laid flat at the base, black English place names are clearly printed: 'TOKYO,' 'Shibuya,' and 'Minato City.' The image uses a vertical composition, with studio-grade soft top lighting cascading from the upper side, casting realistic shadows of the miniature buildings onto the map surface. An extremely shallow cinematic depth of field renders both the foreground tabletop and the distant background in soft optical bokeh, while the visual focal point is firmly locked onto the miniature city growing three-dimensionally at the center. The overall colors are rich, with cool-toned urban neon forming a striking contrast against the warm-toned street-corner lighting.

title: London Tower Bridge Isometric Illustration
prompt_cn:
A hand-drawn style isometric architectural illustration in landscape orientation, with a background featuring the texture of vintage beige engineering paper. At the center of the image, the famous landmark—Tower Bridge of London—is meticulously rendered. The main structure is drawn in rigorous isometric perspective, with lines in a deep gray hand-drawn ink texture, retaining some of the architectural sketch's perspective guide lines and cross-hatching used to convey light and shadow. The two Gothic main towers of Tower Bridge stand prominently at the center of the image, with clearly defined structural layers, finely depicting the masonry joints, arched windows, and pinnacles at the top. The upper-level horizontal pedestrian walkway between the two towers is clearly visible, while the lower bascule bridge deck is depicted in a state of opening at a 45-degree angle, revealing its internal structure. Suspension chain structures extend from both sides of the bridge towers, connecting to the approach spans on either end. The River Thames beneath the bridge is indicated with simple hand-drawn parallel wavy lines.

The image contains abundant drawing annotations and leader line descriptions. In the upper left corner, a prominent main title 'TOWER BRIDGE' is written in vintage architectural hand-lettering, with a slightly smaller subtitle beneath it reading 'LONDON, UK - COMPLETED 1894'. Around the main structure, fine straight leader lines extend outward pointing to specific structural elements, accompanied by the following text annotations: beside the leader line pointing to the high-level walkway is written 'HIGH-LEVEL WALKWAY'; the text pointing to the two towers respectively reads 'NORTH TOWER' and 'SOUTH TOWER'; the text pointing to the side suspension chains reads 'SUSPENSION CHAIN'; the text pointing to the opening center bridge deck reads 'BASCULE (OPENING SPAN)'; the text pointing to the pier base at the water surface reads 'PIER & ENGINE ROOM'; and beside the wavy lines representing the water below is annotated 'RIVER THAMES'.

In the blank space on the left side of the image, a simplified close-up perspective drawing of gears and a drive shaft is rendered, used to illustrate the internal drive system of the bridge deck, with 'HYDRAULIC MECHANISM' annotated above it. In the lower right corner, a hand-drawn style compass rose icon (with the letter 'N' annotated at the top) and a linear scale bar are drawn, with 'SCALE 1:1000' written above. The entire image presents a vintage technical drawing style that combines engineering rigor with hand-drawn artistic sensibility.

title: Retro Film Girl Silhouette Photography
prompt_cn:
This is a photograph with a strong vintage film texture, composed in a widescreen landscape format. The main subject is the silhouette of a remarkably charming young girl, wearing a high-necked, form-fitting black long-sleeved dress and cradling a bouquet of orange-pink flowers. The girl's skin is fair, delicate, and slightly translucent. Her long hair emits a soft halo under warm backlight, with several disheveled strands dancing wildly around her jawline. Due to the camera's panning motion and the girl's adorable dynamic movement, her delicate facial features and body contours exhibit noticeable motion blur and a swaying quality, accompanied by fantastical ghosting effects.

Beside the girl, a weathered old newsstand is faintly visible, with a cluster of dead wood piled next to it. Several flowers, also orange-pink in color, bloom among the dead branches, creating a visual echo with the bouquet in the girl's arms.

The entire image is covered with rich vintage film grain, and the background is engulfed by intense motion blur and pronounced trailing effects. A soft-focus lens paired with warm-toned, low-saturation filters renders the image hazy and languid. This treatment, which blends dynamic motion blur with film grain, creates a fantastical atmosphere full of narrative and cinematic quality. While showcasing the girl's sweet and vivid presence, it also exudes a hint of alluring yet dangerous unique temperament, presenting a highly fashion-forward social media–style visual effect.

title: Nordic Minimalist Girl Reading Illustration
prompt_cn: A Nordic minimalist lifestyle illustration in a vertical composition. At the center of the image, a girl with reddish-brown short hair is comfortably sitting on a mustard-yellow modern minimalist single-seat sofa, reading. She tilts her head slightly downward, holding an open book with a light blue cover in both hands. The girl wears an off-white turtleneck oversized sweater and light gray straight-cut linen trousers, with beige knitted socks on her feet. To the right of the sofa is a natural wood-toned round minimalist side table, on which sits a white ceramic mug with two soft, curving white steam lines rising from its rim. In the lower left corner of the image is a lush Monstera deliciosa plant, with large, rounded, low-saturation green leaves arranged in a staggered layout. Beneath the sofa and side table lies a sage-green circular rug with simple white line patterns. The background presents a flat geometric color-block combination: the main wall is a low-saturation grayish-pink, and behind the girl is a large beige arch-shaped color block extending upward to the top of the image, fully utilizing the vertical format's space. The overall image employs a low-saturation soft pastel color palette with flat design, yet incorporates extremely gentle color gradients along the edges of geometric shapes and in the background. Edge outlines are clean and crisp with no black strokes, perfectly creating a warm, cozy, and modern visual aesthetic.

title: Colorful Knit Beanie Fashion Line Drawing
prompt_cn: In a vertical composition against a pure white background, a detailed black-and-white ink line-art character close-up illustration is presented, blending the aesthetic styles of modern graphic novels and high-fashion illustration. The main subject is a young woman shown in a three-quarter profile view, her gaze slightly tilted to the left. Her facial features are soft and realistic, with large, expressive eyes, individually defined eyelashes, a clearly outlined nose bridge, and slightly parted lips wearing soft coral-red lipstick. She wears a winter knitted beanie with a pom-pom on top, covered in a colorful mosaic pattern composed of small rectangular color blocks in blue, yellow, pink, red, and cyan. Apart from this colorful hat and the coral-red lips, the rest of the image remains in high-contrast black-and-white monochrome. The woman has flowing long hair, with a few loose strands falling naturally; the hair texture is delicately rendered through ultra-fine sketch lines and cross-hatching techniques. She wears a sleeveless top, and her exposed shoulders and arms are covered with abstract geometric shapes and typographic-style tattoo designs composed of ultra-fine technical lines, evoking a visual quality of architectural blueprints and mechanical schematics. Clearly visible within the arm tattoos are typographic texts such as 'SYS-09', 'L-AXIS', and 'VOL. 4', accompanied by coordinate scales and connecting lines. The overall image features minimal shadow treatment with ultra-sharp lines, combining ink line art with digital refinement to deliver an elegant, fashionable, and high-definition visual effect.
prompt_en: In a vertical composition against a pure white background, a detailed black-and-white ink line-art character close-up illustration is presented, blending the aesthetic styles of modern graphic novels and high-fashion illustration. The main subject is a young woman shown in a three-quarter profile view, her gaze slightly tilted to the left. Her facial features are soft and realistic, with large, expressive eyes, individually defined eyelashes, a clearly outlined nose bridge, and slightly parted lips wearing soft coral-red lipstick. She wears a winter knitted beanie with a pom-pom on top, covered in a colorful mosaic pattern composed of small rectangular color blocks in blue, yellow, pink, red, and cyan. Apart from this colorful hat and the coral-red lips, the rest of the image remains in high-contrast black-and-white monochrome. The woman has flowing long hair, with a few loose strands falling naturally; the hair texture is delicately rendered through ultra-fine sketch lines and cross-hatching techniques. She wears a sleeveless top, and her exposed shoulders and arms are covered with abstract geometric shapes and typographic-style tattoo designs composed of ultra-fine technical lines, evoking a visual quality of architectural blueprints and mechanical schematics. Clearly visible within the arm tattoos are typographic texts such as 'SYS-09', 'L-AXIS', and 'VOL. 4', accompanied by coordinate scales and connecting lines. The overall image features minimal shadow treatment with ultra-sharp lines, combining ink line art with digital refinement to deliver an elegant, fashionable, and high-definition visual effect.

title: Italian Food Letter Creative Illustration
prompt_cn: High-quality digital illustration in a vertical composition. At the center of the image, the English word 'ITALY' is spelled out in bold, uppercase letters stacked vertically in a staggered arrangement. The typography has a pronounced three-dimensional sculptural quality, with the letters overlapping one another to enhance spatial depth and visual flow. Each letter is intricately filled with highly representative traditional Italian foods and ingredients, with the food elements perfectly conforming to the contours of the letters: the letter 'I' is composed of intertwined thin spaghetti strands, interspersed with vibrant cherry tomatoes and bright green basil leaves; the top of the letter 'T' is formed by a Neapolitan pizza with slightly charred edges covered in mozzarella cheese, while its vertical stroke consists of layered Italian thinly sliced salami and Parma ham; the letter 'A' is made of coarse-textured ciabatta bread, studded with black olives and oil-marinated small tomatoes; the letter 'L' is built from golden fried calamari rings and fried polenta pieces stacked together, with fresh lemon wedges squeezed in alongside; the letter 'Y' is sculpted from layers upon layers of lasagna and rich red meat ragù, its surface generously sprinkled with white Parmesan cheese shavings. The background is deep charcoal gray, accentuating the warm tones of the ingredients. Scattered naturally around the letters and in the blank spaces of the composition are unpeeled garlic cloves, fresh rosemary sprigs, black peppercorns, a light dusting of white flour, and a small ceramic condiment dish containing a mixture of extra virgin olive oil and balsamic vinegar. The food elements are rendered in an editorial food photography style with extremely high clarity and rich textural detail. Soft diffused light falls across the surface of the ingredients, revealing the delicate sheen of oils and the natural contours and textures of the food. The overall contrast is high, the colors are saturated, presenting a warm, inviting, and sophisticated visual aesthetic.

title: Amber Serum Luxury Ad Photography
prompt_cn:
This is an ultra-high-definition cinematic luxury skincare advertising photograph in a vertical portrait format. At the center of the frame stands an upright translucent amber-colored glass serum bottle with a press-pump dispenser. The bottle surface is covered with fine condensation droplets, rendered with lifelike realism. A minimalist-style label is affixed to the center of the bottle, printed with clear black English typographic text: the brand name 'LUMIÈRE' at the top, the product name 'AMBER RADIANCE SERUM' in the middle, and the volume '50 ML / 1.7 FL OZ' noted at the bottom. The bottle rests steadily on a curved, rough-textured piece of natural driftwood. On both sides of the driftwood, creamy white tropical flowers in full bloom and an unopened bud are symmetrically arranged, creating a sculptural visual balance. In the foreground, several slender dark brown vanilla bean pods are scattered casually.

The background is set in a warm desert-toned studio environment, with a soft sand-colored backdrop behind, onto which large, flowing shadow patterns are projected, creating a strong sense of spatial depth and dramatic chiaroscuro effect. The lighting employs high-contrast cinematic illumination, with a strong directional key light entering from the left side of the frame, penetrating the amber liquid inside the bottle and causing it to radiate a brilliant inner glow; simultaneously, it traces a sharp rim light along the edges of the glass bottle. The light naturally transitions to deep shadows on the right side, delivering a moody, high-fashion editorial quality charged with emotional tension.

The overall color palette is rich and sensually evocative, woven from gleaming golden amber, warm caramel, soft ivory, and deep earthy brown tones. The composition employs a slightly low-angle perspective with a centered close-up framing. An extremely shallow depth of field is utilized—the serum bottle, water droplets, and label text at the focal point are razor-sharp, while the background shadows and distant elements dissolve into creamy, velvety smooth bokeh. The atmosphere is elegant, mysterious, and exquisitely luxurious, with lifelike textural detail at 8K ultra-high resolution.

title: Cinematic Dramatic Lighting Portrait Close-Up
prompt_cn: Hyper-realistic, cinematic-grade portrait photography. The image employs a wide horizontal composition, focusing on a close-up of a young woman from the shoulders up. Her head is slightly tilted, her gaze directed off-camera, with a soft, contemplative expression. The facial proportions are natural, the skin texture is authentic, and fine details such as freckles are clearly visible, with a few slightly tousled strands of hair falling naturally across her face. She wears a black thin spaghetti-strap top, with minimalist styling and no accessories. The lighting carries intense dramatic tension—warm, directional side light illuminates one side of the face while the other side falls into deep shadow, creating strong contrast and emotional depth. The background is dark-toned, treated with soft blur to simulate the shallow depth of field and creamy bokeh effect of an 85mm portrait lens. The overall image features high dynamic range and naturally realistic editorial-grade color grading, with true-to-life skin tones and no artificial haloing.

title: Indonesian Curry Chicken Infographic Poster
prompt_cn:
A vertically composed, hyper-realistic Indonesian traditional cuisine infographic poster. The overall style follows modern culinary editorial typography, set against a clean, dramatically lit deep charcoal-gray background.

At the top center of the image, bold and eye-catching title text is printed, with the main heading reading 'KARI AYAM', immediately followed below by the subtitle indicating the dish's origin: 'ASAL: INDONESIA'.

In the lower half of the image sits a premium-textured dark ceramic bowl filled with appetizing Indonesian chicken curry, the rich golden broth glistening with specular highlights on its surface, while realistic white steam wisps rise gently from the bowl.

Directly above the bowl, a cinematic freeze-frame scene of levitating ingredients is presented: a piece of fresh chicken with clearly defined texture, vibrant red chilies, a sliced bright-yellow turmeric root, verdant kaffir lime leaves, a stalk of lemongrass, and several star anise pods, all floating in mid-air in a weightless state. Interspersed among these herbs and spices are glossy, dynamic splashes of golden curry sauce and milky-white coconut milk swirling and intertwining in the air, rendered with hyper-realistic texture that is utterly mouth-watering.

Distributed across the poster are clean, modern Indonesian-language text labels, precisely connected to their corresponding levitating ingredients via curved white thin-line arrows. The specific label texts include: 'Daging Ayam Segar' pointing to the chicken, 'Cabai Merah Besar' pointing to the red chilies, 'Serai Wangi' pointing to the lemongrass, 'Kunyit Segar' pointing to the turmeric, as well as 'Kuah Kari Kental' and 'Santan Kelapa' pointing to the splashing broth.

The entire image presents 8K DSLR-grade professional food photography quality. The photography employs a shallow depth of field effect, with the focal point concentrated on the levitating ingredients and splashing curry. Rich golden studio lighting enters from the side, tracing the edge contours of the ingredients and creating a professional, high-end, and intensely appetite-inducing visual atmosphere.

title: Natural Skincare Commercial Photography
prompt_cn: A high-end, realistic commercial skincare product photography image in vertical/portrait orientation. At the center of the frame stands an upright matte-white plastic pump-dispenser skincare bottle. The front of the bottle features clean, minimalist black sans-serif English lettering: the brand name 'hella beauty' at the very top, followed directly below in smaller font by the product name 'water bank moisture lotion'. Beneath the product name, several lines of fine dark-gray product description text are printed, reading 'HYDRATING & SOOTHING FORMULA' and the volume designation '150 ML / 5.0 FL. OZ.' at the bottom. The bottle is placed steadily on layered natural stone surfaces. Carefully arranged natural, organic props surround the bottle, presenting an overall balanced and symmetrical composition. The props include several smooth gray river stones, light beige rock pieces with rough porous textures, clusters of moist soft green moss, several delicate white pom-pom flowers, a few cream-colored daisy-like blooms, several pale green fern fronds, and a softly colored sage-green rose. The very foreground is partially framed by several softly blurred, out-of-focus white flowers, forming a foreground frame and creating smooth bokeh that greatly enhances the sense of spatial depth. The background is a seamless, soft warm-beige studio backdrop with a gentle subtle gradient effect and no visible physical edges. The lighting simulates soft, diffused natural daylight cascading from the upper left, casting gentle shadows on the right side of the stones, plants, and bottle, while producing naturally delicate highlights on the matte plastic bottle surface and the velvety petals. The overall color palette is dominated by warm neutrals, soft whites, sage greens, and desaturated earth tones. The image employs a shallow depth of field technique, with the focal point tack-sharp on the mid-ground product label, the micro-detail of the porous stone, and the moist moss, presenting a serene, airy, pure luxury botanical skincare advertising aesthetic with cinematic ultra-high photorealism.

title: Crayon Hand-Drawn New York City Illustration
prompt_cn: A neat, colorful hand-drawn illustration in crayon and colored pencil. The composition is in portrait orientation, with a white textured paper background featuring noticeable grain texture. At the very top of the image, the uppercase English letters 'NEW YORK' are hand-written in large, unevenly thick, and colorful crayon strokes, with each letter rendered in a different color (such as red, blue, yellow, green, orange, and purple alternating), exuding a childlike charm that matches the vibrant atmosphere of the city. Below the text, iconic landmarks of New York City are depicted. Slightly behind the center of the image stand the Empire State Building and the Chrysler Building, outlined with clean yet somewhat playful lines, with perspective rendered in a fairy-tale-like unevenness and slight tilt; on the left is the green Statue of Liberty, holding aloft a yellow torch; extending to the right are the brown towers and black suspension cables of the Brooklyn Bridge, with several curved lines in blue and cyan beneath the bridge representing water ripples. In front of the cluster of buildings, a few adorably shaped trees are scattered, their canopies in cloud-like forms filled with vivid green, paired with brown trunks. On the gray street at the bottom, a rounded classic yellow taxi cab is drawn. The sky in the background is very bright, with a yellow sun emitting short radiating lines in the upper right corner, surrounded by a few fluffy white clouds outlined in light blue lines. The overall drawing style is more refined than a typical children's drawing, with clear and smooth lines, yet retaining the charming imperfections of hand-drawing along with the characteristic smudged texture and brushstroke feel of crayons and colored pencils.

title: Retro Film Wildflower Portrait
prompt_cn: A cinematic wide-angle portrait photograph in vintage film style, composed in vertical orientation. At the center of the frame, a young woman sits in a bright field of wildflowers. She leans slightly forward, extending one arm to offer a pristine white daisy toward the camera. This daisy occupies the extreme foreground of the image, rendered in a soft, out-of-focus blur due to its extreme proximity to the lens, enhancing the spatial depth of the scene. The woman's facial expression is soft and captivating, with slightly tousled hair, conveying an effortless and naturally relaxed demeanor. She wears a sky-blue knitted sweater adorned with white cloud patterns on its surface, paired with light-colored washed denim jeans on her lower half. Around her, the expansive field is abloom with large swaths of bright yellow wildflowers and scattered daisies, brimming with vitality. The upper half of the frame features a dramatically charged cloudy sky, with rich and layered cloud formations. The entire scene is bathed in naturally soft light, with warm and saturated colors bearing a distinctly vintage film color tone. The use of shallow depth of field renders the subject sharp while the background is slightly blurred, combined with a magazine editorial-style composition, creating a nostalgic, dreamy, and timeless cinematic atmosphere.

title: Black & White Hyper-Realistic Female Portrait
prompt_cn: A hyper-realistic high-definition black-and-white portrait photograph. The main subject is a head-and-shoulders close-up of Georgina Rodríguez, composed in landscape orientation. Her body is slightly tilted to one side, with her face directed forward, but her gaze thoughtfully directed off-frame to the right, her expression neutral, contemplative, and carrying a hint of alluring languor. Facial details are rendered with extreme realism: fair and delicate skin with naturally scattered, prominent freckles across the bridge of the nose and both cheeks; deep-set almond eyes accentuated with upswept winged eyeliner and mascara; dark eyebrows with well-defined contours and a slight upward arch; full, moistened lips slightly parted; a soft jawline and youthful visage. She has dark shoulder-length hair styled in textured, tousled wavy curls, with curtain bangs naturally framing her face, and a few loose wisps of hair particularly distinct under the strong light. She wears a simple-textured white V-neck thin-strapped camisole top. The lighting simulates a direct frontal flash, creating an extreme high-contrast black-and-white chiaroscuro effect, with the subject's silhouette casting a sharp, hard-edged black shadow onto the flat, solid-colored background. The overall image is imbued with a 1990s vintage grunge aesthetic and lo-fi candid snapshot atmosphere, with an extremely sharp focal point that perfectly reveals lifelike skin pore texture and fine photographic film grain.

title: Retro Minimalist Café Vector Illustration
prompt_cn: A minimalist two-dimensional vector illustration poster in a retro line art style from the 1950s to 1960s. The image is in portrait orientation with a pure white background, featuring a centered composition showcasing the façade of a classic retro-style café. At the top center of the image, a large title 'Coffee Roasters Society' is prominently displayed in an elegant vintage English typeface. Below the title is the café's storefront design, topped with a wide striped awning that has the brand name 'Starbucks' clearly printed at the center of its front face. On the flat lintel beneath the awning, the founding year 'EST. 1971' is inscribed on the left side, and the city of origin 'Seattle' on the right. The main storefront consists of classic double wooden doors with mullioned glass panes and a large bright display window. In the area directly in front of the storefront, a minimalist outdoor bench is placed. title: Industrial Centrifugal Pump Infographic
prompt_cn: An advanced technical infographic poster in an industrial engineering style, in landscape orientation. The background features a deep navy blue technical drafting paper texture with very faint light gray grid lines. The overall color palette is dominated by steel gray and deep navy blue, with bright orange and bright yellow used as technical accent highlights. Shadow treatment is minimal, emphasizing industrial manufacturing-grade extreme clarity and precision. Positioned at the center of the image is an ultra-high-precision technical rendering of an industrial-grade multi-stage centrifugal pump rotor assembly. The object exhibits realistic metallic texture, with the surface displaying stainless steel brushed grain, metallic highlights, and polished chamfer details. Surrounding the central object, a dense and structured array of industrial technical elements is distributed: blueprint-style elongated dimension lines and leader lines extend from the central object, annotated with text: 'L=450.00±0.05 mm', 'Ø120.50 mm', 'R5.00', 'ANGLE: 45°'. The upper-left corner of the image presents a cross-sectional cutaway view of the rotor assembly, with the cut plane featuring standard diagonal engineering section lines, revealing the internal flow channel structure. The right side of the image contains an exploded-view assembly diagram, with components expanded outward along the central axis, clearly displaying the internal nuts, sealing rings, impellers, and bearings; parts are accompanied by leader lines and part numbers, with text reading: 'A01: MAIN SHAFT', 'A02: PRIMARY IMPELLER', 'A03: THRUST BEARING', 'A04: SEALING RING', 'A05: M8 HEX BOLT'. The lower-left corner features a material specification data block with an orange border, with text reading: 'MATERIAL SPECIFICATIONS', 'Shaft: Stainless Steel AISI 316L', 'Impeller: Cast Iron EN-GJL-250', 'Coating: Titanium Nitride (TiN)', 'Surface Finish: Ra 0.8'. Below the central object is a set of orange process flow arrows indicating manufacturing steps, with text reading sequentially: 'STEP 1: CNC TURNING', 'STEP 2: 5-AXIS MILLING', 'STEP 3: DYNAMIC BALANCING'.

title: Great Wall of China Blueprint Poster
prompt_cn: A high-resolution mixed-media composite poster in a left-right comparison layout, with an aspect ratio in a widescreen format. The image is divided in half from the exact center by a thin, sharp vertical white line. The left side of the image is a blueprint-style technical drawing of the Great Wall of China. The background is a classic deep blue, overlaid with finely detailed white engineering linework. The drawing includes a side elevation and a top-down plan view of the Great Wall. In the upper left of the image, the title text is clearly printed in large engineering typeface: 'THE GREAT WALL OF CHINA' with the subtitle 'ARCHITECTURAL SPECIFICATIONS.' In the side elevation, wall segments, watchtowers, and defensive structures such as crenels are meticulously depicted. Precise metric dimension data is annotated in English engineering typeface, including dashed lines and numerals for wall height: 'Wall Height: 7.8m,' top and base width annotations: 'Top Width: 5.8m,' 'Base Width: 6.5m,' and the spacing between two towers: 'Tower Spacing: 200m.' Next to the watchtower is an elevation annotation: 'Elevation: 850m.' Various defensive structures have leader lines indicating their names: 'Watchtower,' 'Parapet Wall,' 'Crenels.' The lower half of the drawing is a top-down view that follows the terrain's curvature, with a label reading: 'TOP DOWN LAYOUT,' alongside another label for the side elevation: 'SIDE ELEVATION.' The right side of the image is a high-definition real-life photograph of the Great Wall, presenting the corresponding grand and authentic scene. The shot employs a wide-angle panoramic perspective, with an ancient, winding Great Wall stretching like a giant dragon across the ridgelines of rolling, lush green mountains. The photo colors are vivid and natural, under bright natural daylight, with a clear light blue sky dotted with a few wispy white clouds. The grayish-brown masonry texture of the Great Wall, weathering marks, and the surrounding dense green vegetation are clearly visible. The rigorous monochromatic blueprint data on the left forms a striking visual contrast with the magnificent and realistic natural and cultural landscape on the right.

title: Coffee Machine Miniature Café Model
prompt_cn:
A hyper-realistic miniature model render presenting a dreamlike micro urban street scene with the quality of a premium commercial advertisement. The image uses a vertical portrait composition, with the visual center being a giant vintage Italian espresso machine transformed into a charming café building. The espresso machine body features midnight blue baked enamel finish alternating with polished brass material, forming the towering upper structure of the building. The machine surface has precision metal knobs, vintage analog pressure gauges, and metal lever handles, with clear gold brand lettering 'L'ESPRESSO' printed at the center of the body.

The ground level of the building is ingeniously converted into a cozy café storefront, with a small black signboard with gold lettering hanging above the façade, reading 'CAFE & ROASTERY.' The storefront is fitted with expansive transparent floor-to-ceiling glass windows, emanating warm and inviting amber-toned light from within. Through the glass, the miniature café interior structure is clearly visible, including a tiny solid wood bar counter, several small wooden round tables, a few metal bar stools in front of the counter, and mini decorative paintings on the walls, showcasing exquisite craftsmanship and sense of scale.

Surrounding the building is a clean and tidy cobblestone-paved miniature street. Lining both sides of the street are several exquisite black cast-iron vintage lampposts emitting soft halos of light. Outside the shop entrance, several miniature green broad-leaf potted plants and detailed curbside stone railings are placed as accents, creating a warm and hospitable neighborhood atmosphere.

The lighting effect of the image employs cinematic soft lighting, with the overall color tone contrasting between warm interior light and the slightly cool blue twilight ambient light of the surroundings. Metal surfaces have soft specular reflections, casting natural shadows. The image presents ultra-high resolution and extraordinarily rich detail, ingeniously merging product design with miniature architecture, conveying a surreal yet incredibly lifelike dreamlike quality.

title: Japanese Bathroom Isometric Miniature Model
prompt_cn: A horizontal wide-aspect 3D isometric miniature diorama-style rendering with tilt-shift depth-of-field photography effects and soft edge bokeh, exhibiting highly detailed dollhouse miniature scale. The scene presents a cozy Japanese-style bathroom corner from an overhead 45-degree isometric perspective. The bathroom walls are clad in cream-colored ceramic subway tiles with warm wooden trim moldings; the floor is laid with beige and white checkerboard tiles. The overall color palette is dominated by warm terracotta and beige tones. In the corner of the space sits a vintage clawfoot bathtub filled with rich blue foam. A wooden bath caddy stretches across the top of the tub, holding an open laptop, a green mug, a bar of soap, and a lit candle. Above the bathtub, a gold brass curved shower rod is mounted, with a drawn-back beige shower curtain. On the other side of the bathroom is a white porcelain washbasin with a wooden storage cabinet, fitted with brass faucets; above it on the wall hangs a round wooden-framed mirror, flanked by gold wall sconces emitting warm, soft light. Next to the washbasin is a toilet with a wooden toilet seat. The space is scattered with rich details: a small wooden stool stacked with rolled white towels and several books; on the floor sits a wicker laundry basket filled with pink and orange garments and colorful towels; in the center of the floor lies a round purple plush bath mat. A light blue fluffy towel hangs from wall hooks. The bathroom is also accented with a green wine bottle, a delicate miniature bonsai, and several small green plants in white pots. The overall lighting blends soft golden-hour warm light with the warm ambient glow from the interior wall sconces, casting gentle shadows, presenting ultra-high 8K-level texture clarity and a cozy, comfortable homey atmosphere.

title: Snowy 3D SNOW Letters Aerial View
prompt_cn: A 3D-rendered photorealistic-style image. The scene is captured from a direct top-down overhead perspective in a wide horizontal composition. Lying horizontally in the exact center of the frame are massive, three-dimensional bold English letters sculpted from pure white snow, clearly spelling out the word 'SNOW.' These snow-formed letters are extremely thick and voluminous with a strong sense of mass and rounded edges. They rest quietly on an expansive, flat snow surface, and due to their own weight, the bottoms of the letters slightly indent and sink into the snow layer beneath, with natural snow compression and transitional traces where the letter edges meet the surrounding snow. The material rendering across the entire scene is extremely realistic—the snow surface exhibits a soft granular texture accompanied by the appearance of tiny ice crystals. The lighting is expertly arranged, producing realistic highlights and soft shadows; gentle light creates glistening, bright highlights on the tops and light-facing surfaces of the snow letters, while casting soft pale blue-gray shadows on the shaded sides and in the recesses, perfectly accentuating the three-dimensional structure. The overall color palette is dominated by pure bright white and very pale ice blue, with extremely high image clarity and snow micro-textures rendered in exquisite detail.

title: Masquerade Ball Fashion Female Portrait
prompt_cn:
A vertical-composition hyperrealistic portrait photograph exhibiting raw fashion photography and paparazzi flash aesthetic. The main subject is an extremely attractive and strikingly beautiful young woman in her early twenties. She stands very close to the camera, her body leaning slightly forward from the waist, shoulders naturally drawn back slightly, chest naturally lifted, chin tucked subtly. Her face is symmetrical and refined, with deep, large eyes gazing directly into the lens, conveying intense eye contact and a sense of intimacy. Her eyebrows are naturally relaxed, her lips soft, glossy, and slightly parted, bearing a naturally confident smile. Her thick, dark brown long hair has a slightly tousled and voluminous texture, falling naturally in front of both shoulders, perfectly framing her face.

Her right hand is raised to cheek height, clearly holding an ornate silver-and-black Venetian masquerade mask, tilted outward to fully reveal its intricate filigree metalwork openwork design on the surface. The setting is a luxurious rooftop or balcony at night, with a very dark background rendered in shallow depth of field, showing only soft, blurred city nightscape light bokeh with no distracting elements. The image employs direct frontal flash lighting, with the light source positioned slightly above eye level, sculpting sharp highlights and clean, crisp shadows on the woman's eyes, cheekbones, collarbones, neckline skin, and the mask. The focal point is extremely sharp, with precise focus on the woman's eyes and the mask. The skin texture is hyper-realistic with clearly visible pores, and the reflective sheen of the sequins, the elaborate details of the mask, and every individual strand of hair are rendered with exceptional clarity and cinematic realism.

prompt_en:
A casual street-style photographic portrait shot in vertical medium close-up composition, with the viewpoint at eye level with the subject, focusing on the face and upper body. The main subject is a young woman with shoulder-length platinum blonde hair, the strands exhibiting soft wavy curls, parted in the middle and falling naturally. Her skin is fair, glowing with a healthy sheen under the sunlight; her eyebrows are a natural brown with a soft shape; her eyes are light green-gray, gazing directly into the camera with a soft, friendly look. She wears minimal natural no-makeup makeup, her lips a soft light pink, with a relaxed, natural smile.

She is wearing a fitted light yellow-green ribbed tank top with a small teal triceratops graphic on the chest. On her left ear, she wears a white wireless earbud, around her neck is a delicate gold metal choker necklace, and black backpack straps are visible on both shoulders.

The subject is standing outside a building with a European urban architectural style. In the background is a blue-gray metal door with a sign clearly printed with the German text 'Notausgang freihalten'. On the left side of the frame, a portion of a wall painted orange is partially visible. The lighting is natural light during the golden hour of early evening, with warm directional sidelight illuminating the subject and casting soft shadows on the wall behind her. The overall color tone is warm, conveying an everyday, relaxed, and approachable urban life atmosphere.
tags: Platinum Blonde Girl Sunny Street Portrait

title: Galaxy Buttercream Art Cake
prompt_cn: A hyper-realistic high-end dessert photography image. At the center of the frame is a single-layer round sponge cake placed on a white porcelain plate with gold trim. The cake surface features a three-dimensional buttercream rendition of Van Gogh's *The Starry Night*, including thickly applied buttercream swirls in alternating deep blue and bright yellow, three-dimensional star piping, miniature fondant cypress trees, and accents of edible gold leaf, with colors perfectly matching the original painting. The horizontal composition background is arranged with deep blue night sky and blurred starry elements echoing the artwork. The image employs studio soft lighting with shallow depth of field focused on the cake's texture, showcasing an oil-painting-like brushstroke quality. No text or watermarks.

title: Transparent Glass Coffee Machine Concept Design
prompt_cn: This is a high-end product photography poster image in a vertical format, presenting an overall visual style of minimalism, intelligence, and technological luxury. At the center of the frame is a fully transparent espresso machine reimagined as a luxurious tech art piece, along with a matching glass coffee cup. They are placed on a minimalist light-gray pedestal against a clean, seamless pure white to light-gray gradient background (cyclorama). The main body of the espresso machine is made of precision-molded optical glass with a faint green transparent sheen, with the internal mechanical structure fully exposed and arranged with meticulous precision. Clearly visible is the glass coffee bean hopper at the top containing real dark-brown roasted coffee beans; inside the body, brushed titanium and warm-gray hot water circulation pipes and pressure chambers run throughout, with grinding and extraction mechanical structures exuding a clean engineering aesthetic. Embedded within the machine's internal structure are physical motherboard-style circuits with soft industrial-orange trace lines and support components in graphite and titanium tones; these circuits are physical solid structures with no glowing effects whatsoever. On the side of the espresso machine, the glass body is engraved with the text 'BAGEL LABS' (no printing or stickers). Below is a matching glass coffee cup with an optically enhanced base, with a subtle 'BAGEL LABS' logo finely engraved near the bottom of the cup. The image captures an extremely precise dynamic moment: fresh coffee is flowing out of the espresso machine, smoothly pouring into the glass cup; through the transparent cup body, one can clearly see the coffee liquid's dynamics, color gradation, and the golden layer of crema on the surface, showcasing the ultimate beauty of liquid fluid dynamics. The photography employs soft studio high-key lighting with no harsh shadows, and precisely controlled reflections that perfectly highlight the heft of the glass, realistic refraction effects, and the macro-detailed metal and circuit textures inside the machine. Minimal typographic elements are overlaid on the image: in the lower-left corner, there are two lines of minimal small black text—the first line reading 'Transparent Espresso System' and the second line reading 'Engineered Glass / Integrated Circuitry'; in the lower-right corner, there is a small, understated monochrome 'BAGEL LABS' logo. The image contains no people, no extraneous objects, no packaging boxes, and no complex kitchen environment—the focus is entirely on this set of perfect tech-forward everyday objects.

title: Nepali Dumpling Ingredient Deconstruction Levitation
prompt_cn: An extremely cinematic and dramatically compelling macro food photography shot in vertical composition. The scene is set in a dark-toned, rustic, deep-colored countryside kitchen environment, with the background exhibiting a strong bokeh effect produced by shallow depth of field. The lower half of the frame features a heavy wooden cutting board bearing weathered marks, its surface covered with coarse wood grain and deep cracks. Stacked on the cutting board are several freshly steamed, piping-hot Nepalese dumplings (Momo). The dumpling wrappers are oily and lustrous, their surfaces gleaming with a faint, appetizing sheen of oil, while the hand-pinched pleats at the top are exquisitely three-dimensional with clearly visible details. Rich, visually striking white steam rises and curls from the dumplings, swirling through the air. The upper half of the frame presents a 'time-frozen' deconstructed explosion view. Translucent raw dumpling wrappers, tightly kneaded meatballs studded with spice granules, and scattered fresh green herb leaves (such as cilantro and scallion segments) are captured in a separated, suspended state, frozen in mid-air. The entire frame is imbued with an intense sense of frozen motion: the air is filled with fine suspended flour particles, reddish-brown spice powder trails frozen mid-trajectory, accompanied by several highly dynamic, slow-motion-like droplet splashes. Falling green herb leaves and the thick rising steam from below merge seamlessly in the space. In terms of lighting and color, cinematic studio-grade lighting is employed, with warm, inviting highlights striking the surface of the ingredients, creating strong high contrast against deep, heavy shadows, presenting a premium aesthetic in the style of professional food magazine editorial photography. The ingredients in the foreground, splashing liquids, suspended flour particles, and the dry, cracked texture of the wooden board all maintain extremely sharp focus and ultra-high-definition macro detail rendering, perfectly highlighting the structure and texture of the food.

title: Blue Sky Film Triptych Female Portrait
prompt_cn: A vertically oriented photographic triptych with a 35mm film photography aesthetic. The frame is divided vertically into three equally sized panels stacked top to bottom, each depicting different poses of the same young woman outdoors in sunlight. The woman has dark, slightly tousled wavy hair with a few strands naturally lifted by a gentle breeze, and she wears a simple white camisole top. The background across all three panels is a clear, bright, cloudless azure sky. The upper panel employs a low-angle upward shot; the woman looks down quietly at the camera with a direct yet slightly contemplative gaze, bright afternoon sunlight illuminating one side of her face and shoulder from the side, creating soft, natural shadows. The middle panel uses an eye-level perspective with a slight upward tilt; the subject is positioned slightly off-center to emphasize the expansive sky, her head turned toward the right side of the frame, gazing into the distance with a pensive and detached expression; a small brownish columnar rooftop structure is faintly visible at the lower-left edge of the frame. The lower panel is an extreme close-up side-profile shot of her face; the woman has her eyes gently closed, her head tilted slightly back, her expression supremely calm and serene, the bright sunlight precisely delineating the elegant contours of her facial features and the line of her neck. The overall imagery is shot with a wide aperture, with sharp focus on the subject's face and a shallow depth of field. In terms of color palette, warm and authentic natural skin tones contrast with the vivid, bright blue sky. The images exhibit pronounced film grain, a nostalgic atmosphere, and the style of high-end editorial magazine portraiture. The lighting is purely natural diffused sunlight with no artificial lighting or digital skin-retouching, preserving the skin's genuine texture and minor imperfections. The overall mood is tranquil, ethereal, fresh, and imbued with a remarkable sense of airiness.

title: Bubble Wrap Fashion Minimalist Photography
prompt_cn: In a minimalist-composition vertical high-fashion photography frame, the center showcases an elegant haute couture gown made entirely of transparent bubble wrap. The dress is completely hollow inside, with no objects or model supporting it, presenting a three-dimensional suspended state as if worn by an invisible person. This bubble wrap dress features exquisite tailoring, including a fitted waist design and a naturally draping, voluminous skirt hem. The material is crystal-clear and highly glossy, with extremely rich detail, hyper-realistically reproducing the physical texture of inflated plastic bubbles—each neatly arranged, plump bubble refracts delicate highlights and clear contours under the light. The frame employs soft, diffused studio lighting that evenly penetrates and illuminates the transparent dress body, eliminating harsh shadows and enhancing the material's translucency. The background is a pure, neutral light-gray seamless backdrop with no extraneous objects or decorations, creating an exceptionally clean, modern, and minimalist visual aesthetic. The overall presentation achieves a high-fashion editorial style with photorealistic rendering, with an extremely sharp focal point that perfectly highlights the unique texture born from the collision between the everyday bubble wrap material and the elegant fashion silhouette.

title: Party Flash Photo Sticker Strip
prompt_cn:
A four-panel photo collage arranged in a 2x2 grid, simulating the authentic style of selfie snapshots taken with a phone's flash after a party. The overall frame is divided into four rectangular blocks—top-left, top-right, bottom-left, and bottom-right—separated by clean, thin-line borders. There is no text, icons, or watermarks anywhere in the frame.

The subject across all four panels is the same young woman. She has a head of thick, voluminous chestnut-brown wavy curls in a side-parted style, with hair exhibiting a natural, healthy sheen and no golden highlights. Her makeup is in a refined party style, featuring crisp, clean eyeliner and thick, curled lashes, warm-toned blush blended onto her cheeks, and soft matte red lipstick on her lips. She wears a pair of medium-sized metallic hoop earrings and a shiny, sparkling red strapless bodycon mini dress. The background is uniformly an indoor hallway or room corner, with walls covered in warm beige wallpaper bearing subtle dark floral patterns, in a minimal setting with no extraneous props.

Top-left panel (first frame): Half-body composition, the woman in a three-quarter side-facing pose with her face turned toward the camera, lips slightly parted as if caught in the midst of laughter, eyes looking directly into the lens.

Top-right panel (second frame): The woman makes a playful pout-kiss expression toward the camera, one hand gently touching her own cheek, both eyes gazing into the lens.

Bottom-left panel (third frame): A tighter close-up composition, with the woman's head slightly tilted, a soft smile at the corners of her mouth, eyes looking gently toward the camera.

Bottom-right panel (fourth frame): The woman presents a confident side-profile view, one hand lightly resting near her chin and jawline, eyes still directed toward the camera, exuding a post-party languidness and ease.

In terms of visual details and style, all four photos employ lighting that simulates an on-camera direct phone flash, with the subject appearing bright and clear while the light softly falls off toward the edges, casting gentle peripheral shadows on the wall behind the subject. Highlights are well-controlled with no overexposure. The overall frame conveys a warm-toned, dimly lit indoor ambiance. The image quality presents an unretouched, authentic texture, with the subject's skin retaining real texture without any beauty-filter smoothing effect. The lens exhibits slight wide-angle perspective distortion, and the frame is overlaid with subtle noise and film grain, producing a natural, vivid candid snapshot effect.

title: Street Telephoto Bokeh Female Candid
prompt_cn:
This is a street photography candid portrait photograph with an extremely high degree of realism. The image is in vertical/portrait orientation, shot from a viewpoint at the subject's chest-to-eye level, utilizing the spatial compression of a telephoto lens and an extremely shallow depth of field to render the female subject in the middle ground as the sole sharp focal point of the frame. The subject is a young woman with fair skin, fine natural freckles, and realistic skin pore texture visible on her face. She is positioned slightly left of center in the frame, visible from the chest up. She has medium-brown hair pulled into a messy low bun, with a few strands of hair—carrying a slightly damp, urban texture—falling loosely around her face. Her body is angled toward the right side of the frame (in a three-quarter profile), with her head turned back over her left shoulder, both eyes looking directly into the lens. Her gaze conveys a soft intensity; her expression is calm, relaxed, with a faint hint of seriousness and curiosity. She wears a beige matte cotton trench coat with the collar open, revealing the classic lapels, the fabric texture clearly visible within the focal plane; on her right shoulder, a thin gold chain strap is faintly visible, catching a subtle glint of light, and a small warm-toned earring adorns her earlobe.

The image uses heavy bokeh in both the foreground and background to isolate the subject. The left third of the foreground is occupied by the blurred torso of a middle-aged man wearing a grey-blue coat; the lower-right foreground contains a blurred figure with dark hair; and behind the subject's right shoulder, the blurred head and shoulders of an elderly bald man are faintly discernible. The background is a bustling, crowd-dense metropolitan street, with all background elements dissolved into a creamy smooth bokeh, devoid of any sharp details or legible signage. Within the background, the blurred outline of a yellow taxi cab can be identified, along with warm orange urban light bokeh spots interspersed throughout.

Regarding lighting and color grading, the scene is bathed in natural diffused light ranging from overcast to soft daylight, with no harsh shadows; the subject's face is evenly lit, with soft highlights on the cheekbones and bridge of the nose. The overall color palette exhibits cinematic-grade color science, with shadows and the background enveloped in a teal/grey-green haze, contrasting against the subject's warm, natural skin tones. The bokeh edges of the frame carry a subtle cat-eye bokeh effect, with delicate halation in the bright-area bokeh, accompanied by fine film grain texture and soft vignetting. The foreground figures exhibit a touch of natural motion blur, and the overall image conveys a high-fashion editorial street documentary aesthetic.
