title: Night Party Couple Kissing Candid
prompt_cn:
A hyper-realistic candid photograph taken at a nighttime party, composed in a widescreen format. At the center of the frame is a half-body shot of a man and a woman in an intimate interaction. The woman on the left faces the camera, displaying a happy and natural smile with her head tilted slightly to the right; the man on the right has turned his head and is gently kissing the woman's cheek with closed lips. The woman's arms are wrapped around the man's neck and shoulders, while the man's arms are tightly embracing the woman's waist and back.

The woman wears her hair in an elegant, sleek, and neatly swept-back updo. Both ears are adorned with striking oversized gold earrings in the shape of suns or stars, and a delicate gold bracelet graces her wrist; she is dressed in a solid-colored, opaque evening party dress, and her face is unobstructed by the man, fully clear and visible. The man has naturally slightly tousled short hair, realistic short stubble along his jawline, a gentle demeanor, and wears a light-colored solid shirt. The body language and hand structures of both individuals are natural and anatomically accurate.

The scene is set at a nighttime party event. The photograph employs the classic on-camera direct flash lighting effect, with the subjects' faces and upper bodies evenly illuminated by strong light, producing realistic and natural skin tones; the background appears very dim due to light falloff, exhibiting an extremely shallow depth of field. The dark-toned background extends to both sides, scattered with numerous warm orange-yellow out-of-focus circular light spots (bokeh) and extremely blurred silhouettes of crowds. The image possesses an exceptionally high degree of realism and sharp clarity, with a subtle natural film grain texture, an overall warm color tone, and contains no text, logos, or watermarks whatsoever.

The image possesses an exceptionally high degree of realism and sharp clarity, with a subtle natural film grain texture, an overall warm color tone, and contains no text, logos, or watermarks whatsoever.

title: Breezy Fashion Face Close-Up Portrait
prompt_cn:
A high-quality fashion editorial portrait photograph. The image employs a vertical format with a tight facial close-up composition, shot from a slightly low angle looking upward, with the subject centered, the top of the head slightly cropped out of frame, and the face and upper portion of the neck fully and clearly visible.

The subject is a young woman with fair skin that retains realistic skin texture and soft highlights. She has an oval face, with her partially visible forehead illuminated by soft light. Her brown eyebrows exhibit a natural shape and medium thickness; her light-colored (greenish or light hazel) almond-shaped eyes convey a relaxed, neutral expression, with her gaze directed slightly downward toward the camera. Her nose bridge is straight and well-proportioned, and her full lips are slightly parted with a glossy, luminous sheen on their surface. Her overall demeanor is calm and composed. Her hair is a light brown with warm-toned highlights, and loose wavy curls naturally frame her face, with a few strands lifted in mid-air suggesting the presence of a gentle breeze or a sense of movement; there is no visible hair part at the top.

She wears a deep red and white form-fitting turtleneck top made of smooth, structured fabric, printed with ornate floral and Baroque-style patterns. The subject in the image is not wearing any jewelry, glasses, or head accessories.

The lighting is natural sunlight, with strong sidelight cast from the upper left, creating a pronounced chiaroscuro contrast between the lit areas and the shadows. Prominent bright highlights appear on the cheekbones, nose bridge, and lips, while the right side of the cheek is enveloped in softly transitioning shadows. The background is an outdoor pure blue sky, rendered in a completely smooth bokeh with a shallow depth of field effect, with no visible objects or textures. The overall color tone is naturally warm with moderate saturation, the image has extremely low noise, and the focus falls precisely on the subject's eyes and lips, presenting a clean, minimalist, and highly realistic aesthetic.

title: Retro Film Side-Lit Portrait Photography
prompt_cn: A portrait photograph with vintage aesthetics and cinematic quality. In a horizontal composition, the subject is a figure sitting quietly, presented in a medium close-up. The subject's facial expression is contemplative and dreamy, with a slightly hazy gaze, and one hand resting gently near the cheek in a naturally relaxed pose. The image employs soft yet dramatic lighting effects, with a beam of warm golden sunlight cast from the side, illuminating part of the subject's face, while the other side of the face and the edges of the body recede into deep shadows, creating a strong chiaroscuro contrast and an atmosphere filled with emotional tension. The background is softly blurred with muted tones, eliminating extraneous distracting elements and focusing the viewer's attention entirely on the subject's face. The overall image carries a pronounced film grain texture and soft-focus effect, evoking a serene, comfortable, and highly artistic atmosphere.

prompt_cn: An extreme macro beauty product advertising image showcasing premium ASMR-style cosmetic silky textures. title: Minimalist Leather Lounge Chair Product Page
prompt_cn:
An inner-page layout poster for a product design portfolio or high-end design journal, adopting a vertical portrait proportion. The overall background presents a warm, neutral base tone with a delicate paper texture. The composition is clearly divided into upper and lower zones, conveying a calm, professional, and sophisticated architectural aesthetic.

The upper portion dominates the frame, with generous whitespace margins on all sides. Centered in the middle is an editorial-quality product photograph of a modern minimalist lounge chair. The lounge chair features deep tobacco-brown full-grain leather seat cushions and backrest, solid walnut armrests with visible wood grain on both sides, and a carbon-black matte-finish metal round-tube base frame. The product is situated within a minimalist architectural interior space; the floor is a light-grey stone surface with subtle texture, and the background is a warm-toned plastered wall with a granular finish. Angled, lateral natural sunlight enters from one side of the frame, casting soft yet high-contrast elongated diagonal shadows across the floor and wall. This section exhibits a high-fidelity, highly realistic magazine photography quality, with warm, soft, low-saturation colors.

The lower portion serves as the technical specifications and materials panel, employing a clean, rigorous, modular architectural grid layout. In the upper-left area is a line of minimal dark-black section heading text: 'TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS & MATERIALS'. In the lower-left and lower-center areas, three refined architectural wireframe drawings of the lounge chair are displayed side by side, representing the front elevation, side elevation, and sectional side view respectively. The drawings use orthographic projection, rendered with extremely fine vintage dark-brown lines. Alongside the drawings are minimal structural and dimensional annotation texts, typeset with restraint in a soft dark-black sans-serif small font: 'FRONT ELEVATION', 'SIDE ELEVATION', 'SECTIONAL VIEW', 'SEAT HEIGHT 420MM', 'OVERALL WIDTH 750MM', 'BACKREST ANGLE 105°', 'STEEL TUBING DIA 25MM'.

In the lower-right corner is a materials showcase panel, with three rectangular material swatch blocks arranged vertically. The first block displays a tobacco-brown leather texture, with the adjacent annotation text reading: 'MATERIAL 01: FULL GRAIN ANILINE LEATHER, TOBACCO BROWN'; the second block displays walnut wood grain material, annotated as: 'MATERIAL 02: SOLID

title: Modern Lounge Chair Design Catalog Spread
prompt_cn:
An inner-page layout illustration for a product design catalogue, with an overall horizontal wide-format proportion and a base tone exhibiting a warm, neutral paper texture. The layout presents a clean architectural sensibility, primarily divided into a lifestyle product hero image in the upper area and a technical specifications panel in the lower area.

The upper half of the composition occupies the majority of the visual space, showcasing a modern lounge chair in a minimalist, highly realistic editorial-grade photography style. The chair body consists of a curved walnut backrest panel, a silver brushed stainless-steel support frame, and a beige linen seat cushion, placed centered and slightly above middle. Its setting is a minimalist architectural interior scene, with a warm-toned plaster wall featuring delicate texture behind it, and a light-grey concrete floor surface with subtle natural mottling. A beam of angled natural sunlight illuminates the chair from the side, casting soft yet sharply contrasting diagonal shadows on the wall and floor. Generous breathing whitespace surrounds the product, and the overall photographic tone is warm, soft, and richly textured.

The lower half of the composition is a technical specifications panel arranged in a modular grid. In the lower-left and lower-center areas of the panel, three orthographic projection architectural drawings of the chair are displayed, rendered with slender dark-brown technical lines. The leftmost is the front elevation of the chair, accompanied by fine dimension annotation lines and text reading 'H 780 mm' and 'W 650 mm'; the middle is the side elevation, with dimension annotations 'SH 420 mm' and 'D 700 mm'; to the right of the drawing area is a three-quarter angle internal sectional view, from which two thin leader lines extend, connecting to minimal structural description texts reading 'Ergonomic plywood shell' and 'High-density foam'.

The lower-right area of the bottom half features three square physical material sample swatches arranged in a row. From left to right, the first sample displays a beige linen fabric texture, with minimal dark-brown small text at the bottom reading 'Premium Linen Blend / Beige'; the second sample displays walnut wood grain, annotated below as 'Bent Walnut Veneer / Matte Finish'; the third sample displays a brushed stainless-steel metal texture, annotated below as 'Brushed Stainless Steel / Grade 304'.

All text annotations throughout the entire illustration use soft dark-brown or black, with small font sizes and restrained typesetting, without any exaggerated large

prompt_cn:
A horizontal double-spread travel magazine column guide design, presenting a cute, information-dense, and richly illustrated "photo book" layout style. The overall page base color is a soft light beige, with edges adorned by hand-drawn style small daisies, pine cones, snow mountain sketches, and dotted flight path trails, creating a relaxed and cute travel diary atmosphere. The left side of the image (occupying approximately 60% of the total width) features a visually striking real-life photograph of the Kashmir Valley. The photo background shows the majestic Himalayan snow-capped mountains, lush alpine pine forests, and the sparkling Dal Lake glistening under sunlight. In the foreground of the photo on the lakeside meadow, a young female traveler is perfectly integrated into the scene, wearing a bright yellow windbreaker jacket, blue jeans, and a pair of brown hiking boots, with a red knitted beanie on her head. She is carrying a vintage leather backpack, holding up a DSLR camera with both hands facing the lake to take photos, her posture natural, fully immersed in sightseeing. The photo edges feature a Polaroid-style wide white border design, "pinned" to the page with a hand-drawn green paper clip with a drop shadow effect.

On the right side and upper area of the image, beautifully typeset text information blocks with rounded, cute fonts are cleverly distributed. In the upper left corner, the main title is written in prominent dark green bold large text: 'BEAUTIFUL KASHMIR VALLEY', immediately followed below by an orange-red subtitle: 'YOUR ULTIMATE TRAVEL GUIDE'. The right-side layout is divided into three main information blocks, with backgrounds of light pink, light blue, and pale yellow rounded rectangle color blocks respectively.

The upper right area is the introduction block, with text content reading: 'Welcome to the crown jewel of India! Nestled in the Himalayas, the Kashmir Valley offers breathtaking landscapes, serene lakes, and a rich cultural heritage. title: Crochet Miniature Airport Fairy Tale Scene
prompt_cn: A macro photography-style vertical miniature scene photograph, showcasing a whimsical and adorably charming airport and cityscape made entirely of crochet and yarn. The visual center of the image is a towering mint green crocheted airport control tower, with clearly visible yarn knitting textures on its surface, featuring white decorative details and an antenna on top. Near the control tower is a large crocheted passenger aircraft parked beside a terminal building, with warm orange light glowing from inside. The foreground features a crocheted road, on which a teal miniature crocheted camper van is driving with tiny luggage strapped to its roof, and nearby is a small blue classic car. Both sides of the road are dotted with tiny yarn-crocheted daisies and green grass patches. The background is a row of crocheted city skyline with several tall buildings standing. The sky presents a beautiful sunset scene, with soft clouds floating and casting golden hour soft light. Every item in the image clearly displays detailed yarn stitches and knitted textures. The overall color palette uses soft pastel tones, complemented by warm sunset lighting, extremely rich details, and a dreamy bokeh effect from shallow depth of field, creating an exceptionally cozy, warm, and handcraft aesthetic visual experience.

title: Beach Bikini Girl Playful Selfie
prompt_cn: A 4K high-resolution, hyper-realistic candid selfie photograph in landscape orientation. The main subject is a young woman with fair skin, the frame capturing her shoulders, collarbones, and part of her upper body. She has long, straight, light brown hair with a few strands blowing in the wind. She is positioned in the close foreground of a selfie perspective, her head slightly tilted, playfully sticking out her tongue, with her gaze directed to the side away from the camera. She is wearing a black thin-strapped bikini top with delicate lace trim along the edges. Around her neck, she wears layered gold necklaces featuring a gold cross pendant encrusted with tiny crystals, with a gold 'CD' logo charm incorporated into the chain. The subject is set in an open beach environment. In the background behind her, the blue-gray sea is rough with rolling white foam and surf. The sky is overcast, filled with white and gray clouds, though patches of bright light break through the cloud cover. In the far distance on the sea, the silhouette outlines of a pier or architectural structures are faintly discernible, along with scattered tiny figures of people in the water. The lighting is natural daylight with a slight backlit effect, casting soft shadows on the woman's face. The color palette combines cool oceanic blues, warm skin tones, and bright sky light, conveying a relaxed, playful summer beach vacation atmosphere. The lens focus is sharply concentrated on the woman's face, while the ocean and sky in the background exhibit a soft, shallow depth-of-field blur, emphasizing the main subject.

title: Cozy Kitchen Afternoon Tea Time
prompt_cn: A hyper-realistic, cinematic-style photograph in 16:9 widescreen composition, depicting a warm and cozy kitchen scene. At the center of the frame is a young woman seated at a small round table in the kitchen. She has naturally slightly wavy long hair, casually draped over both shoulders, and is wearing a sleeveless dress in a soft, muted tone (such as a gentle Morandi pale pink) with a soft, draping fabric. Her posture is natural and relaxed, both hands gently holding a vintage floral-patterned ceramic teacup, bringing it slightly close to her lips. Her expression is calm and contemplative, with extremely realistic and delicate facial skin texture, preserving authentic detail without excessive retouching. The surface of the small round table is covered with a woven placemat, upon which sits a vintage floral teapot matching the teacup. The background is a bright kitchen softly blurred by shallow depth of field, where one can faintly make out metal pans hanging on the wall and a wooden shelf holding kitchen utensils. The shot is framed in a medium shot with the realistic perspective of a 50mm focal length, the focus precisely locked on the woman's face and the teacup in her hands. Soft natural daylight streams in from a window to the side, tracing delicate light and shadow along her profile, hair strands, and the rim of the ceramic teacup. The overall color tone of the image leans warm, with cinematic film-like color grading and a subtle grain texture. High dynamic range preserves rich highlights and shadow details, creating a serene, authentic atmosphere imbued with an intimate, slice-of-life narrative quality.

title: Woman & Cat Behind Rainy Car Window
prompt_cn:
A nighttime film photograph with a strong Wong Kar-wai cinematic aesthetic and 90s retro fashion style, captured with a 35mm lens, featuring fine film grain texture and realistic detail. The landscape-oriented composition presents a scene shot from outside the car at eye level, looking inward through a rain-speckled car window.

The foreground features a transparent car window glass covered with winding water trails, with ambient glimmers of light reflecting off the raindrops. Inside the vehicle—a vintage black sedan—a woman and a cat sit side by side on dark burgundy leather seats.

At the visual center of the frame sits a stylish young Asian woman with long black hair. She wears a pair of bright red vintage cat-eye sunglasses, oversized gold metal hoop earrings, and highly glossy true-red lipstick. She is dressed in a fuzzy-textured green sweater, striking a cool and nonchalant pose.

Beside her sits a large, fluffy orange tabby cat with Maine Coon-like features. The cat wears a striking red bandana around its neck and gazes forward with a calm, composed demeanor.

The lighting employs a direct on-camera flash effect, rendering the lit surfaces of the woman and the orange cat sharp and richly saturated, while creating high-contrast, deep shadows within the car interior. Through the far side of the car window, the background reveals a blurred cityscape of night street lights, their glow dissolving into an interplay of cyan and green psychedelic bokeh orbs, evoking a narrative-rich, atmospheric nighttime street ambiance.

title: Candy Wrapper & Ant Siege Metaphor
prompt_cn: A vertical-ratio cinematic realistic still-life photography poster, employing minimalist composition and symbolic techniques. The scene is set outdoors on a clean, smooth, light grayish-white stone-textured flat surface, bathed in soft natural diffused light. Slightly below the center of the frame, two originally identical square caramel-colored toffee candies are placed, presenting a striking visual contrast. The toffee on the right is neatly wrapped in shiny transparent and gold-toned candy wrapper, its surface reflecting delicate highlights, appearing clean, self-contained, and perfectly intact. The toffee on the left is completely unwrapped, with the caramel-colored candy block directly exposed. The surface and sides of this bare toffee are densely covered with black ants, and a trail of tiny ants is slowly crawling and converging toward it from the lower-left corner of the frame, surrounding it layer by layer; meanwhile, the area around the wrapper-protected toffee on the right is perfectly clean, with no ants approaching at all. The image is shot from a macro lens perspective, with the background featuring a soft depth-of-field bokeh effect, the color tone cool and restrained, and the light-shadow transitions natural. title: Urban Woman Dramatic Night Portrait
prompt_cn: A landscape-oriented portrait photography image. The main subject is a young woman with slightly tousled brown hair, wearing a color-block jacket composed of white, orange, and black patches. She is leaning against a dark pillar or wall, tilting her head slightly upward and gazing above, with a contemplative expression on her face. The image exhibits a strong dramatic chiaroscuro effect: a bright beam of light shines from the upper right of the frame, partially illuminating her face and lending her skin a warm, soft tone; simultaneously, deep shadows are cast on the left side of her face and in the background behind her, with the shadowed areas faintly revealing subtle cool tones. The background is softly blurred, overall visually dark, with vaguely discernible blurred outlines of city buildings and faint urban nightscape bokeh, creating a serene urban nighttime atmosphere.

title: The Real Cost of Coffee Infographic
prompt_cn: An ultra-sharp minimalist editorial infographic, shot from a 90-degree top-down flat-lay perspective. Landscape orientation, on a light grayish-white clean background at the very center of the frame, a pure white ceramic coffee cup is placed, containing a high-quality caramel macchiato with an elaborate latte art pattern and a crosshatch caramel drizzle on the surface, exhibiting natural food coloring. Surrounding the coffee cup is a fund flow infographic. It adopts a monochromatic UI style (black, white, gray) paired with vivid emerald green as the sole accent color, presenting a premium visual quality reminiscent of Apple UI combined with *National Geographic*, with clearly structured typographic hierarchy. In the upper-left corner, there is a prominent, extra-bold sans-serif high-contrast large headline: 'THE REAL COST OF YOUR COFFEE,' immediately followed below by the large total price figure: '$5.00,' serving as the visual focal point. From the central coffee cup, thin dark-gray arrows radiate outward in all directions, connecting to various cost breakdowns. The arrow to the upper right points to an emerald-green donut chart, accompanied by prominent text reading 'PROFIT,' '10%,' and '$0.50.' The arrow to the middle right connects to a dark-gray horizontal progress bar representing labor costs, with text reading 'LABOR,' '30%,' and '$1.50.' The arrow to the lower right connects to a progress bar and a small building icon representing rent, with text reading 'RENT,' '25%,' and '$1.25.' The arrow to the middle left connects to a coffee bean icon and progress bar, with text reading 'INGREDIENTS,' '15%,' and '$0.75.' The arrow to the lower left connects to a gear icon and progress bar, with text reading 'OPERATIONS,' '10%,' and '$0.50.' Two arrows at the bottom point to packaging and branding respectively, each accompanied by a paper cup icon and a megaphone icon, with text reading 'PACKAGING,' '5%,' '$0.25,' and 'BRANDING,' '5%,' '$0.25.' All text is extremely legible, with no superfluous lengthy paragraphs, and the image contains no watermarks whatsoever.

title: Miniature Paris Built with French Food
prompt_cn: An ultra-high-precision macro tilt-shift photography work, presenting a miniature Paris cityscape (Diorama) constructed entirely from French culinary ingredients under a wide panoramic composition. At the center of the frame stands the iconic Eiffel Tower, its structural framework built from intricately interwoven baked baguette sticks, pretzel rods, and hard pulled-sugar pieces serving as steel girders, with melted Gruyère cheese used as adhesive at the joints, the surface gleaming with an appetizing sheen of baked oils and fats. To the left of the tower, the Arc de Triomphe is constructed from a large, distinctly layered Mille-feuille, with rich vanilla cream sandwiched between the puff pastry layers, and the relief details on its surface sculpted from finely piped royal icing. In the background and lining both sides of the streets stand Haussmann-style apartment buildings, their walls assembled from stacked French crêpes and sliced bread, rooftops covered with dark brown dark chocolate shavings and layered black truffle slices mimicking the classic zinc rooftops; the balcony railings are curved chocolate curls. In the foreground, a shimmering wine-red liquid (red wine) representing the Seine River winds through the scene, spanned by bridges assembled from large butter croissants. The cobblestones of the streets are composed of densely arranged green lentils, capers, and coarse sea salt grains, while the miniature roadside trees are clusters of fresh broccoli and parsley, dusted with frost-like powdered sugar. On the right side, the Louvre Pyramid is faintly visible, assembled from translucent thin sugar art pieces and geometrically cut Brie cheese. The image employs a shallow depth-of-field effect from a macro lens (f/2.8), with the river in the foreground and the buildings in the distance exhibiting soft edge bokeh, the visual focal point locked tightly on the building cluster in the middle ground, creating a strong miniature scale model sensation. Soft macro lighting falls upon the ingredients, producing mouth-watering oily highlights and ambient occlusion (AO) shadows, presenting extraordinarily delicate textures at 8K resolution with an Unreal Engine 5-level rendering quality. The entire scene is constructed exclusively from authentic French savory and sweet culinary ingredients, excluding any real metal, concrete, plastic, tableware, or human elements.

title: Night Street Looking-Back Portrait Photography
prompt_cn:
A realistic-style nighttime street portrait photography shot. The image employs a horizontal composition, with the main subject being a young woman standing in a city alleyway at night, her body slightly turned away from the camera, glancing back over her shoulder to gaze into the lens. Her facial expression is soft and natural, with slightly tousled dark long hair cascading freely, a few strands falling and resting against both sides of her cheeks, framing her facial contours. She wears a thick, textured dark coat.

Due to the shallow depth-of-field effect achieved with a wide aperture, the city alleyway in the background is deeply blurred. The background is filled with colorful circular bokeh, formed by distant neon lights and streetlamp halos.

The lighting in the image presents a cinematic quality, with warm red and yellow light blending together, illuminating the woman's profile, the bridge of her nose, and the edges of her hair, creating soft highlights and distinct rim lighting; meanwhile, the ambient light in the surrounding background carries cool tones, with warm and cool colors intermingling throughout the frame, creating a dim yet emotionally evocative nighttime atmosphere. The photograph possesses extremely high clarity and hyper-realistic quality—the woman's skin texture, subtle facial contours, reflections in her eyes, and the sheen of every individual strand of hair are all rendered with vivid realism, the overall visual effect resembling a cinematic still frame captured through a 35mm lens.

title: Retro Casual Female Lifestyle Portrait
prompt_cn: An ultra-detailed, high dynamic range professional lifestyle photograph. At the center of the frame is a young woman, casually and relaxedly leaning back on a soft fabric sofa in a light neutral tone. One of her arms rests naturally on the sofa backrest, her legs stretched out and relaxed, exuding an effortless modern streetwear attitude. The woman has naturally voluminous, long curly dark brown hair, with skin exhibiting realistic texture and subtle freckles on her cheeks. Her makeup is minimal and clean, primarily in natural tones. She gazes directly into the camera with a calm, confident expression, conveying a relaxed and natural aura. In terms of attire, she wears a vintage-style cropped graphic T-shirt with faded, distressed English lettering reading 'NEW YORK CITY' across the chest. On the bottom, she pairs it with high-waisted, loose-fit blue jeans and white casual sneakers. Around her neck, she wears multiple layered gold necklaces. The image clearly captures the denim grain texture of the jeans and the fabric texture of the sofa. The setting is a modern industrial-style urban loft living room. In the background, an exposed red brick wall is visible, with a framed abstract art piece leaning against it, featuring simple black lines and color blocks. Beside it stands a potted fiddle-leaf fig with broad leaves in a soft green hue. On one side of the room, there are large black-framed industrial floor-to-ceiling windows, through which a soft urban skyline silhouette is faintly visible. The entire space appears spacious, modern, and full of lived-in character. The photography employs a 35mm lens with an eye-level perspective composition; the vertical framing fully encompasses the subject's primary pose. The depth of field is moderate, with the subject in sharp focus while the background presents a soft bokeh effect. The lighting primarily comes from soft natural daylight streaming through the large windows, casting gentle, gradual shadows on the subject's face. The dominant color palette consists of the sofa's beige and the denim blue of the jeans, accented by the subject's warm skin tones, the green of the plant, and the brick red of the background. The overall color grading is natural and authentic with a subtle warmth, free of heavy filter effects, demonstrating an exceptionally high degree of photorealism.

title: Bear & Girl Reading Under the Tree
prompt_cn: A vertically composed hand-drawn children's storybook illustration. The image presents a warm, healing, and whimsical picture book style, with a distinct colored pencil hand-drawn texture and slightly rough, organic soft pencil outlines. At the center of the image, beside a stout oak tree, sits an enormous light brown plush teddy bear. The bear has a rounded body with semi-cartoonish proportions, and minimalist yet expressive facial features: just two black bead eyes and a small, curved smile line. Nestled comfortably against the bear's fuzzy belly is an adorable little girl. She has short brown hair and wears a soft light pink short-sleeved top and pale blue overalls. The little girl likewise has simple bead eyes and a gentle smile; she holds an open hardcover picture book in both hands, as if reading aloud to the bear. On the book's cover, the word 'STORIES' is written in a childlike colored pencil font. The bear and the little girl sit on a light green meadow, where rows of fine grass textures drawn in pencil are visible. In the lower right corner of the image grows a large cartoon mushroom with a red cap and white polka dots, surrounded by a scattering of simple yellow five-petaled wildflowers. The oak tree trunk is positioned on the left side of the image and extends toward the top, its lush green canopy occupying the upper left area of the frame. A thin string hangs from a branch, bearing a small yellow star ornament. In the upper right corner of the background is a warm, pale blue sky with two soft-edged white clouds that have a casual doodle-like quality. In terms of artistic style, the entire illustration employs a warm, bright, and friendly pastel color palette. The lighting and shadows are extremely soft, with no strong contrasts or deep shadows, rendered primarily through flat color fills complemented by slight pencil grain texture and gentle transitions; highlights retain a warm pencil-white reserve quality. The overall visual is clean and simple, thoroughly eschewing 3D rendering and realistic lighting, perfectly aligned with a cozy, joyful, non-realistic hand-drawn children's illustration aesthetic.

title: Backlit Film Girl Portrait
prompt_cn: A vertical Japanese film-style portrait photograph. A young East Asian woman turns to look back over her shoulder, her expression soft with a hint of melancholy, lips slightly parted. She has fair skin with natural, light makeup, wearing a dark jacket, with long, slightly tousled dark brown curly hair. The setting is a cluttered interior space (such as an old bookstore or studio), with a blurred background revealing wooden shelving, papers, and boxes. The foreground is partially obscured by translucent glass or plastic, creating a sense of depth and layering. Warm golden hour sunlight enters from the left, producing strong backlighting and a hair rim light, accompanied by lens flare, Tyndall light beams, and film grain. Shallow depth of field with precise focus on the face, the overall image evoking a cinematic, ethereal, and nostalgic atmosphere.

title: Flowers & Affection Meadow Romantic Close-Up
prompt_cn: A romantic photographic still with the texture of 35mm cinema film. The frame employs a horizontal composition and an extremely shallow depth-of-field close-up, focusing on the intimate interaction between a man and a woman on an outdoor grassy field. The two face each other at very close range, their gazes meeting with deep affection, brimming with quiet romantic tension. The woman is positioned on one side of the frame, wearing a simple white thin-strapped cotton top that reveals her relaxed shoulders, her body leaning slightly forward; she has long dark brown hair falling naturally and softly, her facial expression calm and tender, the corners of her lips carrying a faint warmth. The man is on the other side of the frame, wearing a casual white sleeveless tank top, his dark wavy curly hair slightly tousled, with natural short stubble along his jawline. His arm is raised, a minimalist and understated mechanical watch adorning his wrist; his fingers are well-defined with gentle movements, pinching a delicate pink cosmos flower and carefully tucking it into the hairline at the woman's temple. The background is a countryside wildflower meadow, rendered as large swathes of softly blurred green vegetation and grass, forming a creamy, fine natural bokeh, devoid of any man-made structures. It is the golden hour of the late afternoon, and soft warm natural light bathes the two of them, leaving warm highlights on their realistically detailed skin textures, with gentle light transitions and no harsh shadows. The color palette is dominated by warm greens and natural skin tones, with the pink flower serving as a visual accent; the overall image carries authentic film grain and a slight highlight halation, realistic in texture yet deeply nostalgic and poetic.
